title: Creative strategist — beauty/skincare ecommerce
description:
We are a fast-growing direct-response skincare brand generating $300K+ in monthly revenue across Europe. We’re looking for a Creative Strategist to take ownership of our ad creative pipeline — from concept development to post-launch analysis.



What You’ll Do

Develop high-performing ad concepts for Meta (video and static) based on performance data.

Write detailed creative briefs for video editors and UGC creators.

Analyze what’s working and what’s not, identifying hooks, angles, and formats to test.

Build and maintain a structured creative testing roadmap.

Stay up to date with trends in beauty and skincare DTC advertising.

What We’re Looking For

Proven experience working with a DTC ecommerce brand generating $300K+ per month.

Strong understanding of Meta Ads, including hooks, formats, and creative fatigue cycles.

Experience in beauty, skincare, or health is a strong advantage.

Excellent copywriting skills with a direct-response mindset.

Data-driven approach to decision-making.

Highly organized and able to manage multiple projects simultaneously.

Nice to Have

Experience with European markets (DE, FR, PL, ES, IT).

Familiarity with UGC production workflows.

Basic knowledge of Klaviyo or
 marketing.

How to Apply



Please send:



A brief introduction about yourself and your experience.

2–3 examples of ad campaigns or creative work you’ve contributed to.

The brands or stores you’ve worked with and their approximate revenue.



Applications without examples will not be reviewed.



Short Version (Optional)



Creative Strategist — Beauty & Skincare Ecommerce



Fast-growing skincare brand doing $300K+ per month across Europe is seeking a Creative Strategist to lead the ad creative pipeline.



Key Responsibilities



Develop Meta ad concepts (video and static)

Write creative briefs for UGC and editors

Analyze performance and scale winning angles

Build a structured testing roadmap



Requirements



Experience with a $300K+/month DTC brand

Strong Meta Ads expertise

Direct-response copywriting skills

Data-driven and highly organized



Apply with: Intro + 2–3 examples + brands/revenue.

Note: Applications without examples will not be reviewed.

title: Customer Service Representative — UK E-Commerce (Health & Beauty / Wellness)
description:
We're a fast-growing UK e-commerce business selling health and beauty products and sexual wellness products across our own Shopify websites, Amazon, and other marketplaces. 



We're hiring a customer service representative to manage our helpdesk full-time. You'll be handling 50–100 tickets per day, resolving customer queries quickly and professionally using our existing templates and playbook.



This is a long-term role with a stable, established business — not a short-term project.



What you'll be doing:



> Responding to customer enquiries via our helpdesk (HelpScout)

> Processing order cancellations and address changes in our order management system (Linnworks)

> Handling change of mind returns, product queries, and delivery status updates

> Checking order details across Shopify and Amazon when needed

> Escalating anything outside the playbook to the business owner

> Maintaining response times under 1 hour during working hours wherever possible



What we're looking for:



> Proven e-commerce customer service experience (ideally with Shopify, Amazon, or marketplace sellers)

> Excellent written English — clear, professional, friendly tone

> Experience with helpdesk/ticketing tools (HelpScout, Zendesk, Freshdesk, Gorgias or similar)

> Comfortable learning new systems quickly — you'll be trained on our specific tools within your first week

> Reliable, self-motivated, and able to work independently with minimal supervision

> Stable internet connection and a dedicated, distraction-free workspace



Nice to have but not essential:



> Experience with Linnworks or similar order management systems

> Familiarity with health and beauty or sexual wellness product categories

> Experience working with UK-based businesses



What we provide:



> Full training including screen-share walkthroughs and a written CS playbook

> Clear templates for all common ticket types — you won't be guessing

> A stable, long-term position with a growing business

> Supportive working environment with clear escalation paths



To apply:



Please reply with a brief summary of your relevant CS experience, which helpdesk tools you've used, and your availability to start. 



A short sample response to the following test ticket would be appreciated:



"Hi, I ordered the wrong shade of nail polish and I'd like to return it for a different shade. I only received it yesterday. Can you help?"

title: Social Media Strategist & Digital Designer
description:
Position Overview

We are seeking a Social Media Marketer who pairs a deep understanding of social psychology with high-level Graphic Design and AI-driven workflows. This role is specifically focused on dominating
 and Instagram—moving beyond "posting content" to strategically engineering engagement.

You should be an expert in the distinct cultures of Meta’s platforms, knowing exactly how a design should differ between a high-intent
 Group post and a high-aesthetic Instagram Carousel.



Key Responsibilities

1. Platform-Specific Strategy

• Meta Mastery: Execute growth strategies tailored specifically to
 and Instagram algorithms to maximize organic reach and engagement.

• Strategic Planning: Develop content pillars that align with the audience behaviors of each platform (e.g., community building on FB, visual storytelling on IG).

• AI Implementation: Use Generative AI tools (like Gemini, and ChatGPT) to brainstorm campaign concepts, generate unique imagery, and optimize copywriting at scale.

2. Graphic Design & Visual Assets

• High-End Design: Create thumb-stopping static assets, including infographics, branded carousels, and promotional graphics using Canva or  Adobe Photoshop.

• AI-Assisted Design: Leverage AI to enhance photos, expand backgrounds, and generate custom textures or elements that set our brand apart from stock imagery.

• Layout & Typography: Ensure every post maintains a premium feel with professional-grade layout, color theory, and typographic hierarchy.

3. Marketing & Community Dynamics

• Audience Psychology: Craft captions and visuals based on what triggers shares, saves, and comments.

• Conversion Focus: Understand the "Customer Journey", using social media to move followers from the feed to our website or lead forms.

• Competitive Analysis: Monitor shifts in Meta’s ecosystem (new features, interface changes) to keep our brand ahead of the curve.

Job Title: Social Media Strategist & Digital Designer (FB + IG Focus)



Position Overview

We are seeking a Social Media Marketer who pairs a deep understanding of social psychology with high-level Graphic Design and AI-driven workflows. This role is specifically focused on dominating
 and Instagram, moving beyond "posting content" to strategically engineering engagement.

You should be an expert in the distinct cultures of Meta’s platforms, knowing exactly how a design should differ between a high-intent
 Group post and a high-aesthetic Instagram Carousel.



Key Responsibilities

1. Platform-Specific Strategy

• Meta Mastery: Execute growth strategies tailored specifically to
 and Instagram algorithms to maximize organic reach and engagement.

• Strategic Planning: Develop content pillars that align with the audience behaviors of each platform (e.g., community building on FB, visual storytelling on IG).

• AI Implementation: Use Generative AI tools (like Gemini, Midjourney, or Adobe Firefly) to brainstorm campaign concepts, generate unique imagery, and optimize copywriting at scale.

2. Graphic Design & Visual Assets

• High-End Design: Create thumb-stopping static assets, including infographics, branded carousels, and promotional graphics using Adobe Photoshop.

• AI-Assisted Design: Leverage AI to enhance photos, expand backgrounds, and generate custom textures or elements that set our brand apart from stock imagery.

• Layout & Typography: Ensure every post maintains a premium feel with professional-grade layout, color theory, and typographic hierarchy.

3. Marketing & Community Dynamics

• Audience Psychology: Craft captions and visuals based on what triggers shares, saves, and comments.

• Conversion Focus: Understand the "Customer Journey", using social media to move followers from the feed to our website or lead forms.

• Competitive Analysis: Monitor shifts in Meta’s ecosystem (new features, interface changes) to keep our brand ahead of the curve.



Required Experience

• 2+ Years of dedicated social media marketing experience for brands or agencies.

• Design Portfolio: Must demonstrate a clean, modern aesthetic with a focus on static social media assets (Carousels, Feed Posts, Ads).

• Strategic Thinking: Ability to explain the why behind a design choice based on marketing data, not just "because it looks good."





Ideal Candidate Profile

You are a "Creative Scientist." You love the art of a perfectly designed Photoshop layout, but you are equally obsessed with the data of why one post outperformed another. You don't fear AI; you use it to produce a week's worth of high-quality content in a fraction of the time.



***Very important: Do take note that the applicant is required to share their updated CV with appropriate access. Applicants who are non compliant with this will be automatically ignored.***

title: Digital Marketer
description:
Atlas Medical is seeking a proactive Digital Marketer to join our team and drive inbound lead generation in the healthcare B2B sector. This remote role focuses on executing practical online marketing activities 
 campaigns, LinkedIn content, SEO, blog writing, backlinks, etc.) to keep our sales funnel full. 



Our digital marketer will need to  bring specialized marketing expertise. You must be adept in areas like LinkedIn management, content marketing, SEO,
 campaigns, and analytics to expand Atlas’s visibility and capture qualified healthcare buyer inquiries. 



The ideal candidate will be detail-oriented, highly organized, and able to work independently during Eastern Time business hours with live responsiveness. Availability and fast response times are critical.



Role Summary

The Digital Marketer will work closely with Atlas Medical’s owner to increase qualified inbound opportunities. Core duties include: planning and sending
 blasts; creating and scheduling LinkedIn posts; managing SEO execution (keyword research, on-page updates); writing and publishing blogs; building and tracking backlinks; and optimizing website conversion performance. In essence, this person will handle hands-on marketing tasks that grow Atlas’s pipeline – for example, writing and post blogs (via our Duda platform), coordinating
 campaigns (using
Octopus), and following up on digital leads.



Key Responsibilities: 

- Plan, draft, and send professional
 campaigns (design, copy, list segmentation) using
Octopus

- Create, post, and engage on LinkedIn to boost brand awareness and find leads

- Perform SEO tasks: keyword research (Ubersuggest), optimize website pages (titles, meta, content), and improve organic rankings.

- Write and publish B2B content (blog posts, articles, case studies) to showcase Atlas’s expertise

- Develop backlink outreach plans (e.g. guest posts or PR) to strengthen domain authority.

- Monitor and report on digital marketing performance (inbound leads, MQLs, website metrics) and continuously refine tactics.



Required Skills & Qualifications

- B2B Marketing Expertise: Proven experience in digital marketing activities (social media, content writing,
 campaigns, SEO) – ideally in a B2B or technical field. Strong writing and editing skills are essential to craft clear, professional copy.



- Technical Proficiency: Comfortable using marketing software tools. We use the Duda website platform

 for site updates,
Octopus for
 marketing, Ubersuggest for SEO keyword research, plus LinkedIn for publishing content. You should be able to learn and navigate these tools (experience with them is a plus).



-Data & Analytics Mindset: Ability to track and interpret performance metrics (e.g. Google Analytics,
 open rates, keyword rankings). You’ll regularly report on key results (inbound inquiries, conversion rates, SEO rank improvements).



- Organization & Independence: Highly organized with strong attention to detail. We need someone who can take ownership of recurring tasks (weekly
, monthly blog, etc.) and follow through without constant supervision. Reliability and consistency are musts.



- Communication: Excellent written and verbal English skills. You must be responsive during work hours (fast replies to messages, timely updates on tasks). You must bereliable, consistent, and responsive during Eastern Standard Time workday

.

Preferred Experience

- Healthcare or Medical Devices: Background in healthcare, hospitals, or medical device marketing is a plus, given our focus on mobile imaging and cath lab rentals. 

- B2B Lead Gen: Experience generating qualified leads for B2B services or equipment.

- SEO & Content Marketing: Proven track record of improving site search rankings and engagement through content strategies.

-
 & CRM Tools: Prior experience with
 marketing platforms or CRMs.

- Graphic or Web Skills: Basic skills in design (Canva) and comfortable editing website content.



Tools & Platforms

The Digital Marketer will use Atlas’s existing marketing toolset. Familiarity with these or similar platforms is expected:



Duda – Our website builder

You’ll update blog pages and ensure blog updates go smoothly.



Octopus – Our
 marketing service

You’ll create and send newsletters, set up campaigns, and monitor
 analytics.



Ubersuggest – SEO/keyword research tool

Use it to find target keywords (e.g. “modular cath lab rentals”) and track rankings.



LinkedIn – Primary social channel for B2B content. We need to post regularly to engage healthcare executives. You should know how to publish posts/articles and manage a company page.



You may also use standard office/cloud tools (Google Sheets/Docs, Excel). Being tech-savvy and able to quickly learn new tools is important.



Hours & Availability

Eastern Time Work Hours: This is a remote role requiring live overlap with US Eastern Time business hours. The VA must work Weekday hours (Monday–Friday, ~9am–5pm ET) and be actively online for real-time communication. Candiates must be reachable on EST during the workweek (teams coordinate via
, whatsapp, and zoom).

Responsiveness: Rapid response to communications is critical.

The Digital Marketer should check in regularly, update on task status, and reply to queries promptly.

Workload: TBD. Will start as part time and ramp up as needed based on results.



Compensation

Format: We offer a competitive hourly rate based on experience.

Payment: Paid weekly.



How to Apply

Please provide the folloiwng:

Introduction: A brief cover letter explaining why you’re a strong fit for this role (mention relevant experience with
, SEO, content, etc.).



Resume: Highlighting your digital marketing and virtual assistant experience.



Portfolio/Work Samples: Links or attachments of relevant work (e.g. a LinkedIn post you wrote, an
 newsletter you designed, a blog article or SEO report).



Tools Experience: List the platforms you’ve used (especially Duda or other website builders,
Octopus or other
 tools, Ubersuggest/SEO tools).



Availability: Confirm your availability for Eastern Time hours (weekday)



Rate: Specify your hourly rate or monthly fee expectation.



Applications without clear confirmation of EST availability and response capabilities will not be considered. We are looking for someone dependable and long-term who can execute tasks autonomously while staying communicative.

title: Social Media Content Strategist *Superstar Only
description:
We're hiring a Social Media Content Strategist to lead the creative vision, ideation, and strategic direction behind our short-form content engine across Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts. This is the senior creative role on the social team. You are the person who has the ideas - who watches a long-form episode and immediately knows which fifteen seconds will stop a scroll, who sees a cultural 
nt and already has three concepts ready before anyone asks.



You will be working directly with a creator who has over 4 million followers across platforms, with Instagram as the primary channel. Our content operation is structured like a studio with batch production, performance metrics, and AI-native systems. You own the creative engine - the ideas, the concepts, the narrative direction, and the quality standard. You manage the Content Producer who handles daily execution, publishing, and platform operations. Together you run a system that produces high-volume, high-quality content every day.



This is a full-time remote position. We are looking for a senior creative operator who generates ideas naturally, understands modern platform dynamics at a deep level, actively integrates AI into workflows, and holds every piece of content to an elite standard. A genuine interest in health, beauty, and strong visual aesthetics is essential - this is the world we operate in, and you need to live and breathe it.



Responsibilities

- Generate and develop original content ideas, concepts, and creative angles on a continuous basis. You are the primary source of what we make and why.

- Identify high-retention 
nts within long-form content and develop them into short-form concepts with clear hooks, narrative arcs, and platform-specific angles.

- Develop creative briefs and direction for each content cycle, giving the Content Producer and editors clear guidance on what to build and how it should feel.

- Lead trend research and cultural awareness across TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts, spotting opportunities early and translating them into on-brand concepts.

- Translate brand strategy into high-performing content concepts, story structures, and creative playbooks that guide all short-form output.

- Define and evolve the brand's visual and tonal identity across platforms, maintaining a cohesive and premium creative standard.

- Direct and approve content through production and post-production, ensuring quality, creative alignment, and platform-ready formatting before anything publishes.

- Manage the Content Producer by setting priorities, providing creative direction, reviewing output, and ensuring disciplined execution of the publishing calendar.

- Analyze performance data at a strategic level, identifying what is working, why it is working, and how to double down or pivot.

- Build and optimize repeatable creative systems, including AI-driven workflows that streamline ideation, editing, and production.

- Partner with the production team to ensure social-first thinking is embedded in long-form content capture and planning.



Requirements

- 5+ years of experience in a creative strategy or production leadership role in digital media, YouTube, branded content, or entertainment with proven results.

- A natural idea generator who consistently develops strong content concepts, creative angles, and fresh approaches without waiting to be briefed.

- Genuine interest in health, beauty, and aesthetics. You naturally follow this space, understand the visual standards, and care about how things look and feel.

- Deep fluency in platform culture and trends. You know what is trending, why it is working, and how to adapt it to a creator's voice without losing authenticity.

- Strong understanding of storytelling, pacing, hooks, and modern platform dynamics across TikTok, Instagram, YouTube Shorts, and emerging formats.

- Demonstrated experience managing at least one direct report and owning creative and performance outcomes.

- Proven ability to operate across creative strategy and production logistics while maintaining high quality standards.

- Editing and design literacy. You do not need to be the hands-on editor, but you must be able to direct editors and designers with precise, actionable feedback.

- AI-forward operator who actively integrates AI into creative and production workflows. Bonus for familiarity with tools such as Runway, VEO or Flow, ChatGPT, or Claude.

- Strong editorial judgment. You can look at a piece of content and immediately know what is missing, what is not working, and how to fix it.

- Excellent communication skills and ability to give clear, concise creative direction.

- Must submit a strong portfolio demonstrating creative direction, ideation, and platform-native content across multiple formats.

- Recognized for exceptional achievements such as attaining Latin Honors (Summa Cum Laude, Magna Cum Laude, Cum Laude), performance awards, or demonstrating fast career progression into higher roles.



Results

- A consistent pipeline of strong content ideas and creative concepts that drive the team's output forward.

- Trending sounds, formats, and cultural 
nts consistently identified and turned into on-brand content before they peak.

- A high-functioning creative system with predictable output and strong quality control.

- Content that reinforces the creator's positioning while maintaining consistency and a premium standard across platforms.

- Measurable increase in traffic from short-form content to long-form assets.



Requirements for Effective Remote Work

- Reliable computer or laptop capable of handling video production workflows.

- High-speed internet connection plus backup.

- Conducive work environment.



Working Schedule

- Full-time remote position.



Compensation

- Salary will be based on skills, speed, portfolio output, and experience.



Benefits

- Competitive salary.

- Paid Time Off from day one, increasing to 10 days annually after six months with the company.

- Training and development opportunities.

- Opportunity to contribute to a rapidly expanding content team producing world-class creator content.

- Great potential for career advancement into leadership positions.



Application Instructions

Since this is a long-term position, there will be an in-depth qualification process. If you believe you have what it takes, here is what to do next:



Please go to the link below, review the questions carefully, and share the required information.






If you believe you meet our qualifications and requirements, we encourage you to apply now and become a valuable part of our rapidly expanding company.

description:

We are looking for a talented Video Editor to join our team and help us create high-quality short-form content (TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts).



About the Role

You will be provided with raw, unedited footage, and your role will be to turn it into engaging, high-performing short-form videos. The focus is on speed, quality, and understanding what works on social media.



Responsibilities



Edit raw footage into short-form content (15–60 seconds)

Add captions, cuts, transitions, and effects where needed

Optimise videos for platforms like TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube

Follow content briefs and brand style guidelines

Deliver edits quickly and consistently



Requirements



Strong video editing skills (CapCut, Premiere Pro, Final Cut, etc.)

Experience creating short-form/social media content

Good sense of pacing, hooks, and retention

Ability to work independently and meet deadlines

Understanding of social media algorithms is a big bonus



Working Structure



Open to full-time salary or pay-per-project (flexible depending on experience and output)



To Apply

Please send:



Your CV

Examples of previous work (especially short-form content)



We’re looking to move quickly and start working with the right person ASAP.

title: Title Performance Analyst
description:
PLEASE APPLY THROUGH THIS LINK: 
/apply-job-1



About us:



With over 100 years of combined industry experience, the Community Minerals team specializes in the purchase of mineral or royalty rights all over the US. We have earned a stellar reputation with hundreds of satisfied customers and an “A” Rating with the Better Business Bureau. With our proven track record, we continue to serve mineral owners in several states with transparency, accountability, and a personalized experience to meet individual needs.



Job Summary:



The Performance Analyst will be responsible for processing business processes and initiatives to ensure the attainment of the organization’s goals and objectives. This role is also responsible for activities that support the creation and management of dashboards and reports, which will guide the management’s decision-making process. 



Job Description:



-Building and designing reports from multiple data sources exported from varied systems and tools

-Generating and updating daily, weekly, monthly, and yearly KPI reports to be used in tracking and evaluating team performance 

-Work in direct partnership with leadership to understand the organization's needs around data analysis and data processing aimed toward implementing data-driven decisions 

-Accountable for real-time reporting, documenting, and diagnosing trends on key performance metrics. 

-Implementing processes for data collection, cleanup, maintenance, analysis forecasting, and validation for organization-wide data 

-Execute marketing response forecasts and own the development and implementation of staffing and metric models, reporting, and analysis. 

-Develop, maintain, and update process-related handbooks for all aspects of the role



Education:



-Bachelor’s Degree in Statistics, Computer Science, Economics, Data Science or a related field



Experience:



-1-3 years of experience in performance metric analysis

-Proven experience in data analysis, report generation, and performance analysis is required

-Experience in data analysis tools and software is a plus

-Experience with cross-functional teams and collaborating with leadership is a plus



Technical Skills:



-Proficiency in CRM Software

-Must have Structured Query Language Skills 

-Intermediate to advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel/ Google Sheets

-Inquisitive and analytical to understand root causes and patterns in data

-Experience in workforce management with a call center company is an advantage 

-Strong knowledge of data collection, data clean-up, and data visualization techniques

-Familiarity with statistical analysis and forecasting techniques



Soft Skills:



-Excellent Organization skills to handle multiple tasks within set deadlines 

-Excellent oral and written communication skills to effectively convey information and develop presentations for multiple levels of the organization

-Strong quantitative skills in data management and application of statistical tools and models 

-Problem-solving and analytical skills

-Ability to work independently and as part of a team 





What's in it for You:

- Competitive Compensation: Earn $3.38 - $4.19 per hour, commensurate with your skills and experience.

- Work your way: Remote Work Set-Up enabling you to operate from the comfort and convenience of your own chosen workspace

- Flexible Healthcare Bonus (Philippines): A healthcare bonus you control. Use it for HMO coverage, life insurance, or set it aside as an emergency fund—whatever best supports your well-being. It’s entirely up to you.

- Success Incentives: Enjoy company bonuses and performance-driven rewards.

- Soar with Us: Opportunities for career growth and promotions await you.

- Positive Vibes Only: Experience a supportive and uplifting work culture.

- Annual Bonus: We value your dedication throughout the year, rewarding you with an annual performance bonus shared at the end of the year.

- Performance Raise: Your hard work doesn't go unnoticed. Be ready to seize opportunities for a salary increase based on your outstanding performance.

- Performance Incentives: We believe exceptional work deserves recognition. Performance incentives are awarded to individuals who demonstrate outstanding contributions, initiative, and results. It’s our way of celebrating excellence and motivating continued success.

- Discretionary Bonus: At Community Minerals, exceptional work doesn’t go unnoticed. Contractors who consistently go above and beyond may be rewarded with discretionary bonuses, a token of appreciation for outstanding contributions, impactful results, and dedication to excellence. Let your work speak, and the rewards will follow!



Other Requirements:

- Willing to work in US Business Hours (CST)

- Must have stable Internet and Power Connection

- Must have a Computer with at least 2 monitors set up, a stable Internet Connection



System Requirements:

To ensure optimal performance and functionality while using different web and application tools, please make sure that your syste
ets the following requirements:



Operating System:

- Windows: Windows 10 (64-bit) or higher

- macOS: macOS 11 (Big Sur) or higher



Processor:

- Intel: 8th Gen Core i3, i5, i7, or newer

- AMD: Ryzen 3 (2018) or newer



Memory (RAM):

- A minimum of 8 GB of RAM is required.

- Recommended: 16 GB RAM for multitasking and optimal performance



Job Type: Full-time



Application Question(s):

-Have you worked with performance tracking, KPIs, or operational reporting in a title or real estate environment? If yes, please describe your role.

-When given an existing SOP or handbook, how do you approach learning and improving it?

-Do you prefer routine tasks or problem-solving and process improvement? Why?

-What motivates you more: completing tasks or improving systems?

title: Social Media Content Producer *Superstar Only*
description:
We're hiring a Social Media Content Producer to own the daily execution, publishing, and production operations behind our short-form content engine across Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts. This is the hands-on execution role on the social team. You take creative direction and turn it into finished, polished, published content - fast, clean, and on-brand, every single day.



You will be working directly with a creator who has over 4 million followers across platforms, with Instagram as the primary channel. Our content operation is structured like a studio with batch production, performance metrics, and AI-native systems. You report to the Content Strategist who sets the creative direction and generates the ideas. Your job is to bring those ideas to life - editing, designing, scheduling, publishing, tracking performance, and keeping the entire production machine running smoothly.



This is a full-time remote position. We are looking for a fast, detail-oriented executor who can produce high-quality short-form content at volume, manage publishing workflows across multiple platforms, and actively use AI tools to increase speed and output. A genuine interest in health, beauty, and strong visual aesthetics is essential - this is the world we operate in, and you need to live and breathe it.



Responsibilities

- Produce 2 to 3 short-form videos and supporting graphics per day, including editing, trimming, captioning, and polishing content for Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts.

- Execute on creative briefs and direction provided by the Content Strategist, turning concepts into finished, platform-ready assets.

- Design on-brand visuals such as carousels, text graphics, thumbnails, and infographics that support the creator's style and messaging.

- Plan, schedule, and publish short-form content across all platforms while maintaining a balanced mix of educational, inspirational, and trend-based formats.

- Follow short-form trends including audio, hooks, captions, and editing styles, and flag relevant opportunities to the Content Strategist.

- Monitor performance metrics weekly and provide insights, recommendations, and data summaries based on watch time, retention, views, and engagement.

- Source and organize trending sounds, audio, and reference content to support the Content Strategist's ideation process.

- Coordinate collaboration posts and identify smart opportunities for creator crossovers and partnership content.

- Keep systems clean in Asana and Google Drive, ensuring clear task ownership, file naming, version control, and a predictable content runway.

- Use AI tools to streamline editing, captioning, clipping, and repurposing workflows to increase daily output and reduce turnaround time.

- Continuously improve and document production workflows to increase the efficiency and scalability of the content system.



Requirements

- 3+ years of experience creating and publishing short-form content for Instagram, TikTok, and/or YouTube Shorts with proven results.

- Genuine interest in health, beauty, and aesthetics. You naturally follow this space, understand the visual standards, and have an eye for what looks premium.

- Editing and design expertise in short-form video editing using Premiere Pro, CapCut, or Final Cut, and strong design ability using Canva or Photoshop, including thumbnails, carousels, text graphics, and supporting visuals.

- Strong ability to take creative direction and execute it accurately and quickly with minimal revision cycles.

- Deep platform fluency across Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and emerging formats, with a clear understanding of distribution mechanics and platform culture.

- Experience managing posting schedules and publishing workflows across multiple platforms, with strong attention to detail, file organization, and systems management.

- Ability to track and interpret performance metrics such as watch time, retention, views, and engagement, and surface insights to inform strategy.

- AI-forward operator who actively uses AI tools in editing and production workflows. Bonus for familiarity with tools such as Runway, VEO or Flow, ChatGPT, or Claude.

- Excellent communication skills for collaborating with the Content Strategist, editors, and cross-functional teams.

- Ability to handle multiple tasks effectively while operating in a high-volume, fast-paced environment.

- Must submit a strong portfolio demonstrating editing, design, and creative execution across multiple short-form formats.

- Recognized for exceptional achievements such as attaining Latin Honors (Summa Cum Laude, Magna Cum Laude, Cum Laude), performance awards, or demonstrating fast career progression into higher roles.



Results

- Social content consistently published within 24 to 48 hours of long-form production wrap.

- Sustained growth in high-quality engagement including shares, saves, retention, and audience sentiment.

- A cohesive, premium social presence that reinforces and amplifies the creator's broader ecosystem.

- Clean, organized production systems with predictable output and minimal missed deadlines.



Requirements for Effective Remote Work

- Reliable computer or laptop capable of video editing.

- High-speed internet connection plus backup.

- Conducive work environment.



Working Schedule

- Full-time remote position.



Compensation

- Salary will be based on skills, speed, portfolio output, and experience.



Benefits

- Competitive salary.

- Paid Time Off from day one, increasing to 10 days annually after six months with the company.

- Training and development opportunities.

- Opportunity to contribute to a rapidly expanding content team producing world-class creator content.

- Great potential for career advancement into leadership positions.



Application Instructions

Since this is a long-term position, there will be an in-depth qualification process. If you believe you have what it takes, here is what to do next:



Please go to the link below, review the questions carefully, and share the required information.






If you believe you meet our qualifications and requirements, we encourage you to apply now and become a valuable part of our rapidly expanding company.

title: Accountant / Bookkeeper - Remote (UK, Ireland, Australia & New Zealand Markets)
description:
Please follow the application instructions below.



About PropFix.ie



PropFix.ie is Ireland's trusted property maintenance specialist, offering comprehensive solutions with years of expertise across the construction and renovation sectors. We transform spaces through our diverse range of services, from handyman solutions and office fit-outs to complete renovations, house extensions, and specialized installations including doors, floors, and partitions.



Our commitment to delivering the best value property maintenance has established us as a reliable partner for residential and commercial clients nationwide. With decades of experience, including 50 years of expertise in garage conversions, we pride ourselves on impeccable craftsmanship, turning our clients' visions into reality while ensuring their properties remain in top condition.



Role Overview



We are seeking a detail-oriented and experienced Accounting Virtual Assistant to join our dynamic team. This role focuses on comprehensive financial management and accounting support, including UK-specific compliance requirements. The successful candidate will be responsible for maintaining accurate financial records, managing accounts payable and receivable, ensuring regulatory compliance, and providing essential financial reporting to support our expanding operations across Ireland and the UK.



Key Responsibilities

Bookkeeping & Financial Data Management



Bookkeeping: Maintain accurate and up-to-date financial records for all business transactions

Data Entry: Process and record financial data with precision and attention to detail

Invoice Management: Handle invoicing processes and payment processing for clients and suppliers

Account Reconciliation: Reconcile bank statements and maintain accurate account balances

Bookkeeping: Maintain accurate and up-to-date financial records using accounting software including MYOB



Accounts Management



Accounts Payable: Manage supplier payments, vendor invoices, and payment scheduling

Accounts Receivable: Monitor client payments, follow up on outstanding invoices, and manage debt collection

Cash Flow Management: Track and report on cash flow positions and payment cycles

Credit Control: Implement credit control procedures and manage customer payment terms



UK Compliance & Regulatory Requirements



CIS Compliance: Manage Construction Industry Scheme (CIS) compliance and monthly reporting

VAT Returns: Prepare and submit VAT returns ensuring full compliance with HMRC requirements

Tax Compliance: Maintain compliance with all UK tax regulations and submission deadlines

HMRC Submissions: Handle various HMRC submissions and correspondence



Payroll & Employment Administration



Payroll Management: Process PAYE (Pay As You Earn) and CIS payroll for employees and subcontractors

Employment Records: Maintain accurate employment records and statutory documentation

Pension Administration: Support workplace pension scheme administration and compliance

Statutory Payments: Calculate and process statutory sick pay, maternity pay, and other employment-related payments



Financial Reporting & Analysis



P&L Preparation: Generate comprehensive Profit & Loss statements and financial reports

Financial Analysis: Provide financial analysis and insights to support business decision-making

Management Reporting: Prepare regular financial reports for management review

Budget Support: Assist with budget preparation and variance analysis



Tax Preparation & Professional Support



Tax Preparation: Prepare and organize documentation for annual tax returns and submissions

Professional Liaison: Work closely with external accountants and tax advisors

Audit Support: Provide documentation and support during audits and financial reviews

Compliance Monitoring: Ensure all financial practices meet regulatory standards



Required Skills & Experience

Essential Qualifications



UK Tax Knowledge: Strong understanding of UK tax system, VAT, CIS, and PAYE regulations

Construction Industry: Experience with construction industry accounting and CIS compliance preferred

Compliance Expertise: Knowledge of HMRC requirements and submission processes

Accounting Software: Proficiency in accounting software (Sage, Xero, QuickBooks, MYOB or similar platforms)



Instructions:

Please complete the attached application form and submit it along with your CV:

title: REAL ESTATECOLD CALLER
description:
REAL ESTATE COLD CALLERS NEEDED ASAP!!!!



We are seeking experienced Real Estate Cold Callers who are confident on the phone, disciplined with follow-ups, and skilled at identifying motivated sellers in the U.S. market.



This is a long-term opportunity for serious Virtual Assistants who understand that cold calling is a professional sales skill — not guesswork.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:



• Make outbound cold calls to U.S. homeowners using provided scripts and dialers

• Identify seller motivation and collect accurate property details

• Handle objections professionally and maintain control of conversations

• Log calls, notes, and lead status accurately in the CRM

• Set appointments or warm-transfer qualified leads to the acquisitions team



REQUIREMENTS:



• Proven experience as a real estate cold caller (REQUIRED)

• Strong English communication skills (clear, confident, professional)

• Comfortable making high-volume outbound calls daily

• Familiarity with U.S. real estate terminology (motivated sellers, equity, probate, pre-foreclosure, etc.)

• Experience using dialers such as Mojo, CallTools, Batch, Readymode, or similar

• Reliable internet connection, quality headset, and quiet work environment



WHY JOIN OUR TEAM:



• Clear expectations, scripts, and systems

• Supportive and professional real estate team

• Growth opportunities within the organization ????

• Stable role — not a short-term project



HOW TO APPLY (REQUIRED FOR SCREENING) ????



Submit the following through OnlineJobs.ph (OLJ):



• Updated resume clearly outlining your real estate cold calling experience

• Audio OR video recording introduction describing your experience speaking with U.S. homeowners and handling objections

• Brief cover letter summarizing your relevant experience in the real estate cold calling space



Applications without an updated resume and audio/video recording will NOT be entertained.



We move quickly with qualified candidates. If you have strong U.S. real estate cold calling experience, we encourage you to apply.

title: Senior Bookkeeper *Superstar Only*
description:
We are looking for two experienced bookkeepers to join our finance team and take ownership of expense categorization, transaction reconciliation, accounts payable, and invoice processing across multiple legal entities.



The bookkeepers will work closely with the CFO, ensuring that all financial transactions are accurately recorded, categorized, and reconciled on a regular basis. This role is ideal for someone who is detail-oriented, organized, and comfortable managing financial data across multiple platforms — including Xero, Stripe, PayPal, Shopify, and our custom CRM.



Key Responsibilities

- Categorize all expenses and transactions in Xero, ensuring accurate classification for reporting and compliance

- Reconcile transactions across multiple payment platforms, including Stripe, PayPal, Shopify, and custom CRM tools

- Manage accounts payable, ensuring all invoices are properly reviewed, recorded, and scheduled for payment

- Assist with invoice processing, ensuring all vendor invoices are accurately documented and match purchase orders where applicable

- Work closely with the CFO to provide up-to-date financial records for monthly, quarterly, and annual reporting

- Ensure all financial data is accurate and properly organized to support compliance across multiple jurisdictions

- Flag discrepancies or unusual transactions for review by the CFO



What We’re Looking For

- At least 5 years of experience in bookkeeping and expense reconciliation

- Strong proficiency in Xero

- Experience working with Stripe, PayPal, Shopify, and custom CRMs

- Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

- Experience handling multi-entity, multi-currency financial data preferred

- Comfortable working in a remote-first environment

- Fluent in English, both written and spoken



Requirements for Effective Remote Work

- Reliable computer or laptop capable of photo and video editing

- Stable high-speed internet connection

- Conducive work environment



Working Schedule

- Full-time opportunity

- Remote work setup (Philippines-based applicants only)



Benefits

title: Medical Records Clerk
description:
We are seeking a detail-oriented and highly organized Medical Records Clerk to join our personal injury law firm. The ideal candidate will play a vital role in supporting our legal team by managing and processing medical records and bills for our clients. This position requires strong communication skills, exceptional attention to detail, and the ability to work independently in a fast-paced environment. The successful candidate will demonstrate strong ownership of their workload, proactively managing tasks, tracking progress, and anticipating next steps without the need for frequent oversight.



Key Responsibilities:



• Request and Follow-Up: Request medical records and bills from healthcare providers and proactively follow up to ensure timely receipt. 

• Data Entry: Accurately enter data fro
dical records and bills into our case management system, including medical codes, CPT codes, providers, and other relevant details. 

• Verification & Processing: Review, verify and process incoming medical records and bills to ensure accuracy, completeness, and consistency with case files in preparation for demand drafting. 

• File Review: Conduct thorough file reviews to confirm all necessary medical records and bills have been received and are complete for demand drafting. 

• Communication: Serve as a liaison between the firm and medical providers to resolve discrepancies, clarify information, and request additional documentation. 

• Organization: Maintain an organized system for tracking requests, deadlines, and follow-ups. 

• Confidentiality: Handle sensitive medical information in compliance with HIPAA and all applicable regulations. 



Qualifications:



• High school diploma or equivalent; additional education or training in medical terminology or coding is a plus. 

• Prior experience in a medical records department, healthcare setting, or law firm is preferred. 

• Strong attention to detail and excellent organizational skills. 

• Effective written and verbal communication skills. 

• Ability to prioritize and manage multiple tasks while meeting deadlines. 

• Familiarity with medical terminology, billing processes, and CPT codes is highly desirable. 

• Must have dual monitors and a dedicated laptop or desktop computer (Windows operating system required) to perform job duties effectively. 



Work Schedule & Expectations:



• Full-time position, Monday through Friday 

• 8:30 AM to 5:00 PM Central Standard Time (CST) 

• Mandatory Monday Zoom huddle at 9:07 AM (CST), with cameras on to support engagement and team collaboration

To support productivity, accountability, and efficient workflow management in a remote environment, the firm may implement a time-tracking tool (such as DeskTime or a similar application). This is intended solely to promote transparency, optimize team performance, and ensure accurate tracking of work hours.



Why Join Our Team?



We are a dynamic law firm dedicated to delivering exceptional service to our clients in a supportive and collaborative environment. As part of our team, you will have the opportunity to make a meaningful impact while continuing to develop your professional skills.



How to Apply:



Please submit your resume and cover letter outlining your relevant experience and why you are a strong fit for the Medical Records Clerk role at Collins Law, LLC. Be sure to include the word “Interested” at the top of your resume to demonstrate your attention to detail and enthusiasm for the position. Applications without this requirement will not be considered.



Equal Opportunity Employer:



Collins Law, LLC is an equal opportunity employer and values diversity in the workplace. We do not discriminate based on race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, disability, or any other legally protected characteristic. We are committed to fostering an inclusive environment where all employees feel valued and respected.

title: HR Admin
description:

mber has a seamless onboarding and operational experience.

mber

5. Compliance & HR Operations Support

Requirements:



Strong organizational and operational mindset

Clear communication and ownership mentality

Comfortable working with tools like Notion, Monday, Boldsign or similar systems

title: Remote Operations & Car Parts Coordinator (Automotive)
description:
Location: Remote



We are a fast-growing, digital-first car dealership based in Sweden, specializing in online car sales with nationwide delivery. We are now looking for a highly structured and detail-oriented Remote Operations & Parts Coordinator to become a key part of our logistics and workshop operations.



This is NOT a passive admin role. You will act as a central “control tower” in our operations — ensuring that nothing falls through the cracks.



---



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES



Parts & Suppliers:

- Identify and order car parts based on internal requests

- Communicate with suppliers (pricing, availability, delivery times)

- Track all orders and ensure timely delivery

- Follow up on delays and missing shipments



Operations & Flow Control:

- Monitor all vehicles in our system (Airtable)

- Identify cars that are “stuck” or delayed in the process

- Flag issues proactively (missing parts, unbooked services, delays)

- Ensure every car always has a clear next step

- Coordinate with internal tea
mbers via Slack



Daily Execution:

- Maintain accurate and up-to-date data in Airtable

- Post daily summaries of priorities and issues

- Follow up with tea
mbers until tasks are completed



---



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE



- No car is “forgotten” or left without a next step

- Parts are ordered quickly and tracked accurately

- Delays are identified BEFORE they become problems

- The team always knows what needs to be done next



---



 WHO YOU ARE



- Extremely organized and structured

- Proactive — you don’t wait for instructions

- Comfortable managing many tasks at once

- Strong communicator in English (written)

- Detail-oriented and reliable

- Problem-solver mindset



---



BONUS (NOT REQUIRED)



- Experience in automotive industry

- Experience with Airtable, Slack or similar tools

- Experience in logistics, operations, or supply chain



---



 TOOLS YOU WILL USE



- Airtable (main system)

- Slack (team communication)

- Google / supplier websites



---



WHY THIS ROLE IS UNIQUE



- You will play a critical role in a fast-scaling company

- High level of ownership and responsibility

- Clear structure, but also freedom to improve processes

- Opportunity to grow into a larger operations role over time



---



HOW TO APPLY



Please include:

1. A short video introduction about yourself

2. Your experience with similar roles

3. An example of how you stay organized when handling many tasks



---



We are looking for someone reliable, structured, and hungry to grow. If you enjoy creating order, solving problems, and being the person who keeps everything running smoothly — this role is for you.

title: Become The Social Media Marketer At Learn Jazz Standards!
description:
(DO NOT
 US YOUR RESUME. WE ONLY CONSIDER CANDIDATES WHO FILL OUT OUR APPLICATION BELOW)



About the Role:



If you're someone who loves social media marketing, gets just as excited about strategy as you do building out content, and wants to take ownership of a key marketing channel in a growing online business, read on...



Learn Jazz Standards is a thriving 7-figure online music education business helping adult musicians finally learn to play jazz without the overwhelm. We're a small team, and that allows us to work fast. We've built a healthy content ecosystem across YouTube, blog, podcast, and
 — and now we're ready to make social media a serious, measurable growth channel.



We're looking for a Social Media Marketer who can do it all: build and execute a strategy, manage the content calendar, create and repurpose content, run ManyChat funnels, and ultimately turn Instagram and
 into real lead generation and sales engines for our business. This role sits at the intersection of execution (posting, scheduling, replying to comments) and strategic marketing (lead gen funnels, selling in the DMs, data driven decision making).



This is a full-time remote role reporting directly to the Founder. You'll be given strategic direction and goals, but we expect you to bring your own ideas, initiatives, and creative thinking to the table.



What You'll Own:



Content Strategy & Execution:



Dramatically increase our content output across Instagram and
 — both in volume and quality

Develop and manage a content calendar using tools like Meta Business Suite or Metricool

Repurpose our deep content library (YouTube videos, course clips, live Q&As, podcast transcripts, blog posts) into platform-native content: Reels, Stories, carousels, static graphics, and more

Write compelling captions, select strategic hashtags, and publish content consistently

Respond to and manage post comments, and interact with leads in the DMs



Content Creation:



Create graphics and short-form video edits when needed (basic video editing required — we have a video editor for heavier lifts, but you need to be able to move fast independently)

Work within our existing brand assets while having the skill to build new templates in Canva or similar tools when the 
nt calls for it



Lead Generation & Sales (Our Primary Objective):



Build and manage ManyChat funnels to convert social media engagement into
 subscribers and customers

Create automated DM flows that generate leads and nurture toward sales

Develop lead magnets from our existing content library to drive opt-ins

Think like a marketer first: every piece of content should serve a lead generation or sales objective



Strategy & Analytics:



Analyze platform data to understand what's working, what's not, and why

Bring data-informed recommendations to weekly strategy sessions with the Founder

Proactively identify new opportunities for growing reach, leads, and sales

Build repeatable systems and document your processes so nothing lives only in your head



What the First 90 Days Look Like:



By the end of your first 90 days, we expect you to have:



Built out a new and improved social media strategy alongside the Founder

Taken full ownership of the content calendar and posting schedule

Meaningfully increased our content output across Instagram and

Launched at least one ManyChat funnel driving measurable leads

Established a reporting rhythm with clear KPIs and progress updates

Demonstrated early, measurable progress — in leads, engagement, or both



What Makes You a Great Fit:



Must-Haves:



-3+ years of experience managing social media for a brand with a lead generation or sales focus — not just vanity metrics

Demonstrated ability to build ManyChat (or equivalent) funnels from scratch — chat automations, DM sequences, lead gen flows



-Strong content creation skills: you can write a great caption, design a clean graphic, and do basic video editing without needing hand-holding



-Comfortable with analytics — you know how to read the data and make decisions from it

Systems-oriented: you build repeatable processes, document your work, and don't let things fall through the cracks



-Self-starter who takes initiative rather than waiting to be told what to do



-Proficient with tools like Meta Business Suite, Metricool (or similar), Canva, and AI tools for content ideation and creation



Strong Plusses:



-Experience with content repurposing workflows — turning long-form content (video, podcast, blog) into social-native formats



-Background in
 marketing or digital funnels (understanding the broader customer journey matters here)



-Genuine enthusiasm for or knowledge of music — especially jazz or music education. Our audience is adult musicians, and understanding how they think, what they struggle with, and the language they use will make everything you do more effective



Compensation & Structure:



Type: Full-time, remote



Salary: $1,500/month (1,075,905 PHP/year)



13th Month Pay: paid out in December



End of year performance bonuses: paid out in December if applicable



Reports to: Founder



Support: You'll have access to a video editor for repurposing existing content, Founder guidance, and support from other tea
mbers when needed.



TO APPLY FILL OUT THIS SHORT APPLICATION: 



(DO NOT
 US YOUR RESUME. WE ONLY CONSIDER CANDIDATES WHO FILL OUT OUR APPLICATION)

title: Social Media Volume Posting/Managing
description:
Video Content Assistant (Part-Time, Remote) 

We produce short-form video content for social media and need a detail-oriented VA to handle post-production and scheduling. We post similar videos accross multiple accounts. Your core task: download raw video clips from a shared Google Drive folder and apply 40 different caption styles to create 40 unique exports per video, then schedule all variations across platforms using SocialPilot. So 1) take one video 2) create 40 variations 3) and then schedule posting across all accounts.



Expected volume is 20-25 videos a week (times 40x variations so
videos total], meaning you may be producing and scheduling hundreds of exports weekly so speed and consistency are essential. These variations do NOT require major or complex edits betyween varaitions. 



You must be comfortable working inside Google Drive, video editing or captioning tools, and social media scheduling platforms — prior experience with any AI caption tool is a strong plus. Attention to detail matters: exports need to be named correctly, organized by style, and scheduled to the right platform and time slot without errors. This is repetitive, process-driven work and you must be someone who executes systems reliably without needing hand-holding. 



To apply, write 2–3 sentences in your own words describing your experience with video tools and scheduling platforms — applications that are clearly AI-generated will be immediately disqualified, so write as yourself. Include the word "captions" somewhere in your subject line so we know you read this fully. Please include your expected rate when applying.

title: Bookkeeping & Tax Associate
description:
About Us:

We are a U.S. based CPA and consulting firm specializing in dental practices. We provide bookkeeping, accounting, tax compliance, and advanced tax planning services. Our firm also offers clients a proprietary software platform and CFO-level consulting. We are seeking a talented and detail-oriented professional from the Philippines to join our growing team in a dual-role capacity.



Role Overview:

This role is a hybrid position combining oversight of our bookkeeping department with support for our U.S. tax team. You will be instrumental in ensuring accurate financial records for our clients while also assisting with tax return preparation and planning.



Key Responsibilities:

Bookkeeping Oversight

• Perform reviews of outsourced bookkeeping projects for accuracy and completeness.

• Onboard new bookkeeping clients (gather information, set up systems, coordinate with outsourcing team).

• Reach out to clients for missing documentation, clarifications, or pending items.

• Ensure client deliverables are completed on time and meet quality standards.



Tax Support

• Assist with preparation of U.S. tax returns (individuals, corporations, partnerships).

• Support tax planning projects by gathering financial data and drafting initial workpapers.

• Collaborate with senior tax staff to ensure compliance and accuracy.

• Stay up to date with U.S. tax deadlines and requirements.



Qualifications

• Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field.

• 3+ years of bookkeeping and/or accounting experience.

• Experience with U.S. tax return preparation (preferred).

• Strong knowledge of QuickBooks Online and Excel.

• Excellent written and spoken English; comfortable communicating directly with clients.

• Highly organized, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple priorities.

• Proactive problem-solver with the ability to work independently in a remote environment.



What We Offer

• Long-term remote opportunity with a growing U.S. firm.

• Competitive pay (based on experience).

• Opportunity to develop expertise in U.S. bookkeeping and taxation.

• Supportive team environment with room for growth.



How to Apply

Send your resume, cover letter, and any relevant U.S. tax experience details to 
 with the subject line: Bookkeeping & Tax Associate Application

title: LOGISTICS 3PL Account Assistant
description:
Account Assistant - Ally Logistics



ABOUT ALLY LOGISTICS:

Ally Logistics is a U.S.-based third-party logistics (3PL) company headquartered in Grand Rapids, Michigan. Since 2012, we’ve been committed to creating the ultimate freight shipping experience by operating at the optimal intersection of people and technology.



As a full-service 3PL, we specialize in a wide range of freight solutions, including dry van, refrigerated, drayage, straight truck, open deck/flatbed, drop-trailer programs, warehousing, and more. Our diverse service capabilities allow us to support shippers across industries with flexible, reliable, and scalable logistics strategies.

We partner with skilled global talent to support our continued growth and operational excellence, ensuring our customers receive efficient, high-quality service at every step of the supply chain.





ROLE SUMMARY:

The Account Assistant supports daily transportation operations by building and scheduling TL shipments in the TMS while ensuring timely same-day and next-day freight coverage across multiple equipment types. This role dispatches drivers and proactively manages track-and-trace activities for Enterprise-specific loads and lanes to ensure on-time performance. 



Regular Weekly Schedule (40 hours): Monday – Friday: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Eastern Standard Time with 1-hour unpaid lunch break from 12:00 PM - 1:00 PM Eastern. Overtime (40+ hours) requires manager approval.





JOB DUTIES/RESPONSIBILITIES: 

-Build and schedule TL shipments in TMS system, effectively and efficiently

-Manage same-day and next-day freight coverage - including dry van, refrigerated, and other equipment types

-Record and update in and out times in customer TMS systems for Enterprise accounts to support visibility and accuracy

-Dispatch drivers and perform proactive track-and-trace for Enterprise specific loads and lanes

-Extract and communicate critical customer updates to the internal team and, when appropriate



KEY PERFORMANCE INDICATORS (KPIs)

-Request pick up / delivery appointments within 2 hours of tender acceptance

-Book Enterprise shipments - 25-50 loads per week



COMPENSATION:

-Compensation will be determined based on experience. All payments are issued in USD via Wise.



REQUIRED SKILLS & QUALIFICATIONS:

-Minimum of 2 years of experience in logistics/3PL industry

-Minimum of 2 years of Customer facing experience, preferably within the logistics/3PL industry

-Strong written and verbal English communication skills

-Ability to work independently with minimal supervision

-Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail

-High attention to detail and accuracy

-Exceptional organizational and time management skills 



Access to:

-A reliable computer with  high-speed internet

-Backup internet source (mobile hotspot or secondary line preferred)

-Webcam + microphone for Zoom calls

-Headset

-Professional remote workspace

-Ability to work U.S. business hours (EST)



Experience with:

-Outlook

-Zoom phone

-Slack

-Basic CRM or logistics platform



Additional Requirements

1. Technology & Equipment Requirements

-Reliable high-speed internet and computer

-Webcam + microphone for Zoom calls

-Quiet, professional workspace



Must be willing to 

2. Availability Requirements

-Ability to work U.S. Eastern Time

-Must provide advanced notice for planned time off

-Must maintain consistent communication (Slack responsiveness,
, etc.)

title: Web Developer & Conversion Tracking Specialist (GA, GTM, Integrations, Hubspot, etc)
description:
Overview:



This role involves Wix web development, Google Analytics / GTM tracking setup, and CRM/system integrations. We are not looking for a manager. We are looking for someone who can figure things out, build systems from scratch, and fix anything that breaks.



This is a part-time, hourly role under EST working hours for a highly resourceful person who steps in whenever technical challenges arise across our marketing stack, websites, and business systems. You will not manage systems day-to-day. You will solve problems, implement solutions, and make things work.



The first project will be migrating our entire website into Wix and setting up all Google integrations and conversion tracking. We expect this to take up to a month to complete. After that, you will work on ongoing projects, including building additional websites, troubleshooting issues, and resolving other technical challenges across our systems.



You should be someone who:

*Can understand a problem and turn it into a working solution

*Knows how to research, test, and troubleshoot across multiple platforms

*Is comfortable using tools you haven’t used before

*Takes full ownership of problems until they are solved



You don’t need to know everything. But you must be able to learn quickly and adapt. 

If you enjoy solving complex problems and building functional systems from start to finish, this role is for you.





Key Responsibilities:



A. Marketing & Tracking Systems 

*Set up and implement tracking systems (Google Analytics, Google Tag Manager, Google Ads, Search Console, YouTube, social media pixels)

*Configure accurate conversion tracking across platforms

*Troubleshoot and fix tracking issues, data discrepancies, or broken integrations

*Implement new tracking or measurement solutions as needed

 

NOTE: This is not a campaign management role. You build and fix, you don’t monitor daily performance



B. Website Development & Systems 

*Build websites and landing pages using Wix and other common website builders

*Work with Wix CMS to create dynamic, database-driven pages

*Implement site functionality (forms, tracking, integrations, etc.)

*Troubleshoot and fix issues across front-end, CMS, and integrations

 

NOTE: This is not an ongoing maintenance role. You build it right and fix it when needed



C. Business Systems & Integrations 

*Set up and connect business systems (Hubspot, CTM/Dialpad, store locators, other tools)

*Ensure systems communicate properly and data flows correctly

*Troubleshoot and resolve system issues, broken automations, or integration failures

 

NOTE: This is not an operations role. You set up integrations and fix problems, not manage day-to-day usage



Qualifications:



A. Technical Skills

*Experience with marketing and analytics tools (GA, GTM, Ads, Search Console, social pixels)

*Hands-on experience with conversion tracking and pixel implementation

*Proficiency in website builders, especially Wix, including CMS/database-driven pages

*Familiarity with CRMs, business operations tools, and system integrations



B. Soft Skills

*Independent problem-solver with strong critical thinking

*Highly adaptable and able to learn new systems quickly

*Strong communication skills with proactive “over-communication”

*Detail-oriented with a systems-thinking mindset



C. Company Core Values

Radical Candor

Extreme Ownership

Anticipation

Lean

Drive

Overcommunication

Growth Mindset 



Compensation:

Part-time, hourly role

$8–$12 USD per hour, depending on experience and skill level



Keywords:

Wix, Wix CMS, Web Development, Website Builder, Dynamic Pages, CMS, Google Analytics, Google Tag Manager, GTM, Conversion Tracking, Google Ads,
 Pixel, Tracking Setup, Marketing Analytics, Hubspot, CRM, API Integrations, Webhooks, Zapier, Automation, Troubleshooting, Debugging, JavaScript (basic), HTML, CSS, Technical Support, System Integration

title: Senior Java Developer (E-commerce)
description:
Summary:

We are seeking an accomplished Senior Java Developer to drive the development and optimization of our e-commerce platform. The ideal candidate will bring extensive experience in Java, microservices architecture, and performance tuning, along with the leadership skills to mentor a growing development team and steer complex projects to success.



Key Responsibilities

Application Design & Development



Architect, design, and develop high-performance, scalable Java-based e-commerce applications.

Implement microservices and event-driven architectures to ensure modular and resilient systems.

Performance Optimization & Scalability



Monitor, analyze, and optimize system performance, memory usage, and throughput.

Troubleshoot concurrency, threading, and performance bottlenecks using advanced profiling tools and techniques.

Technical Leadership



Mentor junior and mid-level developers, setting best practices in coding, testing, and deployment.

Drive architectural decisions and technology choices aligned with business needs and industry standards.

System Integration



Integrate third-party APIs, payment gateways, and services to enhance platform capabilities.

Implement caching solutions (e.g., Redis, Memcached) and messaging systems (e.g., RabbitMQ, Kafka) for efficient data handling.'



Quality Assurance & Testing



Champion test-driven development (TDD) and continuous integration/continuous delivery (CI/CD).

Write and maintain robust unit, integration, and end-to-end tests using frameworks such as JUnit, TestNG, and Mockito.

DevOps & Deployment



Collaborate with DevOps teams to automate builds, deployments, and monitoring (e.g., Jenkins, GitLab CI, Docker, Kubernetes).

Ensure high availability, fault tolerance, and seamless scalability in production environments.

Security & Compliance



Enforce secure coding practices, including data encryption, OAuth/JWT-based authentication, and compliance with PCI-DSS/GDPR where applicable.

Continuously monitor and mitigate security vulnerabilities and threats.

Documentation & Collaboration



Produce clear, comprehensive technical documentation and architectural diagrams.

Work cross-functionally with product managers, QA, UX designers, and other engineers to deliver robust solutions within agile sprints.



Continuous Improvement



Stay current with emerging trends, tools, and technologies to evolve and enhance our software development lifecycle.

Propose and implement improvements to optimize code quality, productivity, and operational efficiency.



Note: Please send a link to your updated CV, no uploaded CV will not be entertained.



Qualifications:



5+ years of professional Java development experience, ideally on large-scale e-commerce or SaaS platforms.

Demonstrated success in building and deploying microservices, distributed systems, and event-driven architectures.

Technical Expertise



Java Proficiency: Strong command of Java 8+ features (Streams, Lambdas), concurrency, memory management, and JVM internals.

Frameworks & Libraries: Advanced experience with Spring Boot, Spring Data, Spring Security, Hibernate/JPA.

API & Integrations: Experience creating RESTful APIs, integrating third-party services, and working with GraphQL (preferred).

Database Systems: Hands-on experience with MySQL, PostgreSQL, or MongoDB; adept at writing complex queries and optimizing database performance.

Messaging & Caching: Practical knowledge of message brokers (RabbitMQ, Kafka) and caching systems (Redis, Memcached).

Build & CI/CD: Proficiency in Maven/Gradle, Git, Jenkins/GitLab CI, Docker, and Kubernetes for seamless development and deployment.

Testing: Expertise in TDD, unit testing, integration testing, and test automation frameworks like JUnit, TestNG, and Mockito.

Performance Monitoring & Profiling: Familiarity with tools like VisualVM, YourKit, or New Relic for troubleshooting and tuning.

Soft Skills



Leadership: Demonstrated ability to mentor developers and influence technical direction.

Collaboration: Excellent communication skills, capable of working effectively with product owners, designers, and cross-functional teams.

Adaptability: Thrives in a fast-paced, agile environment, reacting quickly to changing requirements.

Problem-Solving: Proven analytical mindset and a pragmatic approach to solving complex challenges.



***Very important: Do take note that the applicant is required to share their updated CV with appropriate access. Applicants who are non compliant with this will be automatically ignored.***
