description:
I am looking for a creative and skilled person to make a short video for a personal visualization project. The goal of this video is to show a story as if it is happening in real life, so it feels emotional, immersive, and believable as I am trying to manifest something in my life and as we know the law of manifestation is as strong as much as you visualize and and feel the vision being rooted in reality.



This is a one-time project, but it requires someone who can be very creative and professional. You may need to create or find images, design backgrounds, or set up scenes yourself. The video should feel real and polished, like the story is actually happening.



I am looking for a video that helps me imagine a scenario clearly and emotionally. It should show a sequence of events, with music, images, or clips that tell a story. The focus is on how it feels, not just visuals. You need to use your creativity to make everything come together, including backgrounds, scenes, and the flow of the story.



What You Will Do



Make a short video or montage that tells a story visually.

Use photos, video clips, or images you create or find. You may need to design backgrounds or add visual effects.

Arrange the sequence so the story feels real and emotional.

Add music and simple effects to make the video polished and professional.

The first version doesn’t have to be perfect, but it should be very close to perfect (around 80%). I can then give feedback for final tweaks.



Requirements

Proven experience creating similar videos. Must show samples of previous work.

Creative and able to tell a story with images and video.

Knowledge of apps like Mind Movies, Canva, or similar tools.

Able to follow instructions carefully and understand the project concept.

Professional and serious about delivering high-quality work.



How to Apply

Send a voice note/text on WhatsApp 
explaining how you understand the project and how you would do it.

Send samples of previous videos you have made similar to what I am looking for

Only apply if you can deliver a high-quality video that is close to perfect on the first try.



 I do not have time for trial-and-error or experimental work. You need to have real experience and be confident in what you can create.



Pay

$75–$100 total, depending on experience and portfolio.

Payment options:

Down payment via PayPal, or

Submit the first video with a watermark until full payment.



Other Notes

Project will start after the holiday.



The video should feel real, emotional, and immersive.



You must be able to use your own creativity to make backgrounds, scenes, and layouts.



I am looking for someone professional, skilled, and creative who can deliver a video that is mostly correct on the first try.



This is a manifestation/visualization project, so it is very important that the story feels believable and emotionally engaging.

title: Accounting Coordinator
description:
Atlas Medical is a medical imaging solutions provider that partners with hospitals and clinics to expand patient care through customized mobile healthcare trailers. We empower hospitals to continue to treat patients during technololgy upgrades and healthcare practices to grow their reach with turnkey mobile medical units, handling everything from design to operations. 



You can learn more about Atlas Medical at: 



We’re seeking a detail-oriented Accounting Coordinator to manage our invoicing and billing processes remotely during Eastern US business hours.



Key Responsibilities

Invoice Processing: Create and send professional invoices for services and rentals Record and apply incoming payments accurately.



Payment Follow-Up: Send timely invoice reminders and follow up on overdue accounts to ensure prompt collections

Communicate courteously with hospital accounting/AP contacts by
 to resolve billing issues. Good English writing is a must.



Billing Recordkeeping: Maintain up-to-date, organized billing records. Reconcile payments and customer accounts in the invoicing system. Ensure all entries are accurate and documented (matching confirmed payments to invoices).



Customer Communication: Respond professionally to billing inquiries from clients. Confirm payment arrangements and clarify invoice details as needed. Escalate unresolved issues to Atlas Medical’s accounting lead.



General Support: Collaborate with the Atlas Medical team to improve invoicing processes and address any billing errors. 



Financial Reports: Create quarterly and annual financial reports.



Required Qualifications

EST Availability & Communication: Must be located in or fully available for 9?AM–5?PM Eastern Time (US) on weekdays. Able to communicate in real time (via zoom, messaging, and
) during business hours.



Invoicing/Billing Experience: Proven experience as an administrative or financial assistant handling invoicing and billing. Proficiency with invoicing software is required. Familiarity with generating PDF invoices and
 templates.



Technical Skills: Competent with basic accounting tasks (tracking invoices, logging payments). Comfortable using Google Workspace or Microsoft Office (Sheets, Docs,
). Reliable internet and ability to work on a secure computer setup.



Attention to Detail: Meticulous and accurate – double-checks numbers and invoices to prevent errors



Excellent written English with professional tone for
s and reports.



Live Communication: Comfortable handling live questions from colleagues during EST hours. Promptly responds to messages.



Compensation

Competitive/negotiable hourly rate (commensurate with experience). This is an independent contractor role; exact pay will be discussed during hiring.



Schedule & Hours

This is a part-time remote position. The VA must commit to U.S. Eastern Standard Time (EST) business hours (e.g. 9?AM–5?PM EST, Monday–Friday). You should be online and reachable (via messaging,
 or zoom) during all business hours.



Application Process

To apply, please submit your resume and a brief cover letter. In your application, answer the following screening questions:



Are you available to work 9?AM–5?PM EST on business days?

Which invoicing/billing software have you used? (Please specify platforms like QuickBooks, Zoho Books, Xero, etc.)

What experience do you have in a similar role?



A short paid trial task will be required to assess fit. For this task, you’ll be given a sample billing scenario (e.g. renting an IR trailer to a hospital) and asked to prepare a professional invoice and cover
 and send a follow up payment request. We will evaluate your accuracy, attention to detail, adherence to our invoice template, and tone of communication.



Onboarding & Training Timeline

We provide a structured onboarding plan. On the first week, you’ll receive training on Atlas Medical’s invoicing software, templates, and invoicing procedures. You’ll shadow invoice preparation and follow-up processes with our owner. After Day 1, you will begin handling simple invoicing tasks (with oversight). Full transition to independent invoicing duties is expected within 2 weeks, with ongoing support from our team. Regular check-ins will ensure you’re comfortable and fully trained in our systems.



Ready to join our team? Apply now with your resume, cover letter, and answers to the screening questions above. We look forward to working with a reliable, detail-oriented Accounting Coordinator who can help Atlas Medical grow!

title: Hiring a full-time content writer for growing SEO agency (good pay + holidays + raises)
description:
We are Notebook, an SEO agency that works with premium clients in various industries ranging from law and health to government institutions.



We are currently looking for a full-time writer (~50,000-60,000+ words per month) to join our growing team. You'll be expected to write about 1 full blog per day with AI assistance, perhaps more depending on the length. For example, if the blog is 2,200 words, that should cover a full day, but if it's 1,500, we would expect the blog to be completed and for you to begin the next one. Again, you will have outlines and AI assistance, so it is not as intensive as writing from scratch.



This is a demanding but rewarding role that will be well-paid, with the possibility of bonuses and raises as well as promotions to new positions for top performers.



You will be provided detailed content briefs as well as client specific projects and agents to aid you in your job. There will also be a dedicated editor to check the quality of your work and offer feedback to help you improve.



This is not an easy job, but it pays well, and there will be bonuses, raises, and paid time off.



Specs:

Salary Range: ~$1,000 per month depending on your capabilities and experience. We are willing to go a bit higher for an ideal candidate.

Hours per week: ~40

Location: Remote

Hours: Flexible, but we will confirm a set time frame where we expect you to be available where our schedules overlap for communication purposes (to be d
 later)



Responsibilities: 



Your responsibilities will be as follows:

- Write articles that meet our strict content quality standards

- Understand direct, straightforward SEO writing principles

- Take feedback from your editor and improve

- Understand SEO optimization, such as entity usage and keyword optimization

- Be in contact with our team via (Slack)



Perks:

- Flexible hours

- Time off

- Salary raises over time



We're looking for a content writer who doesn't just take basic AI output and submit it. 



If you want to just paste in an outline and say generate, this is not the job for you. 



If you're hungry to learn, want to join a growing business, and are looking for steady, long-term work, this is the job for you. If you can look at a piece of content, assess its quality, add value to it, and make sure it sounds human, even better.



Our company offers a fair salary, room to grow, plenty of work, and bonuses for performance. 



Qualifications



You must:

- Speak and write in English at a high level

- Must understand SEO on-page basics

- Write clear, human-sounding, engaging content

- Write entity-dense, no fluff content that still sounds human and provides value

- Understand how to talk to AI to aid in research and generation



For this position, you MUST complete the application form found in the following form (copy URL):







Please fill in this form and we will respond if we are interested. 



NOTE: There is a writing test attached to the job application. Make a copy for yourself, complete it, and link us to it.

title: Collections & Accounts Receivable Specialist (Homeowner Insurance Required)
description:
About the Company



Our client is a leading property restoration and remediation company serving residential and commercial clients across the United States. Specializing in water and fire damage restoration, mold remediation, pack outs, and construction, the company is committed to helping property owners recover quickly and efficiently. The team is growing, and they are looking for dedicated professionals to support their mission of delivering exceptional service.



Role Overview

We are seeking a highly motivated and detail-oriented Collections & Accounts Receivable Specialist to join our team remotely from the Philippines. This role is critical to maintaining healthy cash flow by managing outstanding accounts, following up on insurance claims, and ensuring timely collections. A significant component of this role involves reviewing and interpreting insurance estimates, including understanding line items, pricing, scope of work, and coverage details. The ideal candidate is a self-starter who thrives in a fast-paced environment, takes ownership of their work, and consistently delivers results.



Key Responsibilities

• Manage the full collections cycle including outbound calls,
s, and follow-ups to recover outstanding balances from clients and insurance carriers.

• Review, interpret, and analyze insurance estimates and restoration project documentation, including understanding line items, scope of work, pricing breakdowns, and coverage details.

• Cross-reference insurance estimates against invoices and job records to identify discrepancies, underpayments, or missing line items.

• Track, process, and follow up on property insurance claims, ensuring timely resolution and payment.

• Communicate with insurance adjusters, carriers, and third-party administrators to resolve claim disputes and negotiate payment.

• Maintain and update the CRM system daily with accurate notes, payment statuses, claim updates, and communication logs.

• Reconcile accounts receivable records and investigate discrepancies to ensure accurate billing.

• Coordinate with internal teams to resolve billing disputes, obtain supporting documentation, and expedite claim approvals.

• Generate accounts receivable aging reports and provide regular status updates to management.

• Identify delinquent accounts and implement appropriate escalation procedures.

• Maintain organized records of all collection activities and correspondence.

• Ensure compliance with company policies and best practices related to accounts receivable and collections.



Required Qualifications

• Minimum 2 years of experience in collections, accounts receivable, or a related financial/accounting operations role.

• Demonstrated experience reading, interpreting, and working with insurance estimates, particularly in the property restoration, construction, or insurance adjusting industry. This is a core function of the role and cannot be learned on the job.

• Experience working with insurance claims, specifically property insurance claims, including communication with adjusters and carriers.

• Proficiency with CRM platforms and accounting software.

• Excellent verbal and written English communication skills.

• Strong attention to detail with the ability to manage multiple accounts simultaneously.

• Self-motivated with a proven ability to meet deadlines and hit targets with minimal supervision.

• Reliable high-speed internet connection and a dedicated, quiet home office setup.



Preferred Qualifications

• Experience supporting US-based companies in the property restoration, remediation, or home services industry.

• Familiarity with the full insurance claim lifecycle.

• Background in accounting operations, invoicing, or financial reporting.

• Experience working full-time US Eastern Time Zone hours.



Compensation

This role offers a competitive monthly compensation structure:

• Base Salary

• Performance Bonus: Up to $500 per month, based on meeting or exceeding performance criteria established by your supervisor.

The performance bonus is discretionary and may be adjusted at the company’s sole discretion. Exceptional performers may be eligible for additional increases.



What We Offer

• Full-time, stable position with a growing US-based company.

• Opportunity to make a real impact on the business and grow within the organization.

• Supportive management with clear communication and expectations.

• A collaborative team environment that values accountability and results.



Work Requirements

• This is a full-time, dedicated position. The selected candidate must work exclusively for the company and may not hold concurrent employment at any time.

• Time-tracking software will be installed from day one as part of standard company policy.

• Work hours align with US Eastern Time Zone (EST/EDT) business hours, 40 to 45 hours per week.



How to Apply

If you are a results-driven professional with a passion for collections and accounts receivable, we would love to hear from you. Please submit your resume along with a brief summary of your relevant experience, including any insurance estimate reading, claims processing, or property insurance collections background.

title: Phone Sales & Persuasion Specialist — No Experience Required, up to $650/mo+
description:
About the Role



We are a US-based company that places phone specialists at American personal injury law firms. We are currently hiring for multiple client accounts and expanding our team.

In this role, you will speak with potential clients of US law firms by phone. These are individuals who have been injured in a
 and are considering legal representation. Your responsibility is to listen carefully, understand their situation, explain how the legal process works, and help them take the next step toward getting assistance.

We provide full training on legal terminology, intake procedures, and US-specific context. No prior experience in law or call centers is required. What we cannot train is natural conversational ability — the capacity to build trust quickly, respond to hesitation, and guide a conversation toward a positive outcome.





Qualifications



Clear, conversational English (spoken and written)

Strong interpersonal and listening skills

Comfortable speaking with strangers by phone for extended periods

Reliable internet connection and a quiet, professional workspace

Willingness to work US business hours (night shift Philippine time)

No prior call center or legal experience required





Compensation



Base salary: $650 USD/month

Performance bonuses based on conversion quality — top performers earn $900+/month

Paid training period

Long-term employment for strong performers





How to Apply



We use a short AI-powered assessment instead of a traditional interview. The assessment is conducted through our platform at persuasive.live and takes approximately 15–20 minutes to complete. No preparation or prior knowledge is needed.

The assessment consists of three short simulated phone conversations:



1. General persuasion scenario — You will speak with a hesitant individual and try to help them take a reasonable next step. No specialized knowledge required.

2. General persuasion scenario — A second conversation with a different situation and a different type of hesitation.

3. Legal intake scenario — You will speak with someone who has been in an a
 and is considering contacting a lawyer. Brief context will be provided before the conversation begins.



Each conversation is approximately 5–6 minutes. You will be evaluated on listening ability, conversational clarity, ability to handle hesitation, and overall communication quality — not on legal knowledge.

Application Steps



- Submit your resume through OnlineJobs.ph

- You will receive a link to complete the assessment at persuasive.live

- Top-scoring candidates will be contacted within 48 hours for a follow-up conversation



We review all completed assessments carefully. If you are not selected for this round, strong scores may qualify you for future openings.

title: REMOTE SALES CLOSER (AI AUTOMATION)
description:
High-Performance Role | Unlimited Earnings | Immediate Start

(Kindly read the full details until the end before applying to ensure you meet all requirements.)



We are building a high-output, performance-driven sales team inside one of the fastest-growing industries in the world: AI Automation for Businesses.



This is not a job for average salespeople.

This is a role for closers who want pressure, volume, and serious income.



If you are confident in your ability to:

• Get on the phone

• Run demos

• Handle objections

• Close consistently



Then this is where you scale.



THE OPPORTUNITY

Businesses are rapidly adopting AI to:



• Replace receptionists

• Automate follow-ups

• Capture and convert more leads

• Increase revenue without hiring staff



We provide these systems.



Your job is simple:

Close deals.

No fluff. No complexity. No distractions.







WHAT YOU’LL BE SELLING:

You’ll be selling high-demand AI business solutions:



• AI Voice Receptionists (24/7 call handling)

• AI Appointment Booking Systems

• AI Customer Service Automation

• Websites + CRM Systems

• AI Lead Capture & Follow-Up Systems







You will be speaking directly with:

Business owners

Decision-makers

High-intent prospects

This is real selling, not order-taking.



YOUR ROLE (FULL-CYCLE SALES)

You are responsible for:



• Cold calling + outbound prospecting

• Following up with leads

• Running demos (Zoom / phone)

• Presenting and positioning solutions

• Handling objections with confidence

• Closing deals consistently

• Managing your pipeline daily

There are no setters. No handoffs. No excuses.



PERFORMANCE EXPECTATION

We are not guessing. We know the numbers.



• Daily Activity: 300–500 dials

• Monthly Target: 4–7+ closed deals

• Top Closers: 10–15+ deals/month

If you can’t operate at this level, this role will not work for you.



COMPENSATION STRUCTURE

Base Salary: $300/month

Per Deal (Resets Monthly):

• Deal #1 — $200

• Deal #2 — $250

• Deal #3 — $300

• Deal #4+ — $350 per deal



REAL INCOME BREAKDOWN (NO GUESSING)



We believe in transparency:

Average Performer (4–7 Deals)

$1,200 – $2,500+/month

Strong Performer (8–12 Deals)

$2,800 – $4,500+/month

Top Closer (12–15+ Deals)

$5,000 – $7,000+/month

No cap. No ceiling. No limit.

The more you close, the more you make.







WHO THIS IS FOR

This role is for you if:

• You have 1+ year of sales experience

• You are confident speaking with strangers daily

• You are comfortable with cold calling and rejection

• You can stay disciplined without supervision

• You are competitive and performance-driven

• You want to build real income + real skillset

• You take ownership and don’t make excuses







WHO THIS IS NOT FOR

Do NOT apply if:

• You are afraid of cold calling

• You need constant guidance or motivation

• You struggle with consistency

• You are looking for “easy money”

• You cannot handle rejection or pressure

• You want a relaxed or low-effort role

This is a high-performance environment.



WHY THIS ROLE IS DIFFERENT



• You are selling AI — one of the fastest-growing markets globally

• You will develop high-income closing skills

• You get real volume (not 1–2 deals/month environments)

• You are paid based on performance — not politics

• Fully remote — work from anywhere

• Clear path to becoming a top closer / team leader





WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE



Within 30–60 days:

• You are consistently closing deals

• You understand the product deeply

• You control conversations confidently

• You are earning above average



Within 90 days:

• You are a top performer or on track to be one

• You have built real sales discipline

• You have increased your income significantly



HIRING PROCESS (FAST)

We move quickly.

1. Apply

2. Short screening

3. Interview

4. Decision within 24–48 hours





We are onboarding immediately.



LIMITED SPOTS

We are only bringing on a small number of closers.

Not everyone gets in.





FINAL NOTE

If you are confident in your ability to:

• Outwork others

• Handle pressure

• Close deals consistently



Then this is an opportunity to build real income in a real market.

title: E-Learning Content Specialist / Tech VA — Professional Aesthetics Training Platforms
description:
ABOUT US



The Beauté Group is a fast-growing UK aesthetics and skin longevity company. We operate two education and training brands that this role will support directly:



The Institute of Cosmetologie —our accredited professional training academy offering Level 2–7 courses for facialists, skincare therapists, and aesthetics professionals across the UK.



Lumi SKN — our professional aesthetic device brand, supplying clinics and practitioners with cutting-edge treatment technology, full training, and ongoing business support.



Both brands have a brand new bespoke online platform launching shortly. We need one detail-driven person to populate both platforms with our full course and training library before we go live.







WHAT THE JOB IS



We have 30+ courses across both platforms  accredited professional training courses for the Institute of Cosmetologie, and device training, treatment protocols, and business support content for Lumi SKN partners and clinic owners.



All of this content already exists as polished PDF documents and manuals. Your job is to transfer it onto the platforms to a very high professional standard.



Specifically you will be:



— Copying content from our PDF manuals and course documents into course modules on both platforms

— Formatting each module so it is clean, consistent, professional, and on-brand

— Spell checking and proofreading every module before it goes live — accuracy on accredited course content is non-negotiable

— Fact checking all content against the original PDF source to ensure nothing is missed, altered, or inconsistent

— Sourcing and placing relevant, high-quality professional imagery within each module

— Building end-of-module quizzes using questions and correct answers that we supply

— Organising modules into the correct course sequence following our content structure documents

— Working across both the IOC platform and the Lumi SKN partner app, keeping content consistent in quality across both

— Maintaining a clear progress tracker covering both platforms so we always know what is complete, in progress, and still to do

— Flagging anything that appears unclear, inconsistent, or missing so we can review and resolve it quickly

___ Design Multi Choice quizes and Questionaire throughout the courses ( using information provided in the PDFS)



This is not a writing role. You are not creating content from scratch. You are transferring, formatting, and presenting existing professional content — for an accredited training academy and a professional device brand — to the highest possible standard.



---



THE PLATFORMS



Both the IOC platform and the Lumi SKN partner app are bespoke built — not Kajabi, Teachable, or any standard off-the-shelf LMS. You do not need prior experience with either system. We will provide full video training, written guides, and direct access to our developer for technical support. If you are comfortable learning new systems and following instructions carefully, you will be absolutely fine.



---



WHAT WE WILL PROVIDE



— All source PDFs, course manuals, and training materials for both platforms

— A prioritised content list for each platform so you always know what to work on

— Brand guidelines for both IOC and Lumi SKN — fonts, colours, image style, tone

— Full platform training and direct developer support

— Quiz questions and correct answers for every module

— Regular check-ins and quick responses when you have questions



---



WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR



The Institute of Cosmetologie is an accredited professional training academy. The Lumi SKN app is used by clinic owners and practitioners running their businesses. The quality and accuracy of what they see on these platforms reflects directly on our reputation. We need someone who understands that and takes real pride in their output.



ESSENTIAL:

— Excellent written English — you must be able to spot spelling errors, grammatical mistakes, and formatting inconsistencies immediately. This is the single most important skill for this role. We are working with accredited course content and there is no room for errors.

— Exceptional attention to detail — accuracy across both platforms is non-negotiable

— Comfortable learning and confidently navigating new digital platforms

— Able to source appropriate professional imagery suited to a clinical and aesthetics environment

— Organised and self-managing you will be working across two platforms simultaneously and must keep your own progress tracker up to date

— Reliable, consistent, and proactively communicative — we need visibility on progress at all times

— Available to start within Asap and able to commit to consistent hours to meet our go-live deadline



DESIRABLE:

— Previous experience uploading or formatting content on any LMS, course platform, or content management system

— Experience working with health, beauty, medical, wellness, or professional training content

— Basic Canva skills for simple image formatting or resizing



THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR YOU IF:

— Your written English is not excellent — we are working with accredited professional content and errors are not acceptable

— You need close supervision to manage your workload

— You are not available to start straight away

— You are not comfortable working across two different platforms simultaneously



-



HOW TO APPLY



We receive a high volume of applications. To be considered yours must include all five of the following. Applications missing any of these will not be reviewed.



1. A short paragraph about yourself and why this role is a strong fit for you — written by you, in your own words

2. An example of digital content, formatting, or platform work you have completed (link, screenshot, or clear description)

3. A short writing sample that demonstrates your written English standard — this can be a paragraph describing your experience or an example of something you have proofread or formatted

4. Your expected hourly or monthly rate

5. Your availability and how many hours per week you can reliably commit



We are a fast-moving, ambitious company with two professional platforms launching imminently. We are looking for someone detail-obsessed, reliable, and proud of their work who wants to grow with us long term.



Apply to: 

Subject line: E-Learning Content Specialist — [Your Name]

title: Instagram DM Sales VA - Online Beauty Education Brand
description:
We are a UK-based online brow education company with 136,000+ Instagram followers, 

10,000+ students trained worldwide, and triple-accredited courses selling primarily 

to the US market. Our brand 
 on Instagram.



We are looking for a full-time Instagram DM Manager to take full ownership of our 

Instagram direct message inbox. This is a communication and soft-sales role — not 

traditional customer support, though you will work alongside our customer support 

team and flag anything that needs to be passed to them.



This role requires someone who is professional, warm, proactive, and able to take 

direction and put it into their own words. You will be guided by our brand voice and 

given frameworks for common situations, but you must be able to write genuine, 

natural responses yourself. If you are ever unsure of something, you will have direct 

access to the business owners via a WhatsApp group chat where you can ask questions 

and get fast answers.



THIS IS A GROWTH ROLE.

We are a fast-growing company and we are looking for someone who wants to grow with 

us — not just fill a position. As we expand our presence across social media platforms, 

the right person will naturally take on more responsibility. This could include 

managing DMs and community engagement across additional platforms, overseeing 

automations, and becoming a key part of how we communicate with our audience at scale. 

Hours will increase as the role develops and you will always be given advance notice 

of any changes. If you are reliable, communicative, and genuinely invested in the 

brand, there is real opportunity here for this to become a significant long-term role.



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



Full DM & Community Inbox Management

— Take complete ownership of the Instagram DM inbox

— Respond to all incoming messages in a warm, professional, on-brand tone

— Manage and monitor comments across posts and reels — engaging with the audience 

   and ensuring interactions reflect the brand well

— Ensure no message goes unanswered within 24 hours

— Follow up with leads who received a course link but have not yet purchased

— Send pre-recorded educator videos to hesitant leads at the right 
nt

— Work alongside our ManyChat automations — understanding what's been sent 

   automatically so your follow-ups feel seamless and personal

— Identify and pass any customer support issues (login problems, refund requests, 

   technical issues) to our customer support team — do not handle these yourself



Proactive Outreach

— Message recent students 7 days post-purchase to check in on their progress

— Ask happy students for a written or video testimonial

— When a student sends a positive review, follow up asking if they would be 

   comfortable recording a short video testimonial



Communication Style

— You will be given frameworks and direction for common situations

— You must put these into your own words — responses should feel personal and genuine, 

   never copy-pasted or robotic

— You must be able to take feedback and adjust your tone or approach quickly

— If you are unsure how to respond to something, ask in the WhatsApp group before 

   replying — never guess or make promises on behalf of the business



WORKING HOURS:

Our customers are primarily based in the United States. Your schedule will be split 

across two sessions each day to cover US time zones:



Morning session: approximately 1 hour at the start of your day to clear overnight 

messages and any urgent replies

Evening session: approximately 2 to 3 hours in the evening to cover active US hours 

and follow up on anything outstanding from the day



This role runs Monday to Sunday. Total hours are approximately 3 to 4 hours per day 

to begin with. As the business grows and your role develops, hours will increase — 

you will always be given clear notice ahead of any changes, and any increase in hours 

will be reflected in your pay. We want this to feel like a partnership, not a 

surprise.



WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR:

— Excellent written English — warm, clear, professional, and completely natural

— Proactive — you notice things, you follow up, you do not wait to be told

— A strong communicator — with us and with customers. If you are stuck, you ask. 

   You do not go quiet.

— Observant — you follow brand guidelines carefully and flag anything that feels off

— Reliable and consistent — you show up every day, on time, without needing reminders

— Focused — this needs to be your primary role. We are not looking for someone who 

   is managing multiple jobs simultaneously. We want someone who is present, 

   invested, and genuinely committed to doing this well. This role has real growth 

   potential and we want someone who sees that.

— Someone who genuinely enjoys connecting with people and takes pride in representing 

   a brand with care



You do NOT need a background in sales or social media management. You DO need to be 

the kind of person who communicates beautifully, takes direction with ease, and 

wants to grow within a company that is scaling quickly.



WHAT WE PROVIDE:

— Full onboarding call on your first day covering brand voice, rules, and processes

— WhatsApp group access with the owners for direct questions at any time

— Frameworks and direction for the most common DM situations

— Pre-recorded educator videos to use with hesitant leads

— Clear escalation process for all customer support issues

— Ongoing feedback, direction, and genuine investment in your development within 

   the company



START DATE: This week



TO APPLY:

Please send your CV along with a character reference. 



We will be scheduling short video calls with shortlisted candidates — you must be 

comfortable and willing to jump on a video call as part of the process. We want to 

get to know you, understand why this role interests you, and make sure it is the 

right fit on both sides. Flexibility with timing for this call is appreciated.



In your application, please also tell us briefly: why does this role appeal to you, 

and what does great communication mean to you in your own words? And why do you think this job role is a

perfect fit for you.



We look forward to hearing from you.

title: Operations Assistant (Proactive & Ownership Focused)
description:
We are looking for a highly proactive Virtual Assistant who takes ownership, communicates clearly, and executes without needing constant follow-up.



This is NOT a task-based role — this is an ownership role.



You will be responsible for managing recurring weekly tasks, communicating updates, and ensuring nothing falls through the cracks.



If you wait to be told what to do, this role is not for you.



Responsibilities & Expectations

- Create engaging social media content including posts and reels that showcase our consulting expertise and client success stories

- Manage social media posting schedule and maintain consistent online presence

- Organize and maintain data management systems to ensure information is accessible and current

- Provide administrative support for short-term rental operations including communication and coordination

- Build and document standard operating procedures (SOPs) to systematize business processes

- Utilize AI tools and protocols to enhance efficiency and output quality

- Design marketing collateral using Canva that aligns with brand standards

- Handle various administrative tasks as business needs evolve



**What We’re Looking For:**

* Extremely reliable and consistent

* Proactive communicator (you update BEFORE being asked)

* Strong attention to detail

* Organized and systems-oriented

* Takes ownership of outcomes, not just tasks



**Non-Negotiables:**

* You do not need reminders for recurring tasks

* You communicate clearly and consistently

* You take initiative when something is unclear



Benefits/Perks

- Fully remote position – work from anywhere with reliable internet

- Flexible part-time schedule (5-20 hours per week)

- Work directly with leadership on high-impact projects

- Exposure to cutting-edge AI tools and business systems

- Growth potential as the business expands

- Be part of meaningful work helping business owners achieve their goals



**To Apply:**

Answer the following in a video or audio message:

1. Tell me about a time you managed recurring tasks without being reminded.

2. What system do you personally use to make sure nothing gets missed weekly?

3. If I never followed up with you, what would happen?



We are looking for someone long-term who we can trust and grow with.



If you are proactive, reliable, and take ownership — we want to work with you.

title: Accountant
description:
Part-Time Accountant (Remote)



Company: Caribbean Living Antigua & Myst Carnival

Location: Remote (Work-from-home)

Hours: 20–30 hours per week

Rate: USD $5 per hour



????? About the Companies



Caribbean Living Antigua is a premium apartment and commercial property rental company based in Antigua & Barbuda. The company operates and manages modern residential apartments and commercial spaces, serving both long-term tenants and short-term vacation renters.



Learn more: Caribbean Living Antigua



Myst Carnival is one of Antigua’s leading and most vibrant carnival costume bands, delivering premium mas and T-shirt mas experiences. Myst Carnival designs, produces, and distributes carnival costumes and merchandise and manages large-scale carnival operations annually.



Learn more: Myst Carnival



???? Role Overview



We are seeking a highly organized, detail-oriented Part-Time Accountant to manage accounting operations across both businesses. The successful candidate must be highly proficient in QuickBooks, capable of setting up accounting systems from scratch, issuing invoices, managing financial records, and preparing management reports.



This is a long-term remote role for a reliable and professional accountant with strong English communication skills.



???? Key Responsibilities



Set up, configure, and maintain QuickBooks Online accounting systems



Record daily financial transactions and reconcile accounts



Issue invoices and manage accounts receivable and payable



Prepare monthly management accounts, financial statements, and reports



Perform bank and credit card reconciliations



Track expenses, revenues, and cash flow



Support budgeting, forecasting, and financial analysis



Maintain organized financial documentation



Ensure accuracy, compliance, and best accounting practices



???? Qualifications & Requirements



Bachelor’s degree in Accounting or Finance (required)



Minimum 5 years of professional accounting experience



Advanced proficiency in QuickBooks (mandatory)



Strong experience with:



Bookkeeping



Invoicing



Financial reporting



Management accounts



Excellent written and spoken English (advanced level required)



Strong attention to detail and accuracy



Highly organized and deadline-driven



Ability to work independently and manage multiple business accounts



???? Tools & Skills



QuickBooks Online (expert level)



Microsoft Excel / Google Sheets



Strong numerical and analytical skills



Clear written communication and reporting



? Work Schedule & Compensation



20–30 hours per week (flexible schedule)



USD $5 per hour



Long-term opportunity for the right candidate



? Ideal Candidate



You are a highly dependable accountant who enjoys working with growing businesses, is comfortable handling multi-entity accounts, and takes pride in delivering clean, accurate, and timely financial reports.



???? How to Apply



Please include:



Your resume



A short cover letter



Details of your QuickBooks experience



Sample financial reports or dashboards (if available)

title: Executive Assistant
description:
Executive Assistant

Fully Remote, Part-Time



ABOUT YOU

You have a refining nature that is always looking for how to make things a little bit better. You notice the small things like a repeating conversation, a habit people fall into, or an unnoticed shortcut. You adapt or suggest changes to others, so those patterns become opportunities for growth.



You care about doing things intentionally. You think things through, break them down clearly, notice details others miss, and bring a sense of order to what you take on.



You’re naturally curious... the kind of person who wants to understand how things work and why something is the way it is. You look for context, ask clarifying questions, and enjoy figuring things out until the “why” becomes clear. 



You move through life with a deep belief that everything is for your good. You don’t see challenges as setbacks, you see them as a puzzle to solve, a lesson to learn, or an opportunity for growth. At your core, you’re a glass-half-full person.



ABOUT US

We’re a technical services business currently supporting Cisco systems and moving into AI-based solutions.  As a tiny company, it will be just the owner and you. This means communication is direct, decisions are fast, and your work has a real impact on the business & its growth.



WHAT TO EXPECT

You will work directly with the owner keeping the day to day moving smoothly. Your role is to keep the business owner organized, accurate, and moving forward. You’ll have visibility into both business and personal logistics and be trusted to handle them with integrity and ownership.



WHAT YOU'LL OWN

  *
 MANAGEMENT: Monitor and organize business
, handle items you can resolve, flag or escalate high?priority messages, and screen requests so the owner only handles necessary
s.

  * PERSONAL METRICS TRACKING: Do a daily check in with the owner, update the performance spreadsheet, spot trends or anomalies, and prepare the weekly printed metrics.

  * TRAVEL PLANNING: Research and book flights, lodging, tours, and activities; deliver a complete itinerary and manage changes for about one trip per month.

  * PERSONAL SUPPORT: Schedule home maintenance, place orders/returns, and handle ad hoc personal tasks as requested.

  * BOOKKEEPING: In Quickbooks, enter timesheets for multiple clients, create/send invoices, record and categorize expenses and upload receipts.

  * TIMESHEETS & SOWs: Collect and verify time entries, transfer data into QB/Trello/spreadsheets, manage payroll or vendor support tickets to resolution, and update SOWs for review before sending.

  *PROJECT TRACKING: Maintain timesheets and to do lists in Trello, keep task statuses current, and ensure critical items are completed on time.

  * VISUAL DIAGRAMS: Create L
 flowcharts and XMind mind maps, capture live notes into mind maps, migrate maps into diagrams, and convert data between formats (like Excel ? mind map/diagram).



GROWTH OPPORTUNITIES

OPTIONAL: This role could grow into an AI TECHNICIAN. As the owner moves into AI, there is an optional opportunity to become an AI technical assistant.



COMPENSATION & BENEFITS

  * HOURS: Part-time starting at 15-20 hours a week, which may increase as needs increase.

  * COMPENSATION: $8 USD per hour, based on experience.

  * ON-CALL AVAILABILITY: Be available to respond within 20 minutes between 7:00 AM to 9:00 AM PHL time Tuesday to Saturday. You don’t need to actively be working during that time, just be available to reply to messages or join quick meetings so simple questions don’t have to wait until the next day.

  * MEETINGS: Weekly all-staff meeting at 7:00 AM on Wednesday (PHL Time), plus additional meetings as needed.

  *REMOTE WORK: Work from anywhere with flexible hours.

  * INDEPENDENT CONTRACTOR: This is a contract position without benefits. Only direct workers should apply. No agencies, please.



HOW TO APPLY:

Please fill out this form: 





***NOTE: ONLY THOSE WHO FILL OUT THE NOTION FORM LINKED ABOVE WILL BE CONSIDERED FOR THE POSITION

title: Podcast Manager (Remote) NOT A VIDEO EDITOR
description:
Podcast Manager (Remote – Philippines)



Full-Time – $1,100 USD/month

40 hours/week | Long-term | Opportunity for pay increase after 90 days



About the Role



We’re hiring a Podcast Manager to help us rapidly grow our clients podcasts. This is a remote, full-time role based in the Philippines. You’ll be in charge of booking guests, managing content, and running all social media channels for the show.



We’re looking for someone who’s organized, proactive, creative, and excited to be a key part of a podcast that’s about to take off.





Responsibilities



Guest Booking + Scheduling

 • Research potential guests (Founders, CEOs, etc.)

 • Send outbound messages to invite guests (via
, LinkedIn, or Instagram)

 • Manage the scheduling calendar and coordinate guest bookings



Clip Curation + Team Management

 • Watch full podcast episodes to identify the most engaging clips (15–90 seconds)

 • Write clear clip notes and send to our editing team

 • Review final edits for quality and request revisions if needed



Social Media Management

 • Own and grow all Founder Talk social accounts (YouTube, LinkedIn, TikTok, Instagram)

 • Write short, compelling captions that match our brand voice

 • Schedule and post content 5–6 days/week across platforms

 • Track performance and flag best-performing content



Requirements

 • Excellent written and spoken English

 • Highly organized and detail-oriented

 • Experience managing social media accounts (personal or professional)

 • Familiarity with podcast formats, short-form content, and YouTube

 • Able to identify what makes a video hooky and engaging

 • Comfortable using tools like Google Calendar, Trello, Notion, etc.

 • Bonus if you’ve worked with content creators or podcast teams before



What You Get

 3. Your resume

 4. A 60-second Loom video introducing yourself (optional but preferred and this will get you to the top of the list asap)



Excited to talk to you! 



-Alex

title: Presentation Designer (Google Slides / PowerPoint)
description:
We need someone who can turn ideas into clear, structured, and compelling presentations.



Right now, we’re not looking for someone to “make slides look nice.”



We need someone who can:

- Simplify complex ideas

- Structure information clearly

- Use visuals to communicate more effectively than text

- Guide the flow of a presentation through design



This role is about clarity and storytelling through slides.

— Andy Gray, Founder & CEO



Who We Are

The Graygency is a performance marketing agency working with 7–8 figure DTC e-commerce brands across the UK, US, and UAE. We call ourselves Performance Scientists; we're in the P&L, not just the ad account. We're building an agency powered by systems, AI, and commercial thinking, not headcount.



IMPORTANT: Please read below before submitting your application.



We are only looking for designers with strong experience in presentation design (Google Slides / PowerPoint).

If your portfolio is mostly:

- Social media graphics

- Branding

- UI/UX

This role is not a fit.



To be considered, you must submit:

2–3 Google Slides or PowerPoint presentations you’ve designed



For each example, include:

- The original brief or topic (what you were given)

- The final presentations you created (Google Drive Link)

- For every presentation, the first slide should be the brief or the topic.



Most of our work involves e-commerce presentations (e.g. strategy decks, performance updates, pitches), so examples in this space are strongly preferred.



In your application, use the Code: 8000. APPLICATIONS WITHOUT THE CODE AND THE PRESENTATION SAMPLES WILL NOT BE REVIEWED

You’ll also be asked a few short written questions about your work.



What You'll Actually Do:

Presentation Design:

Design high-quality Google Slides / PowerPoint presentations

Turn rough content into clean, structured, and easy-to-follow slides

Simplify complex ideas into visual formats



Visual Storytelling:

Use layout, hierarchy, and spacing to guide attention

Replace text-heavy slides with visuals, diagrams, and frameworks

Apply animations and transitions to support storytelling (not distract)



Brand Alignment:

Follow brand guidelines consistently

Ensure presentations are clean, professional, and cohesive

Maintain consistency across slides



Collaboration:

Work with the Head of Growth to understand content and intent

Translate rough ideas into polished presentations

Iterate quickly based on feedback



What Success Looks Like:

- Presentations are clear, structured, and easy to follow

- Slides communicate ideas visually, not just through text

- Strong storytelling flows from start to finish

- Fast turnaround and responsiveness to feedback

- Stakeholders can present confidently using your slides



The Skills We Need You To Bring:

- Strong experience with Google Slides / presentation design

- Ability to structure and simplify information visually

- Strong understanding of layout, hierarchy, and spacing

- Experience using animation and transitions effectively

- Ability to follow brand guidelines consistently

- Strong attention to detail



Nice-to-Haves:

- Experience designing for business, marketing, or strategy presentations

- Experience with Figma, Keynote, Google Slides, or PowerPoint

- Ability to create simple diagrams, charts, or frameworks

- Understanding of storytelling or narrative flow



What We Offer:

- Competitive freelance rates based on experience and output

- Ongoing work with a consistent pipeline of projects

- Clear briefs and fast feedback

- Opportunity to work on high-level strategy and client presentations

- Flexible, remote working setup



Red Flags (Don't Apply If…)

- Your work is mostly social media, branding, or UI/UX

- You rely heavily on text-heavy slides

- You use templates without structuring content

- You don’t have real presentation examples

- You struggle to communicate ideas clearly through design



Our Culture:

We believe in doing things well at The Graygency; we are constantly looking for ways to innovate and improve the delivery of our product. Every day, we turn up and deliver our best work as a team to deliver the best results for the brands that trust us with their marketing budgets.



To apply, please click the link:

title: On Camera Virtual Receptionist
description:
We are seeking reliable and polished Virtual Receptionists to support our U.S.-based salons. This is a remote independent contractor role for individuals who communicate clearly, stay calm under pressure, and can manage multiple tasks at once. This is an on-screen position, and you are required to be on camera for the full duration of any worked hours with a professional appearance and a quiet, distraction-free workspace. Your on-screen presence is an essential part of the guest experience.



In this role, you will answer and route calls, respond to
s and messages, share basic information with clients, take detailed messages, schedule and adjust appointments, check team availability, update client records, maintain call logs, prepare simple reports, collect feedback through short surveys, and respond to real-time questions from clients and staff. You will follow established scripts and procedures, work across multiple software platforms simultaneously, and remain responsive and engaged throughout your shift while staying on camera with clear audio and stable video.



To succeed in this role, you must speak and write clearly in English, learn systems quickly, remain calm during busy periods, and communicate consistently. Technical requirements include reliable high-speed internet with a minimum download speed of 100 Mbps, a device with at least 12 GB of RAM, a functioning camera and microphone, and a professional workspace suitable for being on screen. You must be available to work U.S. hours, which may include evenings or weekends.



We prefer candidates with experience in customer service, call centers, scheduling, or administrative support, though strong communication skills and a professional on-screen presence are most important. This is a remote contractor role; you will invoice for your hours, maintain your own equipment and workspace, and work independently while following company procedures. If you enjoy customer service, can remain fully present on screen during all working hours, and are seeking a long-term contractor opportunity, we would love to hear from you.

At Festive Lighting Pros, we Illuminate Joy by transforming homes and businesses with stunning holiday and permanent lighting solutions. With over 1,200 projects and 15 franchises across the U.S., we’re seeking a talented Paid Ads Specialist from the Philippines to join our remote team and drive our seasonal marketing campaigns to new heights!

Why Join Us?

title: Amazon PPC Analyst (Entry-Level, Growth Track)
description:
We're a growing eCommerce brand looking for a sharp, detail-oriented Amazon PPC Analyst to join our team full-time. This is a long-term role built for someone who genuinely enjoys working with data, finds satisfaction in steady incremental progress, and wants to grow within a single brand over time — not hop between clients.



What You'll Be Doing

You'll start with structured daily tasks: monitoring campaign performance, reviewing search term reports, updating dashboards, and making bid and budget adjustments based on defined frameworks. As you build familiarity with our catalog and processes, you'll take on increasing ownership of specific SKUs and eventually contribute to strategy.



Day-to-day, this role involves:



Daily monitoring across Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, and related campaign types

Reviewing search term and placement reports to flag anomalies and opportunities

Maintaining organized performance data in Excel/Sheets

Making and documenting bid and budget decisions

Working within tools including Amazon Ads console, Helium 10, and Scale Insights



This work is analytical, process-driven, and sometimes repetitive — especially early on. Results compound over weeks and months. If that kind of work energizes you, this role is a strong fit.



What We're Looking For



Available 45 hours/week, U.S. Eastern Time (non-negotiable)

This must be your only job — full focus is required

Foundational understanding of Amazon PPC (documented coursework preferred)

Strong comfort with spreadsheets and data organization

Detail-oriented with a habit of documenting decisions and following process

Clear written English

Stable internet with backup power



What to Expect

The first 30–60 days are structured and feedback-heavy. We invest in training and expect you to invest in learning. We're not looking for a freelancer — we're building a team.



Application Questions — Please answer all of them thoughtfully. Vague or one-line responses will not be considered.



Why are you specifically interested in a full-time, long-term Amazon PPC role with one brand, rather than freelancing or agency work?

Walk me through how you would approach the first two weeks in this role — what would you prioritize learning and why?

Rate your hands-on experience (0–5, be honest) with:



Amazon Seller Central / Amazon Ads console

Helium 10

Scale Insights

Excel or Google Sheets





A Sponsored Products campaign has seen ACoS rise from 22% to 38% over the past 10 days. Impressions are up, clicks are up, but sales are flat. Walk me through your diagnostic process — what do you check first, and what actions would you consider?

What's one optimization you've made (or studied in a course) that produced a meaningful result? Describe what the problem was, what you changed, and what happened.



Confirm: this will be your only job, and you can commit to 45 hours/week on U.S. Eastern Time.

title: Customer Service Representative (CSR) – HVAC, Plumbing & Electrical Company
description:
We are seeking a highly organized, detail-oriented, and customer-focused Virtual Customer Service Representative (CSR) to join our fast-growing home services team. This role is responsible for delivering exceptional service to our customers while supporting daily operations for our HVAC, plumbing, and electrical divisions. The ideal candidate is tech-savvy, proactive, empathetic, and able to thrive in a fast-paced environment.



Key Responsibilities

1. Inbound Call Handling



-Answer incoming calls promptly and professionally while following guided call prompts in ServiceTitan.



-Greet customers with warmth, empathy, and professionalism.



-Use active listening to fully understand customer concerns and service requests.



-Ask qualifying questions regarding service type, urgency, location, and referral source.



-Confirm the customer’s issue falls within our service offerings and service area.



2. Service Qualification & Intake



-Collect and confirm essential customer details: name, address, phone,
, and preferred contact method.



-Identify the type of service needed (AC repair, plumbing leak, drain clog, electrical panel issue, etc.).



-Determine urgency level (emergency, routine, or maintenance).



-Check customer profiles for service history, membership status, warranty info, and important account notes.



-Verify whether the issue is related to a previous job or system we serviced.



3. Pricing & Service Information



-Provide preliminary estimates for common diagnostics and services (e.g., $99 diagnostic fee).



-Set expectations for the service visit, including technician process and upfront pricing after diagnosis.



-Inform customers about current promotions, rebates, memberships, and savings opportunities.



4. Scheduling & Dispatch Coordination



-Book appointments according to availability using ServiceTitan scheduling modules.



-Offer scheduling options based on the 3-day call board, same-day availability (if down), or estimate availability.



-Coordinate with dispatch for same-day bookings or priority situations.



-Communicate cancellation policies and provide accurate service expectations.



5. Outbound Calls & Follow-Up



-Return missed calls and respond to voi
s within 30 minutes (1 hour max).



-Confirm, reschedule, or follow up on upcoming appointments.



-Conduct outbound campaigns for:



-Tune-ups



-Plumbing inspections



-Electrical inspections



-Meet minimum outbound calling goals set by management.



-Contact customers on “hold” status and bring them back on the schedule.



-Create and verify outbound calling lists.



6. Home Depot Lead Management



-Accept and process incoming Home Depot leads inside ServiceTitan’s booking tab.



-Enter leads into tracking spreadsheets and create profiles ensuring the F-number and tags are accurate.



-Immediately call the lead—if no answer, leave voi
 and send a text.



-Update lead tracking sheets and the Home Depot Service Center with correct outcomes.



-Schedule jobs for customers who convert and ensure both systems are updated.



-Complete a structured follow-up process (Day 2, 4, 6, 7) before dismissing unresponsive leads.



-Record every contact attempt in both the tracker and Home Depot Service Center.



7. CRM & Documentation



-Log all customer interactions accurately in ServiceTitan and/or Slack.



-Maintain up-to-date records including service notes, history, equipment, and contact information.



-Tag opportunities, flag priority issues, and escalate leads for management review.



8. Customer Issue Resolution



-Address customer concerns, service delays, or complaints with empathy and professionalism.



-Document issues and updates in Slack and ServiceTitan.



-Escalate concerns when needed to managers or service leadership.



-Track ongoing issues and provide customers with timely follow-ups.



9. Internal Communication



-Communicate job updates, cancellations, urgent customer needs, or scheduling issues to dispatch and office staff in Slack.



-Participate in morning huddles or team briefings when required.



-Share technical issues, customer feedback, or system concerns promptly with management.



10. General Administrative Support



-Assist with
ing invoices, estimates, receipts, or documentation to customers.



-Monitor and respond to support inbox inquiries (Yelp, Thumbtack, Chiirp, Contractor Commerce, FPL, BBB, Brita Pro, and others) within 30 minutes–1 hour.



-Support marketing campaigns by completing outbound call lists or follow-up tasks.



-Assist in managing customer reviews (Google,
, etc.) and reputation initiatives.



11. End-of-Day Wrap-Up



-Review daily call logs and ensure all documentation is complete and accurate.



-Flag unresolved issues or follow-ups for next-day attention.



-Communicate urgent matters to the on-call or after-hours team.



12. Data Entry & System Updates (ServiceTitan)



-Add and update customer equipment details (brand, model, serial number, age).



-Apply appropriate job, customer, and location tags throughout the CRM.



-Ensure all data is accurate, consistent, and properly categorized.



Qualifications



-Previous experience in customer service, HVAC/plumbing/electrical scheduling, or call center preferred.



-Strong communication and active listening skills.

title: Creative Operations Manager - DTC
description:
Compensation: $2,000 - $2,500 USD / Month (120,
,000 PHP) + Performance Bonuses, Depending on Experience

Location: Fully remote

Schedule: Monday to Friday, 2:00 PM - 10:00 PM PH

Employment Type: Full-time

Pay Frequency: Bi-Weekly

 

Job Overview

We're hiring a Creative Operations Manager for a fast-growing DTC e-commerce company selling supplements and beauty products in the African market, currently doing $2M a year with a goal of hitting $10M. This is not a purely operational role. You'll be running the day-to-day of two creative teams while also getting hands-on with the creative strategists to help them produce better, higher-converting ads. If you've worked in paid media, know what makes a winning ad, and have the discipline to keep a creative team running smoothly without being micromanaged, this role is built for you.

 

Responsibilities?

Oversee the day-to-day operations of two creative teams, each consisting of a creative strategist, video editor, and media buyer.

Work closely with creative strategists to develop better ad angles, hooks, and concepts based on performance data and market research. Monitor weekly ad performance metrics including hook rate, CTR, CPL, hold rate, and CVR, and use that data to guide the team on what to improve.

Build, document, and continuously refine SOPs and workflows to keep the creative production process running without bottlenecks.

Run weekly tea
etings to review last week's results, identify issues, and align everyone on priorities for the week ahead.

Hold each tea
mber accountable to their KPIs and output targets without micromanaging.

Create and implement performance improvement plans for underperforming tea
mbers when needed.

Identify bottlenecks in the creative workflow and fix them before they become bigger problems.

Evaluate new AI tools and stay on top of what's working in paid media to keep the team's output competitive.

Report performance and strategic recommendations to the owners, and handle day-to-day problems independently without escalating unless it's a decision above your authority.

 

Requirements

3+ years of experience in a creative operations, project management, or creative strategy role within a DTC paid media environment.

Strong understanding of paid media ad structure including hooks, CTAs, body copy, and how to evaluate what makes an ad work.

Experience managing and coaching creative teams including video editors, graphic designers, and creative strategists. Knows how to read and act on ad performance data, hook rate, CTR, CPL, hold rate, CVR, and ROAS.

Proven experience building SOPs and workflows from scratch and improving existing ones.

Experience conducting performance reviews and creating performance improvement plans.

Familiar with sprint planning and agile-style workflows for managing creative output.

Hands-on experience with project management tools like Asana, ClickUp, or similar.

Comfortable running multiple video calls per week and communicating primarily through calls and chat.

Self-directed and able to handle problems independently without needing to escalate everything to the owners.

Experience working with teams across different time zones and nationalities.

 

Nice to Have (Not Required)

Experience running ads specifically for African markets such as Kenya or Tanzania.

Background in video editing or creative strategy before moving into operations.

Familiarity with ad performance tools like Motion or Atria.

Experience with influencer or UGC marketing workflows.

Familiarity with health, wellness, or beauty DTC brands.



To Apply

title: 2D/3D animator
description:
As a writer, illustrator and publisher of my own children's books I want to bring one of my characters to live. I am looking for a skilled 2D/3D animator who can create short video’s of Stekel, which is the name of the character.



The video’s will be between approximately 90 and 130 sec and need to be suited for streaming on phone, tablet and television screen, so HD. 



The target group is children from 1 to 5 year old, so the videos need to be clean and not too loud or busy. The characters need to be very consistent in their appearance, in every animation. So the characters need to be modeled and rigged first (in Blender, Maya or...), so they can appear in any scene exactly the same. I am not looking for some AI version that is different every time. 



The style of the videos needs to be close to my original drawings that I created in Adobe Illustrator, but need not be be copied exactly... A script and the original illustrations will be handed to you to give you directions. Not only characters (which can be used in multiple video’s) need to be created, also backgrounds. 



So I need an animator who is able to create a video from start to finish, following a script. At this 
nt 13 books about Stekel have been published. They all need a video version, along with new stories that will not have a book version. 



To find the most qualified animator that can bring my vision to life, I will ask for you to model and to rig Stekel, so I can see if your abilities and qualities match my expectation. Unfortunately this will be for free. When I am pleased with your work and pick you, it will be for a period of 4 or 5 months in which we will create numerous video's. After that it stops for this year.



If you are interested in working with me and are willing to show your skills to make Stekel come to life, please contact me and I will send you information on what Stekel looks like.



Best regards, 

Harald Timmer

title: Senior Python Backend Engineer (AI Autonomous Systems)
description:
The Role: We are engineering a self-correcting software ecosystem where code writes code. Your job is to build the "Immune System" and "Nervous System" that keeps these autonomous agents stable, secure, and effective.



The Challenge: You aren't building a CRUD app. You are building a state-machine orchestrator that manages complex, multi-step workflows involving code generation, execution, and debugging.



What You Will Build:



Resilient Orchestration: A crash-proof Python backend that manages long-running agent loops, state persistence, and automatic rollbacks.



Execution Sandboxes: A rigorous testing harness that statically analyzes, lints, and executes generated code in isolated environments.



Self-Healing Logic: Systems that detect failures (syntax errors, logic bugs) and autonomously trigger correction loops.



We Need:



Elite Python Skills: AsyncIO, Pydantic, and advanced subprocess management are second nature to you.



DevOps Mindset: You understand Git internals, Virtual Environments, and CI/CD pipelines deeply enough to automate them via code.



Obsession with Reliability: You write code that expects failure and handles it gracefully.

title: Executive Assistant to the CEO/Co-Founder
description:
About the role

We’re looking for someone to assist with reducing friction and leveraging priorities that rotate between customer and partner work, product and planning, go-to-market, fundraising and investor relations, and conference-heavy periods.

You will own be responsible for assisting with the operating cadence of the founder between calendar management, meeting preparation and follow-through, travel and logistics, and a lightweight system for decisions and action items.

This is an execution-focused role with high trust, high context, and may have opportunity for increasing scope over time.

Outcomes you will own

• Calendar management: Meetings have clear agendas, pre-reads, links, and the right people, and there is protected time for deep work and strategic thinking when the prior week has been meeting-compressed. 

• Follow-ups. Action items, owners, deadlines, and next steps are captured and follow-up for completion across customer work, internal team cadence, and external stakeholders.

• Information is easy to find. Decisions, notes, and key documents are organized and linked (especially around high-stakes threads like fundraising, contracts, and customer pilots).

• Admin load stays low even during travel and conference surges. Logistics, scheduling, and communications remain clean and predictable during ramp periods. 



Key responsibilities

1) Calendar & time management

• Own calendar end-to-end: scheduling, rescheduling, prioritization, and conflict resolution.

• Build a weekly cadence to match working rhythm: 

o Meeting-dense days supported with frictionless prep.

o At least one protected strategic-thinking block per week when needed. 

• Ensure meeting hygiene: 

o Agenda and “decisions needed” are explicit.

o Pre-reads and relevant links are attached directly to invites. 

• Coordinate across internal tea
mbers and external stakeholders (customers, partners, investors).

2) Meeting preparation, notes, and follow-through

• Before meetings: 

o Assemble a one-page briefing: context, goals, stakeholders, links, and open questions.

• During/after meetings: 

o Capture decisions, action items, and owners.

o Publish a short recap and drive follow-ups.

• Maintain a lightweight decision trail using Shelby’s Decision Log approach, so key decisions and delegations are easy to track and execute.

3) Admin and operations support (founder support)

Based on recurring work patterns in task lists and meeting cadences, you will support admin across:

• Fundraising / investor relations admin (scheduling, document coordination, follow-ups, tracking next steps). 

• Contracts and document workflows (organizing drafts, routing for review, tracking signatures and next actions).

• Finance admin support (invoice organization, payment reminders, coordinating with vendors and advisors).

• Conference and event logistics (travel booking, itineraries, meeting scheduling around events, follow-ups after events).

4) Travel and logistics

• Plan end-to-end travel: flight options, buffers, hotels, ground transport, meeting clustering, and itineraries.

• Build travel packs that make it easy to execute on the road (contacts, confirmations, local logistics, key docs).

5) Systems & continuous improvement

• Improve the “EA dashboard” workflow over time: templates, checklists, and SOPs that make recurring tasks repeatable.

• Proactively spot gaps, reduce back-and-forth, and propose better ways to run the operating cadence.



What success looks like (30/60/90)

First 30 days

• Establish a clean calendar system and meeting-prep workflow.

• Implement a consistent post-meeting recap + action-item tracking habit.

• Build a baseline weekly rhythm that protects deep work time. 

60 days

• Travel and conference logistics run smoothly with minimal Shelby input.

• Decision and follow-up tracking is reliable and visible (no dropped balls).

90 days

• You independently manage the operating cadence: calendar strategy, meeting pipelines, follow-ups, and recurring admin.

• Founder's time is noticeably “higher quality”: fewer context switches, fewer logistics tasks, clearer priorities.



Ideal candidate profile

• Extremely organized and detail-strong, but not rigid. You can handle rapid changes and shifting priorities.

• High agency and proactive follow-through. You do not wait to be asked twice.

• Excellent written communication. You can write crisp recaps,
s, and briefs.

• Strong judgment and discretion. You are comfortable handling sensitive information.

• Systems thinker. You enjoy building simple processes that keep things moving.

• Comfortable working in Notion (or excited to learn quickly), Microsoft suite, and Hubspot are added benefits.

title: Home Care Scheduler
description:
Job Title

Remote Caregiver Scheduler – U.S. Home Care Agency



Phone-Based Scheduling Role – Must Be Comfortable Calling Caregivers



Remote | Philippines | Supporting U.S. Operations



Position Overview

A U.S.-based home care agency is seeking a remote scheduler located in the Philippines to coordinate caregiver shifts and maintain reliable service coverage for clients.



This role is responsible for managing caregiver schedules, responding to call-outs, confirming coverage, and communicating with caregivers and internal staff to ensure shifts are filled and services occur as scheduled.



The scheduler must be comfortable working in U.S. time zones, communicating frequently by phone and messaging, and resolving scheduling issues quickly and professionally.



This role requires strong attention to detail, excellent communication skills, and the ability to manage multiple scheduling priorities simultaneously.



Important About This Role

Home care scheduling is a fast-moving operations role.



Caregivers sometimes call out unexpectedly, and clients must still receive care. The scheduler must be comfortable making phone calls, solving coverage problems quickly, and communicating clearly with caregivers and the operations team.



This role is best suited for someone who enjoys problem-solving, coordinating people, and keeping operations running smoothly.



Core Responsibilities

Caregiver Scheduling

Schedule caregivers for client shifts according to care plans



Maintain caregiver availability records



Assign shifts based on qualifications and availability



Confirm caregiver shift assignments



Call-Out and Coverage Management

Respond to caregiver call-outs



Identify replacement caregivers quickly



Coordinate shift coverage with available staff



Update schedule changes in the system



Caregiver Communication

Contact caregivers to confirm upcoming shifts



Notify caregivers of schedule changes



Follow up on missed confirmations



Maintain professional communication with staff



Documentation and Scheduling Records

Record schedule updates and coverage changes



Maintain accurate scheduling records



Document communication with caregivers regarding scheduling issues



Coordination with Internal Staff

Communicate scheduling issues to operations team



Flag coverage risks or staffing shortages



Assist with caregiver availability updates



Required Qualifications

Fluent spoken and written English



Experience working remotely with U.S. teams



Experience with scheduling, dispatch, or coordination roles



Comfortable making phone calls and communicating with staff



Strong organizational and time management skills



Ability to handle urgent scheduling changes calmly



Preferred Experience

Candidates with experience in the following areas are strongly preferred:



Home care scheduling



Healthcare staffing coordination



Dispatch or logistics scheduling



Medical virtual assistant roles



Experience with scheduling systems such as:



AxisCare



ClearCare / WellSky



AlayaCare



Similar platforms



Work Schedule

Must be available to work during U.S. daytime hours or overlapping hours with U.S. operations.



Compensation

$700 – $1,000 USD per month



Compensation depends on scheduling experience and familiarity with U.S. operations.



Key Performance Expectations

Success in this role is measured by:



Metric Target

Shift coverage All shifts confirmed and staffed

Response time to call-outs < 15 minutes

Schedule accuracy Minimal errors

Communication responsiveness Immediate acknowledgement of scheduling issues



Attach your resume link.
