title: Performance Copywriter for Meta Ads — Scripts, Hooks & Ad Copy for Scaling Winning Creatives (Massage Device Brand)
description:
About the Project

We're a fast-growing e-commerce massage & muscle recovery device brand scaling aggressively on Meta 
 & Instagram).

We currently have 2–3 proven winning creatives and a performance video editor repurposing them into multiple ad variations. What we need now is a performance copywriter who can fuel that creative engine with fresh hooks, scripts, CTAs, and ad copy — all engineered for conversions, not just clever writing.

You'll work directly alongside our video editor and media buying team. Your words will be the backbone of every variation we test — from the first hook that stops the scroll to the CTA that drives the purchase.

This is direct-response copywriting for paid media — not brand storytelling, not blog writing, not social captions.



Responsibilities



Write and iterate on video ad scripts (hook ? problem ? agitation ? solution ? CTA) for UGC-style and product-focused creatives

Develop multiple hook variations (first 1–3 seconds) for each winning creative angle to fight ad fatigue and improve thumb-stop rate

Write text overlay copy and on-screen captions optimized for silent autoplay viewing

Craft primary text, headlines, and descriptions for Meta ad placements (Feed, Reels, Stories)

Create A/B copy variations to support structured testing (different hooks, CTAs, emotional angles, pain points)

Adapt copy for different audience segments (e.g., chronic pain sufferers, athletes, office workers, gift buyers)

Write CTA variations that drive urgency and action without sounding generic

Collaborate with the video editor to ensure scripts align with visual pacing and creative structure

Analyze winning ad copy patterns and reverse-engineer what's working to produce more of it





What We're Looking For



Proven experience writing copy for Meta or TikTok ads — specifically for e-commerce / DTC brands

Deep understanding of direct-response frameworks (PAS, AIDA, Hook-Story-Offer, etc.)

Ability to write in a conversational, relatable tone that matches UGC-style content — not corporate, not salesy

Strong grasp of what makes people stop scrolling — pattern interrupts, curiosity gaps, emotional triggers, bold claims

Understanding of ad performance metrics — you know what hook rate, CTR, and ROAS mean, and you write with those KPIs in mind

Ability to produce high volume without sacrificing quality — we need multiple variations, not one perfect draft

Fast turnaround, clear communication, and ability to work independently with structured direction





Nice-to-Have Skills



Experience in the health, wellness, fitness, or pain relief niche

Background writing for UGC creators (scripting talking-head style ads)

Familiarity with advertorial or landing page copy (potential expansion of scope)

Experience with
/SMS flows tied to ad funnels (Klaviyo or similar)

Understanding of Meta ad structure (how primary text, headline, and creative interact)

Ability to write in a way that passes Meta ad policy review without diluting the message





Compensation

This is a fixed-fee, project-based role.

Payment is per completed batch of deliverables (scripts, hooks, ad copy variations aligned with the creative production pipeline).

Compensation will be based on:



Experience and portfolio quality

Volume and speed of delivery

Performance understanding and strategic thinking



Additional batches and expanded scope will be assigned upon successful completion and approval.



When Applying, Please Include:



Your fixed price for writing scripts + hooks + ad copy variations for 10 base creative angles

Portfolio or samples of direct-response ad copy you've written (Meta/TikTok ads, video scripts, ad copy — not blog posts or brand copy)

Your turnaround time for a typical batch

Confirmation of availability for the next 1–2 months

Brief note on your experience with health/wellness or physical product brands (if applicable)





We're looking for a long-term performance copywriter who understands that every word exists to move a metric — not just sound good. If you write copy that converts, we want to hear from you.

title: Google Ads Specialist
description:
Job Title: Google Ads Specialist 

Schedule: 9AM - 5PM EST



Overview: 

We are looking for a data-driven and strategic Google Ads Specialist to plan, execute, and 

optimize paid advertising campaigns that drive measurable business results. The ideal candidate 

is analytical, detail-oriented, and experienced in managing campaigns across multiple industries. 

This role focuses on maximizing ROI through precise targeting, continuous testing, and 

performance optimization. 



Key Responsibilities: 

• Plan, launch, and manage Google Ads campaigns across Search, Display, Shopping, and 

YouTube. 

• Conduct keyword research, audience targeting, and bid strategy development to 

maximize ad performance. 

• Write compelling ad copy and headlines aligned with brand messaging and conversion 

goals. 

• Monitor daily performance metrics (CTR, CPC, CPA, ROAS) and adjust campaigns for 

continuous improvement. 

• Optimize landing pages, ad groups, and budgets to increase conversions and reduce 

wasted spend. 

• Conduct A/B testing for creatives, keywords, and targeting strategies. 

• Generate detailed performance reports and insights for management or clients. 

• Stay updated on Google Ads best practices, policies, and industry trends to maintain 

compliance and competitiveness. 



Qualifications: 

• 2+ years of proven experience managing Google Ads campaigns (Search, Display, 

Shopping, Video). 

• Proficiency in Google Ads, Google Analytics, and Tag Manager. 

• Strong understanding of CPC, CPA, ROAS, Quality Score, and conversion tracking. 

• Experience creating and managing remarketing and audience-based campaigns. 

• Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with attention to detail. 

• Google Ads Certification (preferred but not required). 

• Excellent written and communication skills. 



For serious applicants, please submit the following:

- Most updated CV

- Intro Video

- Whatsapp number

title: Senior Executive Assistant & Operations Coordinator
description:
Job Title: Senior Executive Assistant & Operations Coordinator (Full-Time, Remote)



Location: Remote (Philippines preferred)  

Type: Full-time contractor  

Hours: 40 hours/week (aligned with AEST business hours where possible)



---



### About the Role



This is not a typical admin role.



You’ll work directly with the Founder of a growing media and community business in the health tech space. The goal is simple:



Reduce noise, keep things moving, and make sure nothing important gets dropped.



You’ll be responsible for turning a mix of
s, messages, tasks, and ideas into clear actions, priorities, and outcomes.



If you like organising things but don’t enjoy actually doing the work, this role is not for you.



---



### What You’ll Own



Daily

- Inbox triage (first pass on all
s)

- Drafting replies and handling routine communication

- Managing calendar and scheduling

- Preparing a short daily briefing with:

  - priorities for the day

  - key decisions needed

  - important messages

- Keeping CRM (Pipedrive) activities clean and up to date

- Following up with tea
mbers, partners, and leads



Weekly

- Tracking active projects and initiatives

- Ensuring every task has an owner and next step

- Identifying overdue items and chasing them

- Highlighting blockers and issues early



Ongoing

- Acting as a filter for what needs the Founder’s attention

- Turning messy inputs into clear, prioritised actions

- Keeping operations running smoothly behind the scenes



---



### What Success Looks Like



- The Founder starts the day from a clear briefing, not a messy inbox  

- Important
s are handled or drafted before being seen  

- Calendar runs smoothly with no back-and-forth chaos  

- CRM is always accurate and actionable  

- Follow-ups happen without being asked  

- Only real decisions are escalated  



---



### This Role Is NOT



- A passive admin role  

- A “monitoring” or “just checking” role  

- A people management role without execution  

- A place to wait for instructions  



You are expected to take initiative, make judgement calls, and move things forward.



---



### Requirements



- Strong written English (clear, concise, professional)

- Proven experience in an Executive Assistant, Operations, or similar role

- Comfortable working with tools like:

  -
 (Gmail)

  - CRM systems (Pipedrive or similar)

  - Slack

  - Google Workspace

- Highly organised with strong attention to detail

- Able to prioritise and make decisions without constant direction

- Confident following up and chasing tasks when needed



---



### Nice to Have



- Experience supporting a founder or small business owner

- Experience in media, marketing, or startups

- Familiarity with content workflows or production environments



---



### Compensation



- Competitive hourly rate based on experience (AUD $18–$25/hour range)

- Full-time, long-term role

- Opportunity to grow into a senior operational role over time



---



### How to Apply



Please include:



1. A short intro (no more than 150 words) explaining why this role suits you  

2. A brief example of how you’ve helped someone stay organised or on track  

3. Your hourly rate  

4. The word “organised” at the top of your application so we know you read this  



Shortlisted candidates will be given a practical scenario to assess how they think and prioritise.



---



This role suits someone who enjoys bringing order to chaos, takes ownership, and gets satisfaction from keeping things moving without needing constant direction.

title: Full-Time Video Editor (eCommerce & Educational Ad Specialist)
description:
We’re a fast-growing wellness brand redefining personal care with safe, non-toxic, and highly effective products. At Wellnesse, we believe what goes in your body matters—and that includes what you use in your mouth every day.







Our products are powered by ingredients like hydroxyapatite, a science-backed alternative to fluoride that strengthens, remineralizes, and supports the oral microbiome—without the risks of conventional formulas.







We’re building a brand that customers trust deeply—and video is a key part of how we educate, connect, and grow.







Role Overview

We’re looking for a Video Editor who understands both performance marketing and consumer trust.







This role goes beyond editing—you’ll help transform ideas, research, and customer insights into high-converting video content that educates, builds credibility, and drives action.



You should understand how to balance direct-response frameworks with a clean, premium, wellness-focused brand voice.







Key Responsibilities

Edit high-performing video ads for platforms like Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, and Meta

Produce educational VSLs and product-focused videos that clearly communicate benefits and differentiation

Turn raw footage, UGC, testimonials, and scripts into engaging, trust-building content

Implement direct-response principles in a way that feels natural and not overly salesy

Highlight key differentiators like:

Hydroxyapatite vs. fluoride

Non-toxic ingredients

Family-safe formulations

Add captions, motion graphics, and visuals that simplify complex health concepts

Create multiple variations of creatives (hooks, messaging angles, formats)

Optimize videos based on performance data (CTR, retention, conversion rate)

Collaborate with creative strategists on messaging and iteration cycles





What We’re Looking For

Proven experience editing eCommerce ads, wellness brands, or educational VSLs

Strong understanding of direct-response marketing + trust-based storytelling

Ability to create scroll-stopping but brand-aligned hooks

Skilled in tools like Premiere Pro, After Effects, Final Cut, or similar

Experience working with:

UGC-style content

Testimonials and before/after narratives

Strong sense of pacing, clarity, and emotional resonance

Ability to take feedback and iterate quickly

Fluent in English (written and spoken)





Bonus Points

Experience in health, wellness, or personal care brands

Understanding of clean ingredient positioning and consumer skepticism

Familiarity with TikTok-native and educational-first content styles

Experience simplifying science-backed messaging into engaging visuals

Basic motion design skills



What Success Looks Like

Your videos increase trust and clarity, not just clicks

You can turn complex topics (like hydroxyapatite) into simple, compelling content

Your creatives improve engagement, retention, and conversion rates

You proactively suggest new angles, hooks, and storytelling approaches

You move fast while maintaining a clean, premium brand feel





Compensation & Benefits

Full-time remote role (work from anywhere)

Competitive salary based on experience

Performance-based bonuses tied to results

Long-term growth opportunities within a mission-driven brand





How to Apply

Please submit:



Your portfolio (must include eCommerce ads, wellness content, or VSLs)

A short note explaining your experience with:

Direct-response content

OR educational / trust-based video marketing

(Optional) Examples of videos and their performance metrics





Important Note

We’re not looking for editors who only make things look good.



We’re looking for someone who understands that great video builds trust, educates the customer, and drives meaningful action without compromising brand integrity.

title: Podcast Strategist & Manager
description:
The Podcast Strategist & Manager is responsible for ensuring each weekly podcast episode is well planned, high quality, and positioned to perform strongly across YouTube and social media.







This role combines content strategy, quality control, performance testing, and podcast management, with the goal of helping each episode reach the right audience and perform at its highest potential.







Key Responsibilities



1. Pre-Production Strategy



This role begins before the episode is filmed.







Responsibilities include:



Researching each guest and identifying relevant angles and themes

Preparing the structure of the conversation

Developing topic direction and guiding questions

Identifying key talking points aligned with audience interest

Ensuring the episode is strategically positioned for strong content performance





2. Content Quality Control



After recording, the Podcast Strategist & Manager reviews the first edited draft to ensure:



The conversation flows well

Key 
nts are clear and engaging

The episode meets our quality standards

The content is structured for audience retention and clarity





3. Promotion & Growth Strategy



This role plays an active part in maximizing the reach and performance of each episode.



Responsibilities include:



Identifying strong 
nts that can be repurposed into short-form clips

Testing topics, hooks, and content angles

Supporting title and thumbnail testing

Working with the ads specialist to promote episodes ahead of launch

Ensuring each episode is set up for visibility and growth across platforms





4. Publishing & Distribution



The Podcast Strategist & Manager is responsible for ensuring all content is organized and published on time.



Responsibilities include:



Uploading and scheduling the full episode

Uploading and scheduling promotional clips

Ensuring titles, descriptions, and assets are optimized

Maintaining consistency in publishing timelines





Role Summary



This role sits at the intersection of strategy, content performance, and execution. The focus is on ensuring each podcast episode is thoughtfully planned, well produced, and positioned to achieve strong reach and engagement across platforms.







Role Details



Full-time

10am – 6pm SAST

Fully remote

title: Product & Moments Designer (Apparel, Trends & Cultural Moments)
description:
About the Company



Hardcore Italians is a US-based e-commerce brand built for the Italian-American community. A large part of our revenue comes from apparel — t-shirts, hoodies, and similar products tied to cultural 
nts, sports, and Italian-American identity.



We run paid ads daily and test new designs constantly. What moves the needle isn't planned seasonal drops — it's capitalizing on real things happening right now. A big sports win. A viral movie. A 
nt in the news cycle that the Italian-American community is buzzing about. We need someone who wakes up every day thinking about this.



IMPORTANT — Please Read Before Applying



This is NOT a purely creative role.

This is a performance and output role. Your work will be measured by consistency, volume, and what sells.



You will NOT:

Wait to be told what to design every day

Treat this like a portfolio project

Debate feedback or creative direction



You WILL:

Deliver 10+ designs per week, consistently

Monitor trends and cultural 
nts daily — without being reminded

Bring ideas and opportunities proactively

Follow brand standards exactly, every time



If you're fast, culturally tuned in, and have zero ego around feedback — you'll do great here. If you need creative control or prefer slow, polished work — this is not the right fit.



What You'll Do



• Create 10+ new product designs per week — primarily t-shirts, hoodies, and similar apparel

• Monitor trends daily using Google Trends, social media, news, etc — and turn relevant 
nts into design concepts fast

• Stay on top of Italian-American culture, sports, pop culture crossovers, and viral 
nts that connect to our audience

• Identify opportunities the team hasn't spotted yet — if something big is happening and it has an Italian angle, you should already be on it

• Deliver print-ready files consistently — correct specs, right colors, right fonts, no back-and-forth on basic errors

• Maintain an organized design library in Google Drive

• Keep a running log of what's working and what isn't



The 
nts You'll Be Watching



This brand sits at the intersection of Italian heritage and American culture. Winning 
nts can come from anywhere:

– Italian & European Soccer — national team wins, Serie A milestones, major tournament 
nts

– US Sports / Italian Crossover — Baseball (WBC, Italian-American legends), Football, Hockey

– F1 — Ferrari milestones, Italian drivers, Italian-American fan 
nts

– Pop Culture — Movies, shows, viral content with an Italian or Italian-American connection (think: Super Mario, The Bear, etc.)

– Viral Italian-American Culture — Athletes, media figures, 
s, 
nts trending on social

– Holidays & Seasonal — Columbus Day, Italian Heritage Month, St. Joseph's Day, regional events



The biggest sales opportunities often come from 
nts nobody planned for. Your job is to catch them first.



What Success Looks Like



• 10+ designs delivered every week without fail

• Time-sensitive 
nts are caught and turned into designs fast — not days later

• You're bringing opportunities to the table before anyone on the team notices them

• Files are on-brand and correct every time — right colors, right fonts, right tone

• Design output runs on its own — no daily direction needed from the founder or creative lead



Who This Role Is For



You're a strong fit if you:

– Have real experience designing apparel or merch

– Genuinely follow Italian-American culture, sports, and pop culture — not because it's the job, but because it interests you

– Use Google Trends regularly to spot what's growing before it peaks

– Use AI tools (ChatGPT, Midjourney, etc.) as a natural part of your design workflow

– Think in terms of what will sell, not just what looks good

– Work fast, file things correctly, and communicate clearly

– Take feedback and execute without debate

– Show up every day — this role only works if someone is actively watching for opportunities daily

– You do not need to be a senior designer. You do need to be consistent, fast, and commercially minded.



Tools & Requirements



– Adobe Photoshop or equivalent (required)

– Google Trends (required — you should already be using this)

– AI tools — ChatGPT, Midjourney, or similar (required)

– Google Drive

– Slack

– Must provide your own tools and subscriptions



Hours & Schedule



• Part-time to start: ~5–10 hours per week

• Fully remote, flexible hours

• Must be active daily on workdays — 
nts don't wait, and neither should you

• Clear opportunity to grow hours and rate based on performance



Pay



Please include your preferred rate in your application (hourly or per-design).

We hire based on output and reliability — not the lowest number. Perform well and this role grows.



How to Apply



Follow these instructions exactly. Applications that skip steps will not be reviewed.



Please send:

• A link to your portfolio or work samples — apparel designs strongly preferred

• 2–3 sentences on your current workflow and which tools you use (including AI and research tools)

• Your preferred rate (hourly or per-design)



Start your application with the word "CANNOLI" so we know you read this in full.



Answer these questions:



Q1: Walk us through how you stay on top of trends and cultural 
nts day-to-day. What tools do you use and what does that actually look like?

Q2: Give us an example of a cultural or pop culture 
nt — Italian-related or not — that you think would have made a great t-shirt. Why?

Q3: How many designs can you realistically produce per week, and what does your workflow look like to get there?

Q4: Confirm you're comfortable in a high-volume, 
nt-reactive environment where showing up daily and moving fast matters more than perfecting every single design.



If you’re already watching the trends and thinking in products, we want to see your work!

title: Admin Assistant – Front Door Lettings
description:
Front Door Lettings is a growing Bristol-based letting agency managing residential properties across Bristol, South Gloucestershire and North Somerset in England. We're looking for a highly organised, proactive admin assistant to join our remote team and play a key role in filling our properties quickly and efficiently.



This is a fast-paced, communication-heavy role where you'll be the first point of contact for people looking to rent. You'll manage enquiries, qualify applicants, coordinate the UK team's diaries, and keep the lettings process moving from first enquiry through to viewing and offer.



What You'll Be Doing



- Responding to inbound rental enquiries from platforms including Rightmove, Zoopla, UniHomes, SpareRoom,
 and phone

- Vetting applicants against our criteria before booking them in for viewings

- Managing and optimising the diaries of our UK-based letting negotiators

- Booking and confirming viewings, and notifying current tenants of upcoming access

- Following up with applicants after viewings to gather feedback and progress any offers

- Answering applicant questions about properties and tenancies clearly and professionally

- Collecting applicant details, entering them into Rightmove, and sending holding deposit letters

- Keeping the team updated on enquiry volumes and property status

- Compiling viewing feedback and sharing it with the wider team



What We're Looking For



- Excellent written and spoken English

- Strong organisational skills and attention to detail

- Confident communicator - you'll be speaking and
ing with prospective tenants daily

- Comfortable working across multiple platforms and tools simultaneously

- Previous experience in admin, customer service, or property is an advantage but not essential - we'll train the right person

Able to work UK business hours (Monday to Friday, 8am - 6pm BST)



Why Join Us?



Front Door Lettings is growing quickly, and this role grows with us. You'll be a valued member of a small, tight-knit team where your work directly impacts the business. We invest in our people, use modern tools, and give you real responsibility from day one. Once you have passed probation, the salary will increase from ?40,000per month, to ?52,000 per month

title: Video Editor (B2B Marketing)
description:
Job Title: Full-Time Video Editor (Remote)



Company: Proactive Marketing



Location: Remote



Job Type: Full-Time / Part - TIme



Compensation: From $
About Us:



Proactive Marketing is a performance-driven marketing agency specializing in paid advertising for chiropractors. We focus on delivering a consistent flow of high-quality patients and strong ROI for our clients. As we continue to grow, we’re expanding our creative team.



Role Overview:



We are looking for a full-time Video Editor to join our team and take ownership of editing high-performing video ads. This role is ideal for someone who understands direct-response content and can create engaging, conversion-focused videos at scale.



Key Responsibilities:



Edit and assemble raw footage into high-converting video ads

Ensure strong pacing, clear messaging, and engaging visuals

title: Sales Rep and Appointment Setter ($5-$8 / hour)
description:
Sales Rep and Appointment Setter

(B2B Outbound and Lead Generation Specialist)





Who we are



We are a fast growing performance marketing agency working with serious clients who spend substantial amount  per month on lead generation. We are expanding and need someone sharp, resourceful, and self driven to help us connect with the right prospects at scale.



You will report directly to the Operations Manager and Founders. There are no layers between you and the people making decisions.





What this role is about



This is a pure outbound role. Your job is to find the right people, open conversations, and book qualified calls for the team. We will give you the target industries and ideal client profiles. From there, you own the process  building lists, writing outreach, following up, and filling the calendar.



If you need daily task lists, step by step instructions, or someone to tell you who to contact, this role is not right for you. If you thrive working independently, take ownership of your pipeline, and know how to write a message that actually gets a reply, keep reading.





Core responsibilities



>Build targeted prospect lists using LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Google Search, and other research tools

>Send daily LinkedIn connection requests and follow up messages to qualified prospects

>Write and send personalized cold
s to high value leads

>Maintain clean, organized, and up to date prospect lists inside the CRM

>Follow up consistently across all active leads until there is a clear outcome

>Book discovery calls and coordinate scheduling for the founders

>Log all outreach activity accurately in ClickUp and the CRM daily

>Communicate updates, blockers, and wins clearly through Slack every day





Requirements



>Proven experience with LinkedIn Sales Navigator for identifying and reaching high value B2B leads

>Strong written English with the ability to write outreach messages that feel personal, not templated

>Experience with cold
 outreach including writing, sequencing, and follow up

>Comfortable working inside a CRM to manage and track your full pipeline

>Highly organized and able to manage a large number of active prospects simultaneously

>Takes initiative and works independently without needing to be chased

>Available full time during BST business hours





Bonus experience



>Background in B2B, SaaS, lead generation, or performance marketing industries

>Experience booking calls for a high ticket or agency offer

>Familiarity with outreach tools such as Apollo, Instantly, or Smartlead



Logic question  (Required)



You have been given a target industry: digital marketing agencies in the UK with 10 to 50 employees that are actively running paid ads for clients. You have LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Google Search, and Google Workspace available. You have no existing data and your first task is to book 5 discovery calls within 7 days.



Walk us through exactly what you would do from day one. How do you build your list, who do you target, what does your outreach message look like, and how do you follow up? Be specific.



We are not looking for a perfect answer. We want to see how you think, how you plan, and whether you can execute independently without being told every step.





Video introduction (Required)



Record a 2 to 3 minute video and upload to Loom or Google Drive. Include the link in your application. Cover who you are, your experience in outbound sales or appointment setting, a specific result you are proud of with real numbers, and why this role is the right fit for you right now.



***Read carefully before applying***



To confirm you have read this post in full and have the attention to detail this role requires, begin your cover letter with the exact phrase "I want to be lucky". Applications that do not open with this phrase will not be reviewed, regardless of experience.



Do not apply if...



>You need daily instructions and cannot build or manage your own outreach pipeline

>You copy and paste the same generic application for every role you apply to

>You cannot work full time during BST business hours

>You have no real experience with LinkedIn Sales Navigator or cold
 outreach

>You are not comfortable being directly accountable to Founders and an Operations Manager





What we offer



>$5 to $8 USD per hour based on experience, reviewed after probation

>Full time remote position with a stable and growing agency

>Direct access to Founders and Operations Manager with no middle layers

>Long term opportunity to grow with the business as we scale

>A fast moving team that values output over process and respects people who take ownership





How to apply



Submit your CV + cover letter starting with the required phrase,  your logic question answer, and your Loom or Google Drive video link. Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.

title: Social Media Manager
description:
HOW TO APPLY

If this opportunity feels like the perfect fit for you and you meet the job qualifications, we invite you to learn more about our HiEnd Accents team in the Philippines and submit your application here: 
/appzq4iqeIREQRVyo/pagHKo8CnRtRpX585/form



Please note: Only applications submitted via this link will be considered.



Job Description



We are looking for an experienced, passionate, and creative Social Media Manager to join our team! As our Social Media Manager, you will be responsible for implementing our Social Media strategy in order to increase our online presence and strengthen our relationship with our customers and fans. You will be working closely with our Senior Social Media Manager and the remainder of our Marketing department. The platforms that you’ll primarily work on and be responsible for are (1) Instagram, (2)
, and (3) Pinterest. As our Social Media Manager, you will have a meaningful impact on our growth, bottom line, and brand identity in an exciting, design-driven company where being creative is just as important as being analytical.



The ideal candidate excels in building relationships, is passionate about social media and interior design, is a strong writer with a keen visual eye, and thrives on performance-driven teams.



We are looking for a long-term tea
mber who will stay and grow at our company. We offer competitive compensation, a good and stable work environment, and plenty of growth opportunities.



PRIMARY RESPONSIBILITIES



Content Development:



- In partnership with our Senior Social Media Manager and Marketing Team, create and maintain a social media content calendar that supports primary brand stories and goals while also tapping into seasonal 
nts and appropriate trends

- Create original, on-brand social media content that our followers will appreciate

- Content will be a mix of product-related content as well as product-adjacent content (e.g., top sleep tips!)

- Leveraging data, identify UGC and inspiration imagery to be considered for posting

- Write effective content. Work with copywriters and designers to ensure content is informative and appealing

- Keep up to date with current news, pausing content and escalating to leadership where appropriate

- Partner with Marketing and eComm tea
mbers to create shot lists for social media, as needed

- Develop Instagram Stories templates and stickers. Using those templates and Instagram platform elements, create our Instagram Stories



Posting:



- Schedule content for
, Instagram feed, Instagram Stories, and Pinterest, either within the app or by using tools such as Sprout Social or Later

- Post Instagram Stories directly from the Instagram app



Affiliate Marketing & Community Management



- Respond to all engagement and direct messages within 24 hours on weekdays

- Respond to all urgent engagement and direct messages within 24 hours on weekends

- Respond to engagement during normal US hours (range of acceptable times: 10 pm PH - 9 am PH)

- Author thoughtful, individualized comments and messages in the brand voice in response to comments on our pages, on images where we are tagged or where our product is depicted, and on images posted by brands and people we admire!

- Develop and maintain a live document with common questions and responses

- Adhere to rules and regulations - **no “black hat” social media techniques**! We want to build our brand presence organically



Asset Collection



- Request and gather UGC from our followers and fans in our Airtable database. Request content usage permission for all images that are within our brand guidelines. Follow up via
 or direct message as needed for any assets we are especially eager to share.

- Obtain or verify permissions for any images submitted via direct message,
, influencer collaborations or other means and upload to our visual curation tool, editing beforehand as needed.

- With brand priorities in mind, investigate content leads identified by social media, press, and other means to create a library of aspirational imagery featuring our products



Influencer Marketing



- Identify influencers who we can work with as part of our influencer marketing strategy

- Execute on influencer marketing strategy and management, including cultivating our network of valued influencer partners



Reporting & Strategy



- Assist in regular content performance and competitive reporting and analysis

- Provide ad hoc qualitative social analysis

- Be our in-house expert on social platform updates and trends in social media, interior design, home, and retail, presenting out to the team as needed

- Continuously seek ways to improve processes, recommending any tools or technology needed and subsequently serving as the primary point of contact for the relevant third parties

- Ideate new social activations, such as content series, engagement strategies, contests, and giveaways



About HiEnd Accents



HiEnd Accents designs and creates everyday luxury bedding and linens, sheeting, decorative pillows and other home textiles. Founded in 2005 and based in Dallas, Texas, our mission is to elevate our customers' lives via beautifully designed home textiles that deliver quality and value.



As a family-owned business, we’re committed to personal service and long-term relationships. Through our four brands, we offer unique designs across a spectrum of styles and price points, all united by exceptional value. Combined with our customer-first approach, prompt shipping and low order minimums, we’ve become the preferred bedding supplier for thousands of top department stores, furniture retailers, interior designers, and boutique hotels nationwide. Recently recognized on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing businesses in the US, we continue to innovate and expand our reach in the home textiles market.



Discover more about us and our brands at 



Why HiEnd Accents?



At HiEnd Accents, we're a close-knit team driven by entrepreneurial spirit, growth mindset, and a shared commitment to excellence. Our collaborative approach has propelled us to new heights – we're proud to be recognized on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing small companies in the United States. This achievement is a testament to our team's dedication and the exciting opportunities ahead. If you thrive in a vibrant, high-paced culture where your contributions truly matter, we want to hear from you!



Working at HiEnd Accents means that you can expect the following:



-Competitive Compensation - We offer a highly competitive compensation package, including 13th Month Pay

-Professional Growth - We invest in our people and make sure that they have the opportunity to learn, grow and develop their careers continuously

-Great Team of Like-Minded Professionals - We prioritize hiring based on culture and values, so you’re working with a team of folks who are as fun, talented, and committed as you are

title: Shopify Store Specialist
description:
HOW TO APPLY

To apply, please fill out the application form: 
/appzq4iqeIREQRVyo/pagwn3KJ9biX7VeNO/form



Given the high volume of applicants, we will not be able to consider applications not submitted through this form. Thank you for your understanding!



POSITION DETAILS: SHOPIFY STORE SPECIALIST



MISSION:

To drive E-commerce sales growth through proactive E-commerce account management, including timely and accurate listing management and optimization, digital storefront optimization, and marketing campaign ideation and execution, with the ultimate goal of creating a thriving and sustainable online business that meets the evolving needs of our diverse customer base.



KEY OUTCOMES:

* Product Setup: Efficiently set up new products on assigned accounts according to agreed-upon listing standards, ensuring a 99.8% upload rate.



* Store Optimization: Within the first 6 months, boost our store's conversion rate to the industry average of 2.0%



* Record Maintenance: Maintain 100?curacy in Airtable record-keeping and weekly KPI report tracking.



* Inventory Feeds: Achieve 99?curacy in inventory feed uploads and maintain timely inventory updates, with no more than one error per quarter; do periodic spot checks of >10 items on each platform per week to verify site accuracy



* MAPP Adherence: Maintain 100% compliance with the company's MAPP; violations resolved within 72 hours



* New Ideas: Implement >2 major new ideas per quarter to improve account performance through a mix of competitor research and the latest Shopify/eCom sales strategies



OTHER REGULAR RESPONSIBILITIES:

* SOP Creation and Maintenance: Update/maintain SOPs that encompass the product setup process, store optimization, and more.



* Performance Analysis and Reporting: Every week, analyze sales and other KPIs to understand site performance, identify areas for improvement, and inform data-driven decision-making. Investigate any unexplained fluctuations and collaborate with customers to resolve issues when necessary.



* Cross-functional Collaboration: Monitor daily order flow and collaborate with internal teams such as Customer Service and Marketing to resolve issues and ensure a seamless and integrated approach to store management.



* Market Research: Keep tabs on competitor strategies to inform listing strategy and overall account strategy.



* Promotions and Discounts: Develop and manage promotional campaigns to drive sales, increase customer retention, and enhance brand visibility.



JOB REQUIREMENTS:

* Organized home office setup, free of noise and distractions, with a dual monitor setup strongly preferred.



* Reliable power and internet connections, with backup systems in place.



* Full-time position, 40 hrs/week minimum, with partial overlapping hours or entirely overlapping hours with US Central time



* 2-3 years of experience with Shopify site maintenance



* 1+ years of experience with Shopify site optimization, including CRO work



* Must have substantial previous Excel experience, including experience working with flat files



* Excellent English skills



* High attention to detail, with the ability to meticulously proofread for spelling and grammar



* Ability and willingness to independently learn new tools, products, or technology and make recommendations on trends to support the business



* Self-motivated, detail-oriented, and professional with the ability to multitask and prioritize workload; ability to work independently with minimal supervision is extremely important



* Ability to work with our team via
, Slack, and
/Zoom. Highly preferred, but not required: experience with Airtable and Notion



* Stable, trustworthy, highly dependable. Ideally, someone seeking a long-term relationship where we can both grow from the relationship



* Commitment to HiEnd Accents' mission and values: 
/3Unr0ub



About HiEnd Accents

HiEnd Accents designs and sells premium bedding and home textiles — quilts, sheets, decorative pillows, duvets, and more — that bring everyday luxury into people's homes. We've been family-owned and operated since 2005, now in our second generation of leadership, and are headquartered in Dallas, Texas.



We serve thousands of retailers, interior designers, department stores, and boutique hotels across the United States through four distinct brands spanning a range of styles and price points. Our growth has been recognized nationally: we've been named to the Inc. 5000 (a prestigious list of America's fastest-growing private companies) two years running, and have received multiple industry awards for product excellence.



We're a company of around 45 people — small enough that every person matters, established enough that you're joining something real and growing.



Discover more at 
.



Why HiEnd Accents?

We're growing our team in the Philippines because we believe in finding the best people regardless of geography — and investing in them for the long term.



As a family-owned company, we don't treat our tea
mbers as interchangeable. We take the time to build real working relationships, we care about your professional development, and we want every person who works with us to leave with stronger skills than when they started. That's a genuine commitment from our leadership, not a line in a job posting.



Learn more about our Philippines team here: Meet the HiEnd Accents Team in the Philippines (
) 



What you can expect:

You'll work directly with our core team in Texas — not through layers of management or a BPO intermediary. Your contributions will be visible, your ideas heard, and your growth supported.



-Compensation & Benefits— Competitive pay benchmarked to PH market rates for skilled roles, not entry-level floors. Paid time off, including vacation days and holidays, plus 13th-month pay.

- Real Career Growth— We're expanding quickly, which means new roles and responsibilities open up regularly. We actively develop our people through mentorship, skill-building, and increasing ownership of projects.

-A Team That Feels Like a Team — We're a close, collaborative group that celebrates wins together. You'll know your teammates by name — including leadership.

We’re hiring an SEO & AI Search Specialist to grow organic visibility and revenue across traditional search and AI-driven answer engines. You’ll own strategy and execution for our Shopify stores—
 and

- High ownership, bias to action, and communication via
, Slack, Zoom, and phone.

Nice to have

title: Pinterest Manager
description:
HOW TO APPLY



If this opportunity feels like the perfect fit for you and you meet the job qualifications, we invite you to learn more about our HiEnd Accents team in the Philippines and submit your application here:




/appzq4iqeIREQRVyo/pagIckNnVuKAYhim2/form



Please note: Only applications submitted via this link will be considered.



Job Description



We’re hiring a Pinterest Manager to take full ownership of our Pinterest presence and turn it into a high-performing sales channel.



This role owns both organic Pinterest growth and Pinterest Ads performance, with a strong focus on turning Pinterest into a scalable paid acquisition channel.



This is not a generic social media role—we’re looking for someone who deeply understands how the Pinterest platform works, from its search algorithm and Smart Feed to pin formats, trends, and conversion paths. Your goal: drive meaningful traffic and sales from Pinterest through smart, strategic execution.



Mission Statement: Build and scale a Pinterest strategy that doesn’t just look good—but performs. You will grow impressions, increase outbound clicks, and **drive profitable revenue through both organic content and paid Pinterest campaigns.



Primary Responsibilities





Pinterest Organic Strategy & Execution



- Develop and execute a Pinterest-specific strategy rooted in platform best practices and SEO.

- Stay on top of Pinterest’s evolving algorithm, features (e.g., Idea Pins, video), and trends to keep us ahead of the curve.

- Use keyword research and SEO to craft high-converting titles, descriptions, and hashtags.

- Align Pinterest strategy with seasonal campaigns, product launches, and key retail 
nts.

- Build and maintain a structured Pinterest keyword library to support ongoing SEO efforts.

- Leverage Pinterest keyword insights to inform both organic content and paid targeting.



Pinterest Ads Strategy & Execution



- Plan, launch, and manage Pinterest ad campaigns to drive traffic, conversions, and revenue.

- Develop a full-funnel Pinterest strategy that integrates organic content and paid amplification.

- Own campaign structure across prospecting, retargeting, and catalog sales campaigns.

- Manage budgets, bids, and pacing to hit performance targets.

- Continuously test audiences, creatives, and campaign types to improve efficiency.

- Partner with the eCommerce and analytics teams to ensure proper tracking and attribution.

- Scale winning campaigns while maintaining target CPA/ROAS goals.



Content Creation & Scheduling



- Design and publish optimized pins (static, video, Idea Pins) that speak to our target customer and drive clicks.

- Build and maintain organized boards with strategic themes and branding.

- Manage publishing cadence based on performance data and best practices through Tailwind, Pinterest Scheduler, or similar tools.

- Ensure all pins are visually on-brand and aligned with HiEnd Accents’ positioning.



Performance Analytics & Optimization



- Track and report on KPIs weekly/monthly: outbound clicks, saves, conversions, CTR.

- Run A/B tests on creative, formats, and timing to improve pin performance.

- Continuously refine strategy based on what the algorithm favors and what drives the best ROI.

trics such as assisted conversions and revenue contribution where available.

Requirements

- Comfortable working with performance data, dashboards, and attribution reporting.

- Must be able to collaborate during overlapping US business hours as needed.

- Understand how Pinterest works as a visual search engine, not just a social platform.

- Are skilled with Pinterest SEO, keyword research, and algorithm-based strategies.

- Know your way around Tailwind, Canva, Photoshop, and Pinterest Analytics.

- Are detail-oriented, self-directed, and results-focused.

 capture from Pinterest, or using Pinterest for DTC sales.

title: Sales Specialist
description:
Job Title: Sales Specialist (GovCon Consultant) 

Type: Full-Time / Part-Time (Remote) 

Schedule: Monday–Friday (CST Hours Preferred)



About Our Company

We are a premium consulting and education firm that helps small businesses secure state and federal government contracts. Through our programs, services, and SaaS platform GovCon iSource, we provide the strategy, tools, and execution needed for businesses to grow, scale, and win in the government marketplace. Our clients are U.S.-based small business owners generating $100K to $10M annually, seeking structure, guidance, and results in their government contracting journey.



Role Overview:

We are seeking a high-energy, results-oriented Sales Specialist who understands that selling in the GovCon space requires a blend of persistence, education, and strategic consultation. In this role, you will be the first point of contact for businesses looking to scale. You will manage a high volume of inbound and outbound activity, transforming leads into long-term partners. You are responsible for identifying a prospect's pain points, explaining the value of the GovCon iSource ecosystem, and closing the gap between a business owner's potential and their first (or next) government contract.



Key Responsibilities

- Lead Management & Conversion

- Own the follow-up process for all leads funneled from the Marketing Department.

-Execute a high volume of outbound sales calls to prospective clients.

- Manage and respond to inbound inquiries promptly to maintain lead 
ntum.

- Master the art of conversion: moving prospects from cold to warm, and warm to potential closed clients.

- Consultative Selling & Meetings

- Host and attend discovery calls/meetings to qualify prospects and assess their "contract readiness."

- Conduct deep-dive sales presentations that align TIKC services with the client’s specific business goals.

- Educate small business owners on the ROI of government contracting and the necessity of our strategic consulting.

- Pipeline & CRM Management

- Maintain meticulous records of all sales activities, notes, and deal stages within 
.

- Manage your daily workflow using phone systems like Zoom Phone or similar cloud-based tools.

- Ensure no lead is left behind through consistent, structured follow-up sequences.

- Strategic Collaboration

- Work closely with the Marketing team to provide feedback on lead quality and campaign effectiveness.

- Seamlessly transition closed clients to the Client Success team for onboarding.



Required Qualifications

- Proven Sales Experience: You must have a track record of closing deals in a B2B or consulting environment.

- CRM Proficiency: Experience navigating and managing workflows within 
 or a similar CRM.

- Tech Literacy: Comfortable using Zoom Phone or equivalent VOIP systems for high-volume calling.

- Communication Skills: Ability to lead a room (or a Zoom call) with confidence, empathy, and clear "ask" for the business.



Preferred Qualifications

- GovCon Experience: Direct experience or familiarity with government contracting (
, certifications, RFPs) is highly preferred.

- Experience selling high-ticket consulting services or SaaS platforms.

- Familiarity with the challenges faced by small businesses generating $100K–$10M in revenue.



Ideal Candidate Traits

- The Closer: You are motivated by hitting targets and seeing the "Closed-Won" notification.

- Proactive Follow-up: You don’t wait to be told to call a lead; you own your pipeline.

- Resilient: You handle "no" with grace and see it as a step toward the next "yes."

- Integrity-Driven: You sell the right solutions to the right people, ensuring long-term client success.



Why This Role Matters

The Sales Specialist is the engine of TIKC’s growth. By identifying and enrolling the right small businesses, you are directly responsible for helping entrepreneurs tap into billions of dollars in government spending. Your work doesn't just grow our firm—it changes the trajectory of the businesses we serve.



How to Apply

If you’re ready to bring your sales expertise to a fast-growing GovCon ecosystem: 

Apply here:

CRO Shopify Web Developer – Job Overview

I am looking for an experienced shopify web developer to help me upgrade client’s checkout processes and execute CRO tests for various ecommerce brands.

In this role you will update Shopify theme templates, develop landing pages using various page builders and html/CSS frameworks, research/install various checkout/bundle applications, and implement A/B tests using testing tools like intelligems.

You will also report on test performance, and provide suggestions for next steps.

This is a full-time opportunity. Training will be provided and you will work directly with me.



About Zack Miller

My name is Zack Miller, and I’ve been a DTC Ecommerce Growth Marketer since 2019. I’ve done everything fro
dia buying and client strategy, to agency internal operations.

I’ve contributed to the growth of over 200 ecommerce brands in my agency experience. Now, as an independent growth marketing partner, I work closely with a small number of brands on their new customer acquisition strategy.



Note: All Remote Employees Must Be Available To Work During The Following Business Hours:

Monday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Tuesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Wednesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Thursday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Friday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

- Develop landing pages using Figma and various WYSYWIG editors including but not limited to Replo and Pagefly.

- Edit product, collection and other page templates using Shopify Liquid template engine, and various HTML/CSS frameworks.

- Install various checkout/tracking applications (aftersell, Zipify OCU, Upstack, etc)

- Implement A/B tests in intelligems for product price tests, shipping price tests, theme tests, landing page tests, and more. 

- Research new ideas for direct response content marketing strategies.

- Work in my project management system, ClickUp.

- Apply a process-first mentality and provide feedback to help further develop our operating systems.



Required Experience & Education

- Strong verbal and written English language skills (American Dialect)

- Strong knowledge of HTML/CSS/Javascript/Shopify Liquid required. 

- Knowledge of Python and Ruby preferred but not required.

- 1+ years of web development (Shopify) experience required

- 1+ years of backend python (flask/django) development experience preferred but not required

- 1+ years of marketing agency experience preferred but not required

- Must be highly organized and possess strong attention to detail

- All applicants are encouraged to apply, regardless of experience or education

title: AI Architect and Claude Code Specialist, $2,000 to $3,000/month, full-time remote
description:
If you have never built a multi-agent system that runs autonomously in production, stop reading.



Blend 2 Vend is a UK commercial coffee machine company that is growing fast and runs on AI. We are not a tech company that talks about innovation. We ship it. Every week. Our automation stack already runs lead qualification, reporting, CRM operations, and data sync, all built with Claude Code. We move quickly, we own our work, we hold each other accountable, and we have fun doing it.



I built everything we have so far myself. Now I need someone better than me to take it further. This role is not support. It is not maintenance. You will be building the brain of this business: the AI systems that think, d
, and act across every department. You will be my technical partner, not a task-taker. I expect you to tell me what is possible before I have to ask.



If that sounds like the kind of work you want to wake up for, keep reading.



What you will do day-to-day



Design and build agentic workflows that handle multi-step business processes on their own: lead qualification, reporting, data enrichment, CRM operations

Build and manage Claude Code skill systems, custom slash commands, CLAUDE.md configs, and persistent memory architectures

Set up and maintain MCP servers connecting Claude Code to our live business tools (Supabase, Google Sheets, CRM APIs,
)

Write Python scripts, API integrations, and automation logic that Claude Code agents use as tools

Architect multi-agent systems where different agents handle different business domains and coordinate with each other

Track new Claude model releases, agent frameworks (CrewAI, LangGraph, AutoGen), MCP protocol updates, and prompt engineering techniques. Bring them into production before I ask.

Find slow or broken processes in our operations and build AI-powered fixes without waiting to be told



Must have (non-negotiable)



You have built and shipped projects using Claude Code as your primary dev environment, not just run a few prompts

You can design systems where AI agents take real actions, handle errors, and run with minimal supervision

You have connected Claude Code to external tools and databases using MCP (Model Context Protocol)

You write clean Python for API integration, data transformation, and tool-building

You know how to write system prompts, CLAUDE.md files, and skill definitions that reliably produce the right output

You are comfortable with REST APIs, webhooks, auth flows, and error handling

You live in the terminal and Git. Not GUI tools.

You find what needs building and build it. No task list required.



Strong signal (these put you at the top)



You have used multi-agent frameworks (CrewAI, LangGraph, AutoGen) in production, not just followed tutorials

You have built OpenClaw agents: browser automation, computer-use agents, or autonomous web agents

n8n workflow automation experience. We use it heavily and you would extend existing workflows.

Supabase or PostgreSQL experience

GoHighLevel API experience

You have built persistent memory systems for AI agents

You follow AI developments daily. You know what shipped last week and have opinions about it.

You have built AI systems for a real business, not just side projects or demos



This role is not for you if...



Your AI experience stops at prompting ChatGPT or using pre-built templates

You call yourself an "AI automation specialist" but your actual stack is connecting Zapier triggers to GPT wrappers

You have never opened a terminal and built something from the command line

You need step-by-step instructions for every task

You learned Claude Code from one YouTube tutorial last month

You want a quiet, repetitive VA role. This one changes weekly as new AI capabilities ship.

Pay and working arrangement



$2,000 to $3,000/month USD depending on experience. That is above market rate on purpose. I want the best person, not the cheapest. Pay review every 6 months - I promise the more value you bring to the business the more I will increase pay.



Full-time, remote. Minimum 4 hours overlap with UK business hours (GMT/BST). This is a long-term core position, not a contract.



How to apply



Do not message me directly or send a generic application. Only applications submitted through the form below will be reviewed. The form asks specific questions about your Claude Code experience and technical background. If you cannot answer them from real work you have done, this is not the right role.



No agencies. I am hiring one person directly. If you are an agency, recruiter, or outsourcing firm, do not apply.



Apply here:

title: Mobile App Research Analyst — AI Studio
description:
AI Studio 10 is a mobile app studio building AI-powered apps used by thousands of people worldwide. We move fast, think critically, and use AI tools daily to punch above our weight. We're a small, sharp team — and the insights you uncover will directly shape what we build and how we grow.



The Role

We're looking for a curious, detail-obsessed App Research Analyst to become our eyes and ears on the competition. Your job is simple but critical: find the best apps in our space, tear apart how they acquire users and convert them into paying customers, and bring those insights back to the team in a way that's clear and actionable.

This isn't a "fill out a spreadsheet and forget it" role. You'll be a key voice in product and marketing discussions, surfacing patterns and opportunities the team would otherwise miss.



What You'll Do

Competitor Funnels & Onboarding



Download, sign up for, and walk through competitor apps end to end — from first open to paywall

Screen-record and document every step of onboarding flows, free trials, and upgrade prompts

Identify what's working: friction points, persuasion techniques, timing of paywalls, personalisation tactics

Track how competitors change and test their funnels over time



Ad Creatives & User Acquisition Campaigns



Monitor competitor ads across Meta, TikTok, Google, and Apple Search Ads using tools like Meta Ad Library, TikTok Creative Center, and similar platforms

Catalogue ad formats, hooks, messaging angles, and creative styles

Flag high-performing or long-running creatives and explain why they likely work

Spot emerging trends in ad creative before they become obvious



Reporting & Collaboration



Organise findings into clear, visual reports (screenshots, screen recordings, annotated breakdowns)

Present weekly insights to the team with your own commentary — not just raw data, but your take on what matters

Maintain a living competitor database that the team can reference any time

Suggest concrete ideas inspired by what you've found — "We should try X because competitor Y is doing it and here's why it works"



Who You Are



You're naturally curious — you download apps for fun and notice the details others skip

You have strong analytical instincts — you don't just see what competitors do, you think about why

You communicate clearly in written English — your reports are easy to scan and act on

You're comfortable with screen recording tools and organising visual research

You're proactive — you don't wait to be told what to research next

Experience with mobile apps, digital marketing, or subscription/SaaS products is a strong plus

Familiarity with tools like Meta Ad Library, Sensor Tower, AppMagic, or similar is a bonus (but we'll train you)



What We Offer



Full-time remote position with a London-based team

Competitive salary (paid monthly via Wise)

Direct access to the founder — your work shapes real decisions

Opportunity to grow into a broader product or marketing role as the team scales

Work at the intersection of AI and mobile apps — one of the fastest-moving spaces in tech



How to Apply

Send us:



A short message (3–5 sentences) telling us why this role excites you

Mini-task: For an app we provide - Choose one competitor app in that category and deliver a short research brief covering:



Funnel breakdown: Screen-record yourself going through the app from first open to paywall. Note what works, what doesn't, and why.

Creatives: Find 3–5 of their ads (use Meta Ad Library, TikTok Creative Center, or similar). For each ad, note the hook, the format, and why you think it does or doesn't work.

s, and landing pages

Applications without a video will not be reviewed.

________________________________________

Pay & Growth

• Long-term role for the right person

title: Video Editor (PHP 358/HR - USD $6/HR | PART Time)
description:
Hey!



We are looking for a Video Editor ROCKSTAR who will turn our long form content into high-performing short form clips and weekly YouTube videos.



We are a marketing and education company that works with English speakers and already have a team of high-performing individuals from the Philippines. Mastery of the English language is a requirement and will be tested prior to hiring.



BENEFITS INCLUDE:

- 100% remote

- Weekly pay

- USD $6 / Hour = 350 PHP / Hour

- Paid training

- No work during the weekends

- Opportunity to go from part time to full time

- We pay for the AI and creative tools you will use (Adobe, Descript, Opus Clip, Canva Pro)

- Grow with a team that values initiative, speed, and high standards



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



Short form (main focus):

- Take long form content (webinars, trainings, YouTube videos, podcasts) and turn it into short form clips for Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn

- Add attention-grabbing hooks, captions, emojis, B-roll, overlays, and pattern interrupts

- Create short testimonial videos from coaching calls, client interviews, and other raw footage

- Organize and manage video assets so clips are easy to find and reuse



Long form & channel support:

- Edit 1 piece of long form content per week (highlight key 
nts, add B-roll, overlays, and graphics)

- Publish that long form video on YouTube (upload, title, description, tags, end screens, cards)

- Create and upload custom YouTube thumbnails that drive clicks

- Handle one-off editing requests as needed (simple promos, clips, intros/outros, etc.)

- Analyze performance of published videos in YouTube Studio (CTR, views, watch time, retention) and provide simple reports and recommendations



Collaboration & cadence:

- Meet once a week with the owner of the company for feedback, direction, and priorities

- Join 1 monthly content planning session with the team

- Use AI tools (that we pay for) to speed up editing, transcription, captioning, and repurposing while still polishing by hand



Expected volume (part-time ~20 hours per week):

- 20–30 finished short form clips per week (30–90 seconds each)

- 1 edited and published long form YouTube video per week

- Ongoing testimonial edits and one-off requests as needed



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR:



Experience & portfolio:

- Proven experience editing short form content from long form videos

- Strong portfolio showing:

Before/after edits from long form to short form

YouTube videos you have edited and thumbnails you have designed

Short testimonial / social proof videos (a plus)



Tool competence (we provide licenses):

You will work daily inside:

- Adobe Premiere Pro (primary editor)

- Basic Adobe After Effects (simple animations, lower thirds, transitions)

- Descript (transcription, rough cuts, repurposing)

- Opus Clip (AI clipping & short-form ideas)

- Canva Pro (YouTube thumbnails & simple graphics)

- YouTube Studio (publishing & analytics)

- Google Drive, Google Docs/Sheets (file management, tracking)

- ClickUp (task management)

- Slack (communication)



You don’t need to be a master of every tool on day one, but you must already be strong in at least one pro editor (Premiere / Final Cut / DaVinci) and be able to learn the rest quickly.

Having experience with video editing is a requirement to be considered for this role.

We will ask you what your favorite dog breed is, answer chowchow in your application so we know you have read the full job posting.

We will start with relatively limited hours (around 20 hours per week to begin) with the opportunity for it to grow as our relationship develops.



REQUIREMENTS:

- Mastery of the English language (spoken and written)

- Strong project management skills and ability to hit volume targets consistently

- Comfortable reviewing analytics and making basic performance recommendations

- Quiet environment to work



TECH REQUIREMENTS (MINIMUM):

- Computer: Windows 10/11 PC or Mac (released within the last 4–5 years)

CPU: Intel i7 / Ryzen 7 / Apple M1 or better (or equivalent)

RAM: Minimum 16 GB (32 GB strongly preferred)

Storage: At least 512 GB SSD, with 150+ GB free for active projects

GPU: Dedicated graphics card with 4 GB VRAM or more (e.g., NVIDIA GTX 1660 / RTX series or equivalent). For Mac, M1/M2 with integrated GPU is fine.



- Software capability:

Must be able to run Adobe Premiere Pro / After Effects smoothly while having multiple Chrome tabs, cloud drives, and AI tools (Descript / Opus Clip / etc.) open.



-High Speed Internet: Stable enough for uploading/downloading large video files and live calls without interruption

Reliable backup option (mobile data or secondary ISP) is a plus



- Other:

Quality headphones and microphone for edit reviews and team calls

Quiet, dedicated workspace suitable for focused editing work



If your current setup struggles with Adobe Premiere or AI tools like Descript / Opus Clip, please upgrade first before applying. This role requires fast, reliable hardware to hit our weekly volume targets.



SCHEDULE:

You must be available to work 4 hours per day, following this schedule: 3 PM – 7 PM Philippines time.



You must APPLY with this link:

title: Personal Executive Assistant (2+ years experience required)
description:
We're hiring a Personal Executive Assistant for a multi-brand ecom founder based in Dubai.



We DON'T consider you if you send an AI response!



Details: Remote, full-time (100% reliable person)

• $500–$3500/month depending on experience 

• A+ player team across multiple brands 

• Work directly with the founder 

• GMT+4 timezone hours (Dubai) 

• Long-term role that grows with the business



I'm an entrepreneur running multiple e-commerce brands. I'm based in Dubai, travel frequently between Europe and the Middle East, and manage several business entities. 



I need one exceptional person to take everything off my plate that isn't high-level strategy or creative direction. If you're the type of person who figures things out before being asked, keep reading.



What you'll do: 

• Book all flights, hotels, and transportation, research the best options, know my preferences, and handle everything from departure times to visa requirements without me having to think about it 



• Manage my calendar across multiple time zones, schedule meetings, block focus time, flag conflicts, and never let anything fall through the cracks 



• Think 3 months ahead at all times, track deadlines, renewals, visa expirations, lease end dates, upcoming trips, and send me weekly briefings so I'm never surprised 



• Conduct research on anything I need, apartment comparisons, wealth management firms, office furniture, service providers, and present the top 2-3 options with a recommendation, not a data dump 



• Manage communications with brokers, accountants, service providers, and legal contacts, draft
s, follow up, keep everything moving 



• Handle admin for a secondary business (small e-commerce site), product updates, supplier coordination, small operational tasks 



• Handle personal logistics, SIM registrations, bank appointments, sourcing purchases, coordinating local services in Dubai • Manage my inbox when needed, flag urgent items, draft responses, archive noise



What I'm looking for: 

• Highly intelligent and resourceful, you figure things out on your own before escalating (if not we won't work with you!) 



• Obsessively punctual and detail-oriented, you triple-check dates, times, and details because mistakes cost real money (if not we won't work with you!) 



• Direct communicator, no fluff, no sugarcoating, you say what needs to be said clearly and immediately (if not we won't work with you!) 



• Proactive and forward-thinking, you anticipate what's needed before being asked



• Exceptional written and spoken English (if not we won't work with you!) 



• 2+ years experience as an EA, PA, or Chief of Staff, ideally for a founder, CEO, or HNW individual (if not we won't work with you!) 



• Expert in Google Workspace, Slack, and project management tools (if not we won't work with you!) 



• Trustworthy and discreet, you'll have access to sensitive business and personal information 



After 30 days, I should never have to: 

• Book my own flights or accommodation 

• Chase anyone for a response 

• Remember a deadline or renewal 

• Research options for a decision, you present them ready for approval



Fill in this form to apply: (don't waste your time filling this in if you don't match the previous criteria)

title: Netflix Video Editor Instagram Personal Brand
description:
I'm looking for a netflix-grade video editor for short and long-form. The one who gets it.



What this is:



I'm building an esoteric high-agency personal brand around one idea: law of attraction and consciousness expansion. Think James Bond movie style content combined with a spiritual jackie Chan. Missions across countries. Consciousness. High standards. Real depth beneath the lifestyle.



Think cinematic lifestyle, but with a soul. Not travel content. Not motivation content. Something that hasn't really been done before.



The reference aesthetic: Iman Gadzhi early content + film-grade color + retro camera texture cuts + one line of text that stops people scrolling.



What you'll do:

• Edit 10-20 reels per month, quality over quantity, every single one must be extraordinary

- 1 vlog per month for youtube + other long form piece

- 3-4 static IG posts per month

• Color grade to a consistent film aesthetic (warm, cinematic, slightly desaturated — think Kodak film emulation)

• Blend high-quality cinematic footage with retro/film camera cuts for texture

• Source and cut music that feels expansive, cinematic, and slightly spiritual — not generic travel music

• Add precise, minimal text overlays — one line maximum per video, timed perfectly

• Maintain a visual identity so consistent that people recognize the content before they see the name

• Occasional photo editing and feed curation (Lightroom/Photoshop)



! Must be spiritual, slightly esoteric, and be able to create netflix grade content!



MUST BE GOOD AT STORYTELLING AND SCRIPTWRITING!



Must-haves:

• Portfolio that genuinely moves people, not technically impressive reels, emotionally impressive ones

• Mastery of DaVinci Resolve or Premiere Pro, you should be able to color grade in your sleep

• Deep understanding of pacing, music sync, and the feeling a cut creates, not just the look

• Experience with film LUTs, grain overlays, and creating a signature visual aesthetic from scratch

• AI tools for b-roll generation and enhancement (Runway, Pika, or equivalent)

• Photoshop and Lightroom proficiency

• You have watched something and felt it shift something in you, and you know how to create that feeling for others



?????????????????????????



The thing that will get you this role over everyone else:



You have a reference reel or piece of work where someone who watched it messaged you to ask what it meant. Or sent it to someone. Or saved it. Not because it was beautiful. Because it made them feel something they couldn't name.



If you've never made something like that, don't apply. If you have, lead with it.



What you get:

• $500-$3500/month depending on experience and portfolio quality

• Remote, full-time or part-time depending on arrangement

• Direct access to the creative vision, you work directly with me, no middle layer

• You will be the visual architect of a brand that is built to last decades

• Full creative input welcomed, this is a collaboration, not a brief factory



How to apply: 



Don't apply if you don't match the criteria and have high quality personal brand edits.

title: QuickBooks Online Bookkeeper – Part-Time, US Clients (Real Estate & Oil and Gas)
description:
About the Role

We are a Texas-based investment group with three real estate entities and one oil and gas company. Our books are in QuickBooks Online and we need a reliable, experienced bookkeeper who can keep everything clean, accurate, and organized each month.  You may also help organize personal spending of the owner as well as assist with Tax preparations.

You will work directly with our executive assistant as your primary point of contact. This is a remote, part-time role with the potential to grow as we do.



What You’ll Do

Maintain and reconcile books for four QBO accounts monthly

Categorize transactions, manage bank feeds, and clear uncategorized items promptly

Prepare monthly P&L and Balance Sheet for each entity

Handle basic journal entries, vendor setup, and accounts payable

Assist with tracking owner draws and personal finance activity for the founder

Flag anything unusual and communicate clearly before month-end close



What We’re Looking For

2+ years of QuickBooks Online experience — ProAdvisor certification is a plus

Experience with US real estate or small business clients

Comfortable working with multiple entities and staying organized across all of them

Strong written English and clear communication

Available for at least 2–3 hours overlap with US Central Time

Self-directed — you manage your own time and meet deadlines without being chased



Compensation

Part-time: approximately 15–25 hours per month to start

Rate: –/hr USD based on experience

Paid weekly or biweekly via Wise or PayPal



HOW TO APPLY — Please read before submitting

Send your resume and a short note about your QuickBooks experience. In your application subject line, write exactly: QBO-READY — applications without this will not be reviewed. This is a simple instructions test, and it matters for this role.
