title: GoHighLevel Expert
description:
Zen Companies Inc. is Hiring: GoHighLevel (GHL) Expert – Office-Based in Cagayan de Oro



Location: Cagayan de Oro City

Employment Type: Part-Time (On-site)

Schedule: Monday to Friday



About Us

Zen Companies Inc. is a U.S.-based company with a growing and talented team here in the Philippines. We’re expanding our operations in Cagayan de Oro City and looking for a dedicated GoHighLevel (GHL) Expert to join our in-house marketing automation team.



About the Role

We’re looking for a GoHighLevel (GHL) Expert who will take the lead in managing everything related to our CRM and automation systems. You’ll be the go-to person — the “guy on the chair” — for all things GHL, making sure our marketing automations, funnels, and workflows are running efficiently and effectively.



This is a part-time, office-based position at our clubhouse office in CDO, where you'll collaborate closely with a creative and driven local team, supporting campaigns for our U.S.-based clients. Candidates who demonstrate exceptional performance and commitment during the observation period will be considered for a full-time position.



Key Responsibilities

-Take full ownership of the GoHighLevel platform for the company.

-Build and manage automation workflows, funnels, and campaigns using GHL.

-Customize pipelines, triggers, and automations for different business needs.

-Collaborate with designers, marketers, and developers to execute complete campaigns.

-Troubleshoot and optimize existing GHL setups for better performance and conversions.

-Handle the A2P 10DLC registration and verification process.

-Provide expert advice and recommendations to improve marketing automation strategies.



Qualifications

-Proven hands-on experience with GoHighLevel (GHL) in a marketing or agency setup.

-Solid understanding of funnels, automation, and CRM workflows.

-Strong problem-solving, analytical, and organizational skills.

-Working knowledge of Zapier, APIs, and webhooks.

-Excellent communication and teamwork abilities.

-Willing to work on-site in Cagayan de Oro.



Preferred Skills

-Experience with
 marketing, SMS campaigns, and lead nurturing strategies.

-Familiarity with digital marketing, paid ads, or SEO (a plus, but not required).



What We Offer

-Competitive salary package (freelancing rates still apply).

-Collaborative and supportive office environment.

-Growth opportunities within a fast-scaling international company.

-A fun, motivated, and team-oriented workplace culture.



Work Setup

This is a strictly office-based position at our clubhouse office in Cagayan de Oro. You’ll be part of a collaborative team environment that values innovation, learning, and shared success.



How to Apply

Send your resume and a brief portfolio or sample GHL projects to 

Please include “GHL Expert – CDO” in your subject line.

title: Customer Service Representative
description:
About the Role

We are hiring a Customer Success Representative to support our residential property management operations and deliver an excellent experience to clients, residents, and vendors across phone,
, and chat. This is a communication and execution role. You will be responsible for handling inquiries, following established processes, documenting accurately, resolving issues efficiently, and escalating matters when needed.

In this role, your mantra will be professional communication, fast follow-through, clean documentation, process adherence, and strong teamwork. We value people who are goal-oriented, outcome-focused, and committed to doing things the right way. You will play an important part in ensuring smooth day-to-day service and helping our team maintain a high standard of support.

For your application to be considered, please read the full job description and complete the application process in full.

Our Core Values

Accountability

 We all make mistakes. We own them, learn from them, and improve.

Growth

 Personal. Business. Industry. We are always looking for ways to move ourselves and the people we serve forward.

Innovation

 We ask how things can be done better, faster, and with better outcomes.

Team

 We all need someone to lean on at times. We support one another.

Do It Now

 We handle issues as they arise and focus on fully finishing one task before moving to the next.

Communication

 Clear, timely communication is the foundation of strong relationships.





What You’ll Be Doing

1) Customer Support Across Phone,
, and Chat

Handle inbound and outbound communication professionally across all support channels Use proper greetings, active listening, and efficient problem-solving during calls. Respond to tickets,
s, and chat requests within SLA timeframes. Provide accurate information and stay engaged until issues are fully resolved.

Maintain service quality by staying aligned with team expectations and company standards.

3) Escalation Handling & Resolution Support

Identify issues that require escalation and route them to the correct tea
mber promptly. 

4) Documentation & Record Accuracy

Document all interactions, outcomes, and follow-up actions in our system accurately. 

Maintain complete and organized notes so the team has reliable records to work from. 

Ensure information is updated quickly and efficiently.

5) Quality Assurance & Team Collaboration

Adhere to quality assurance guidelines across calls,
, and chat communication. 

Work closely with tea
mbers to share feedback, improve workflows, and solve recurring issues. Contribute to a service culture built on responsiveness, consistency, and accountability.









Requirements

Required Skills & Experience

Prior customer service experience is preferred, though strong communication skills and the right attitude matter greatly. 

Excellent spoken and written English.

Ability to learn processes, policies, and terminology quickly.

Strong problem-solving skills and a team-oriented mindset.

Ability to multitask under pressure while following written procedures.

Spanish proficiency is a plus.

Technology & Workspace Requirements

DSL or fiber internet with backup connection, such as mobile data.

Noise-canceling headset and functional webcam.

Smartphone for secondary communication.

Access to a reliable backup power or internet source,in case of outages.

Working Hours

 Saturday: Rotational shift, 8:30 AM to 5:30 PM EST

Compensation & Benefits

Payment Structure

 Tea
mbers are paid weekly via TransferWise. The payroll period runs from Friday to Thursday, with payments processed every Friday afternoon.

 8 weeks at $180 per week

Post-Probation Full-Time

$200 per week ($800/month) 

Paid Time Off (PTO)  Accrues at 1 day per month

Sick Leave  5 days per year

13th Month Pay  Performance-based

 Paid Birthday Leave





Philippine Government Reimbursements

 SSS: Up to ?2,400/month

 PhilHealth: Up to ?800/month

 Pag-IBIG: Up to ?800/month

Health Insurance Card

Language Bonus

 Additional incentive for Spanish fluency, both spoken and written.

Items 3, 4, 5, 6, and 7 begin at the 6th month of employment.

How to Apply

1) Complete Our Application Form

2) Submit All Required Documents

Speed test screenshot

PDF resume with cover letter

Video recording of you speaking through your resume

Important: Only complete applications will be considered. Please make sure all required information and documents are submitted.

Join Us

If you are ready for a challenging and rewarding role in a fast-growing real estate environment, we would love to hear from you.

title: Afterhours Engineer - NOC/SOC/Support
description:
Please apply for this job here: 



JOB SUMMARY

The Afterhours Engineer - NOC\SOC\Support is important in the Service Delivery division at CTS. Operating as the primary guardian of our clients' infrastructure during off-peak hours, this role combines Network Operations (NOC), Security Operations (SOC), and high-level VIP support.



Responsible for delivering impeccable maintenance, security monitoring, and "white-glove" support, this engineer must exhibit a sense of ownership over various systems. You will be responsible for triaging security alerts, executing i
 response playbooks, and ensuring VIP requests are resolved immediately, ensuring our clients’ environments are stable and secure before the morning shift arrives.



This is an individual contributor - technical position.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Service Delivery: Respond to and resolve service i
 following existing procedures and Service Level Agreements (SLAs). Track time, communications, and work output via ConnectWise Manage PSA.

Network Operations (NOC) Monitoring & Remediation: Remediate alerts from monitoring tools generated from firewalls, switches, access points, physical and virtual workstations, servers, and storage devices. Configure monitoring of client infrastructure using PRTG, Kaseya VSA, and ConnectWise Manage.

Security & I
 Response (SOC): Act as the first line of defense for security alerts. Triage potential threats (e.g., suspicious logins, EDR alerts, phishing reports) using established I
 Response playbooks. Isolate infected endpoints to prevent lateral movement and document forensic details.

VIP & Helpdesk Support: Provide primary "white-glove" remote support for VIP clients (CEOs/Executives) experiencing after-hours technical issues. Address all phone calls and urgent tickets outside of regular business hours with a focus on rapid resolution.

Cloud Administration: Administer and troubleshoot Microsoft 365 (Exchange, Teams, SharePoint) and Google Workspace environments to resolve urgent user access or configuration issues.

Maintenance & Automation: Administer and perform the work for monthly, quarterly, bi-annual, and yearly maintenance plans. Assist higher-level Engineers to automate recurring requests using Ninja RMM, ConnectWise Manage, PRTG, and PowerShell.

Backup Management: Monitor and remediate all CTS-provided client backup solutions: Acronis On-Prem, Acronis Cloud, and AFI.

Documentation: Create and maintain information and documentation in ConnectWise Manage and ITGlue to ensure a smooth handoff to the daytime engineering team.



REQUIRED SKILLS AND QUALIFICATIONS

2+ years of experience in an MSP (Managed Service Provider) environment, specifically in a NOC or an L2/L3 escalation role.

Cybersecurity Fundamentals: Strong understanding of cybersecurity principles, threat landscapes (ransomware, phishing), and experience executing I
 Response playbooks.

Cloud Platforms: Advanced administration skills in Microsoft 365 (User management, Intune, MFA troubleshooting) and Google Workspace.

Networking: Experience with networking protocols: TCP/IP, BGP, OSPF, VPN, IPSEC, VoIP, and QoS. Experience in WAN/LAN networking, including routing, switching, security, and load balancing.

OS Support: Experience with Microsoft Windows Server, Windows Desktop, and Apple Ecosystem.

WLAN & Hardware: Experience in WLAN technologies (Meraki, UniFi, Cisco) and Network Attached Storage (NAS).

VoIP: Experience with Grand Stream or other Asterisk-based PBX systems.

Soft Skills: Exceptional written and oral communication skills with the ability to de-escalate stressful situations for VIP clients.

Work Ethic: Self-motivated, with excellent time management skills and the ability to work independently without supervision during overnight hours.



PREFERRED SKILLS AND QUALIFICATIONS

MSP experience.

Knowledge of scripting/programming language, including, but not limited to, PowerShell, BASH, and/or VBScript

Knowledge of network vendors: SonicWALL, Juniper MIST, Meraki, and Unifi

Knowledge of security tools: EDR/XDR,
 Filtering, Security Awareness, and Cloud Backups

Experience with MSP-related tools: ConnectWise Manage, Ninja RMM, PRTG, and ITGlue



WORK LOCATION & SCHEDULE

This is a full-time remote position for candidates located in the Philippines

The hours for this position are 6pm-6am EST, 4x/week including weekends (on a rotation basis)

COMPENSATION



The salary range for this role is $1600 - $2500/monthly



BENEFITS

Paid Time Off

Floating Holidays



This is an independent contractor role.

title: AI Content Operations & Performance Lead
description:
Company: Jennings Social Media & MarTech (JSMM)

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Hours: Part-Time (Must overlap minimum 4–5 hours with U.S. Central Time)

Compensation: Fixed monthly + performance-based growth opportunities



Overview



We are not a traditional marketing agency. We operate in a high-speed, AI-powered content environment where success is measured by:



Output

Performance

Growth across client accounts



We are hiring an AI Content Operations & Performance Lead to manage content flow, coordinate creators, and ensure content is not only created—but published, optimized, and performing.



This is not an editing role. This is not a design role.



This is a systems, coordination, and performance role.



What You Will Be Responsible For

1. Content Operations & Workflow Management



Manage content across multiple client accounts

Ensure content moves from:

idea ? creation ? approval ? publishing

Identify and remove bottlenecks in the process

Keep creators accountable to deadlines and output expectations



2. Creator Coordination & Leadership

Work directly with content creators (video, social, copy)

Provide clear direction on:

Hooks

Formats

Content improvements

Ensure creators are producing consistent, on-brand, high-performing content



3. Brand Voice & Style Guide Management

Maintain and enforce:

Brand voice

Messaging frameworks

Style guides

Ensure all content aligns with brand standards across accounts



4. Content Performance Tracking

Review weekly content performance across platforms (Instagram,
, etc.)

Identify:

What is working (patterns)

What is not working

Provide clear, actionable feedback to creators

Help improve performance week over week



5. AI Workflow Integration

Use AI tools (ChatGPT, etc.) to:

Organize content systems

Improve speed and consistency

Support creators with prompts and frameworks

Continuously refine internal systems for scalability

What Success Looks Like (First 30–60 Days)

Content is moving faster across all accounts

Fewer delays and missed deadlines

Clear visibility into performance

Creators are improving based on your direction

Brand voice is more consistent across content

Output volume increases without sacrificing quality



Requirements

Strong understanding of social media content performance (hooks, engagement, formats)

Experience managing or coordinating content teams or creators

Ability to think in systems, not tasks

Highly organized and detail-oriented

Comfortable working in a fast-paced, high-output environment

Strong communication and leadership skills

Experience using or willingness to adopt AI tools for content workflows



Time Zone Requirement

Must be available for at least 4–5 hours overlap with U.S. Central Time

This is critical for working with our team and creators in real-time



Important: This Role Is NOT

A content writing role

A graphic design role

A passive or task-based role

A slow, perfection-focused environment



We prioritize:



Speed

Execution

Iteration

Performance

Growth Opportunity



This role has strong upside for the right person.



If you can:



Take ownership

Improve performance across accounts

Build scalable systems



You will have opportunities to:



Increase compensation

Take on more responsibility

Grow into a senior operational leadership role

Application Instructions (Important)



To be considered, include:



A short paragraph on:

Link to portfolio examples including captions and reels

How you have improved content performance or managed creators

Your experience with:

Social media content

AI tools (if any)



A brief answer to this question:



What makes content perform well on social media today?



Applications without these will not be reviewed.

title: Customer Experience Virtual Assistant (Phone Based)
description:
Note: Interested applicants must submit their application exclusively through the OnlineJobs platform. Do not
 the company directly. Any candidate who contacts the company outside of the OnlineJobs system will be disqualified from consideration.



Customer Experience Virtual Assistant (Phone-Based, Process-Driven)



Job Overview



Are you someone who takes pride in handling customer interactions the right way—calmly, professionally, and consistently? Do you do well with clear expectations, scripts, and processes, and enjoy improving quickly through feedback? If so, Maid In America Cleaning Services, based in Clarksville, TN, wants to hear from you.



We’re seeking a Customer Experience Virtual Assistant to serve as a frontline point of contact for our customers and a dependable executor of structured processes. Working closely with our sales and customer experience teams, you’ll be responsible for answering inbound calls, handling customer requests, following defined scripts, and routing issues accurately.



This role is process-driven and phone-heavy, especially during training. The work can be fast-paced at times, but it is highly structured. Your ability to stay calm, follow instructions precisely, and take coaching seriously will have a direct impact on customer satisfaction and team efficiency.



What You’ll Do



- Answer & Handle Inbound Customer Calls: Be the first point of contact for customers and new inquiries, answering calls promptly, professionally, and calmly while following provided phone scripts.

- Follow Scripts & Decision Trees: Handle common customer needs—such as scheduling questions, reschedules, basic service inquiries, and initial issue intake—by following clear scripts and escalation rules exactly.

- Route Requests Accurately: Determine when a request can be handled directly and when it should be escalated to the appropriate tea
mber, ensuring clean handoffs and no dropped balls.

- Create a Positive Customer Experience: Make customers feel heard, cared for, and confident that their request is being handled, even when issues or complaints arise.

- Document Interactions & Updates: Log accurate notes and updates in our systems so the internal team always has clear context and next steps.

- Support Structured Administrative Workflows: Execute defined backend processes (task tracking, updates, file movement, and follow-through) by following SOPs and checklists without skipping steps.

- Receive Coaching & Improve Quickly: Actively apply feedback on calls, scripts, and workflows, improving speed, accuracy, and confidence over time.



Who We’re Looking For



- Process-Driven & Detail-Oriented: You’re comfortable following scripts, checklists, and SOPs exactly, and you don’t skip steps or “freestyle” your work.

- Calm & Professional on the Phone: You communicate clearly and confidently, stay composed with customers, and can handle questions or mild frustration without getting flustered.

- Highly Coachable: You take feedback seriously, apply it quickly, and improve fast—especially when it comes to phone scripts and customer handling.

- Reliable & Consistent: You show up on time, follow through on tasks, and can be counted on to do things the right way every time.

- Comfortable with Structure: You prefer clear expectations, defined processes, and knowing exactly what “good” looks like in your role.

- Tech-Comfortable: You’re comfortable working inside tools like Slack, shared documents, and task systems—or you can learn them quickly with instructions.

- Strong Communicator: Whether by phone, chat, or written notes, you communicate clearly, professionally, and respectfully.



Our Core Values



- Communication

- Connection

- Quality

- Service

- Teamwork



If you share these values, we want you on our team to help drive our company forward.



Important Note: Screening Step



SERIOUS APPLICANTS ONLY:

Complete our personality test to see if there’s a mutual fit:


/p/fzxN5FC9302s 

Give honest answers; there are no right or wrong results.



Submit your application with the subject line beginning with the core value we’ve listed that you most resonate with.



IMPORTANT: When applying, please use AT LEAST 5 Apply Points



Skills & Requirements

- Fluent English: Strong spoken and written English is required. This is a phone-based role, and customers must be able to understand you clearly and comfortably.

- Customer Service Experience: Prior experience handling customer inquiries or support requests over the phone is required.

- Process & Administrative Competence: You’re comfortable following multi-step processes, documenting information accurately, and keeping systems up to date.

- Attention to Detail: You consistently capture the right information, follow instructions precisely, and avoid careless errors.

- Coachability: You’re open to feedback, willing to be corrected, and able to apply coaching quickly—especially when learning phone scripts and customer-handling expectations.

- Technical Readiness:

  - Reliable computer with backup power options

  - Quality headset and microphone

  - Quiet workspace suitable for phone calls

- Ability to Work Monday-Friday, 8AM-5PM CST.

- Reliable Internet & Backup Options: Stable internet connection with a backup plan to ensure consistent availability and responsiveness.



Why Join Maid In America Cleaning Services?



- Impactful Role: Your quick execution and initiative will directly affect customer satisfaction and operational efficiency.

- Growth-Oriented Culture: We embrace new ideas, reward proactive thinking, and train daily for continual improvement.

- Supportive Team: Collaborate with a group that values each other’s contributions and thrives on a feedback-rich environment.



If you’re passionate about productivity, eager to work in a fast-paced setting, and confident in your ability to deliver high-quality results quickly, apply now and become an integral part of the Maid In America family!



Apply Today: Submit your application per the instructions above. We look forward to learning more about you!

title: Creative Strategist / Expert Vidéo Meta Ads
description:
???? About Gloya Beauty



At Gloya Beauty, our mission is clear: to democratize professional anti-aging skincare. We offer an innovative, safe, and affordable at-home micro-infusion solution to help women (primarily aged 40–65+) achieve youthful, radiant, and glowing skin.



Our promise: “Achieve luminous, smooth, and rejuvenated skin in just 5 minutes every two weeks, thanks to a painless and cost-effective at-home micro-infusion treatment.”



Our customers—whether “Sylvie the resigned skeptic” or “Claire the DIY expert”—are looking for real results without the cost, pain, or constraints of clinical procedures (Botox, dermatologists). We are here to restore their confidence, so they can feel beautiful even without makeup or filters.



???? Your Mission: Become the Architect of Our Growth on Meta



We are looking for a Creative Strategist passionate about video and performance on Meta Ads. Your role will not just be to “make beautiful videos,” but to design ad creatives that convert, tell a story, and deeply resonate with the psychology of our customers.



You will be the bridge between our customer avatars’ psychology (frustrations, deep desires, fears) and impactful UGC videos that drive explosive ROAS.



What you’ll do daily:



• Creative Strategy & Ideation: Analyze our market, customer avatars (Sylvie & Claire), and competitors to develop new advertising angles.



• Scripting & Copywriting: Write video scripts (UGC, testimonials, product demos) with powerful hooks (e.g., “Why your €100 creams evaporate on the surface…”) and persuasive narrative structures (AIDA, PAS frameworks).



• UGC Creator Management: Source, brief, and guide content creators (women aged 40–65) to produce authentic, natural videos (shot on smartphones in a bathroom setting) that are convincing and relatable.



• Video Editing & Optimization: Edit videos or oversee editing (dynamic pacing, engaging subtitles, relevant B-roll, clear CTAs) optimized specifically for the Meta algorithm.



• Performance Analysis: Track KPIs of your creatives in Business Manager (CTR, CPA, ROAS, thumb-stop ratio) and iterate quickly. Test different hooks, video bodies, and CTAs to find winning combinations.



???? Ideal Profile (Is this you?)



• A Marketer’s Eye, a Creator’s Soul: You deeply understand the difference between a “pretty” video and a video that sells. You master the principles of direct response marketing.



• Meta Ads Expertise: You know what currently works on
 and Instagram (UGC, mashups, native formats). You understand how the algorithm consumes creative.



• Psychologist at Heart: You can put yourself in the shoes of a 58-year-old woman frustrated with wrinkles and the false promises of the cosmetic industry. You use empathy to persuade.



• Copywriting Mastery: You know how to write words that stop the scroll and trigger purchases. (Knowledge of Cialdini, Eugene Schwartz, or Russell Brunson is a huge plus.)



• Technical Skills: Proficiency with video editing tools (CapCut, Premiere Pro) and comfort with project management tools.

title: Remote Appointment Scheduler SALES!
description:
Are you outgoing, friendly, and the one to start the conga line at the wedding?

If you are hungry, smart, and want to succeed, this may be the best job ever for you!



Who we are at StretchPlex:



We are a group of the best trainers, working daily to sharpen our skills and answer the call to those in need. Helping people suffering from pain, injuries, and disabilities to be more active, mobile, and all-around the best version of themselves...



More specifically, we are a wellness business with a special focus on helping people by providing assisted stretching and personal training, and we are the BEST at what we do! We’re headquartered in Delaware(on the east coast of US)  with 3 locations .



We have a quickly growing team of almost 20 rock stars, all committed to working hard to make sure our clients are successful. We’re looking for other highly motivated and driven people who want to grow and make an impact. Is that you?!



What we’re looking for:



We need a Remote Front Desk (or New Customer Appointment Scheduler)



This is a remote (work-from-home) position.



Front Desk Receptionists need to speak very clearly, convert warm leads into customers, go "off-script" when needed, handle objections, schedule customers in our software (Vagaro), and complete daily checklists and tasks. You must be extroverted and friendly!



This unique mix of right brain (client relationship building and management) and left brain (data analysis, daily checklists/tasks, and software management) skills makes front desk receptionists very special people. They are the lifeblood of our organization and we’re looking to find more wonderful tea
mbers who can help us grow!



Salary & growth opportunities:



Appointment Setter starts at $8/Hour along with bonuses for each converted lead

We have hundreds of leads per month with 70% conversion goals

You’ll work under a manager as you learn the trade

You’ll be assigned calls slowly as we begin to build your confidence

You’ll be graded on your client acquisition



Growth Opportunities:



Strong opportunity for growth for appointment setters who make calls outside working hours.

You’ll be graded on your client acquisition performance.

We actively promote from within. Successful appointment setters are rewarded!



The ideal candidate:



Great Talker: You need to talk in a way that gets people interested. Being clear and friendly helps to build trust and makes it easier to turn potential leads into customers. You need to know when to go "off script' to get the customer talking more about themselves.

Good Listener: You should be able to quickly identify what people are worried about. When you listen closely you can connect better with potential lead and get them saying "yes, that's me" or "yes, that happens to me too" in their head.

Never Give Up Attitude: Rejections are part of the game. You will get hung up on, yelled at, or even cursed at. You need to keep trying and not get discouraged. Staying positive even when things don't work out.

Ready to Learn: Things change. You should be always open to learning about new ways to improve yourself and your skills. Being adaptable ensures you can keep up with what customers need and how the organization is growing.



Make sure you’re comfortable with:



Remote working. This is a remote (work-from-home) position.

All job offers start with a 60-day trial to make sure that we’re the right fit for each other.



Our Values:



Wow Service:  Our goal as an organization is to provide a level of therapy and service, unlike anything a customer has ever experienced. Care that is so great it makes them say “WOW”.

Unique, Creative, & Intentional: We encourage all of our employees to add their own personal touch, making it unique. We try to mix things up and constantly challenge each other and our customers.

Passion: We started our business to help people. We love helping people reach new goals and new potential. We are constantly bettering ourselves and our minds.

Create FUN and a little Weird: Our favorite value! And it is usually the one that catches everyone off guard. But we do not want a company that is BORING and DULL.



TO APPLY:



Visit this link to apply for the position:  



We will only be looking at applications from the link only.



Please include the link to your profile from this site.



We will not reply to applicants who do not follow these directions! (we are already assessing your skills!)



Thank you for your consideration and best of luck on your job search!



Job Responsibilities:



- Make outbound sales calls to prospective patients to introduce our physical therapy services



- Schedule appointments for patients to meet with our coaches



- Use our CRM system to track and manage customer information and appointments



- Communicate with customers via phone and
 to confirm appointments and provide additional information



- Collaborate with the marketing team to develop and implement new sales strategies



- Meet and exceed weekly and monthly sales targets and goals



Job Requirements:



- Excellent verbal communication skills



- Must be available during New York City Hours



- High school diploma or equivalent required, college degree preferred



- 3+ years of experience in outbound sales, preferably in healthcare or related field



- Proficient in using customer relationship management (CRM) software Go High Level



- Ability to work independently and as part of a team



- Strong organizational and time management skills



- Ability to multitask and handle multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment



- Availability to work flexible hours, including evenings and weekends



- Passion for helping patients and promoting wellness services

title: B2B Appointment Setter / Outbound SDR (LinkedIn + Cold Email) | SME and Accounting Firms
description:
I am the founder of Onwards Capita, a fractional CFO and finance execution firm helping SMEs improve cash visibility, working capital discipline, and short-term financial control.

I am hiring one disciplined outbound SDR / appointment setter based in the Philippines to help me generate qualified meetings.

This is not a strategy role.

This is not a closing role.

This is not a content-writing role.

I will provide:

• the target personas

• the outreach strategy

• the message scripts

• the one-pagers / sales material

• the qualification logic



Your role is to execute with discipline:

• identify the right targets

• run outbound on LinkedIn and cold

• follow up consistently

• manage replies and booking flow

• keep the CRM and tracking clean



Scope split

• 80% of your work: outreach to SME founders / decision-makers for a cash control / liquidity offer

• 20% of your work: outreach to accounting firm partners in Singapore and Malaysia for an early-stage pilot offer



What you will do

• Build and verify targeted prospect lists using LinkedIn Sales Navigator and other approved tools

• Identify decision-makers in our target markets and ICPs

• Run structured outbound sequences across:

o LinkedIn connection requests and follow-ups

o cold
 outreach and follow-ups

• Manage responses and keep communication professional, concise and accurate

• Handle basic replies using our pre-approved frameworks

• Escalate nuanced conversations to me

• Push qualified prospects to book a 10–15 minute intro call on my calendar

• Keep records clean in our CRM / tracker

• Report clearly on:

o prospects added

o touches sent

o positive replies

o meetings booked

o meetings held

o pipeline quality



Important

You will not use my personal LinkedIn account.

You will conduct LinkedIn outreach from your own professional profile and use a company
 address for cold
.



Ideal profile

You are a good fit if:

• You have real experience booking B2B meetings through LinkedIn and cold

• Your written English is strong and professional

• You are comfortable reaching out to founders, partners, recruiters, and senior decision-makers

• You know how to research and target properly instead of blasting low-quality lists

• You are organized, responsive, and reliable

• You understand CRM hygiene and follow-up discipline

• You do not need hand-holding every day

Strong advantage if you have

• Experience in B2B SaaS, financial services, consulting, accounting, or high-ticket services

• Experience prospecting Singapore, Malaysia, or US-based businesses

• Experience using LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Apollo, HubSpot, Zoho, or similar tools



Contract structure

• initial 4-week paid test engagement

• 20–25 hours/week

• If performance is strong, this will become a longer-term retainer

Compensation

• Base during 4-week trial: $400–$600/month equivalent, depending on experience, quality, and availability

• Hours: roughly 20–25 hours/week to start

• Bonus: $30 for each qualified meeting held

• Bonus: $200 for each SME client you sourced that signs and pays the first invoice

• Bonus: $30 for each qualified accounting firm partner meeting held

• Bonus: $300 when an accounting firm enters into a formal pilot contract discussion 



What success looks like

In the first 4 weeks, I expect:

• disciplined execution

• strong targeting quality

• clean tracking

• professional communication

• steady follow-up

• qualified meetings, not junk meetings



To apply

Start your application with the words: CASHCONTROL

Then include the following:

1. A short summary of your outbound experience

2. Which tools you have used: Sales Navigator, Apollo, Lemlist, Instantly, HubSpot, Zoho, etc.

3. Two examples of B2B outbound messages you personally sent that led to a booked meeting

4. Which geographies and seniority levels you have prospected before

5. Your availability over the next 4 weeks

6. Your expected monthly compensation for a 20–25 hour/week trial

Low-effort, generic applications will be ignored.

description:
About the role:

I'm a Dubai-based entrepreneur building an AI-powered content machine for my forex brand and affiliate network. I need someone who can build Claude skills and AI content tools that automate the creation of carousels, reels, ads, thumbnails, and more — at scale.



This is a technical builder role. You will be given a list of tools to build and you build them, fast.



WHAT YOU WILL BUILD:



1. Claude skills (Claude Code)

Build reusable Claude skills for: AI Reels Creator, Ads Creator, Carousel Generator, Thumbnail Creator, Stories Generator, FAN Content Creation, and more. Full list provided on Day 1.



2. AI content pipelines

Connect Claude skills to n8n workflows and scheduling tools (Postly, Later) so content is generated and posted automatically.



3. HeyGen AI avatar

Set up and configure a HeyGen AI avatar for automated video creation. Build the pipeline from script to published video.



4. Clipping Engine

Build an AI clipping and posting system that manages content distribution across 10 Instagram accounts simultaneously.



5. UGC & video automation

Build automated video creation pipelines using HeyGen, Whisper, and FFmpeg.



MUST HAVE:

- Hands-on experience with Claude Code and Claude API

- Able to write and deploy Claude skills independently

- Experience building n8n workflows

- Comfortable with APIs, webhooks, and automation pipelines

- Can deliver working tools fast — not just prototypes

- Available to start within 3 days



AUTOMATIC DISQUALIFIERS:

- Has never used Claude Code or the Anthropic API

- Only knows no-code tools — must be able to write code

- Cannot deliver working builds within the first week

- Looking for part-time only



NICE TO HAVE:

- Experience with HeyGen, Whisper, or FFmpeg

- Familiar with Instagram / TikTok content automation

- Experience in the forex or trading space

- Knows Playwright or Puppeteer for browser automation



COMPENSATION: $1000–$2000/month USD

Full-time · Long-term · Performance bonus based on builds delivered



HOW TO APPLY:

Send a WhatsApp message to: 
Start your message with: "I read the whole job post."



Then answer these 3 questions (2–4 sentences each):

1. Have you built Claude skills or used the Claude API? What did you build?

2. Describe an n8n workflow you built from scratch. What did it do?

3. What is your timezone and what hours are you available starting from Day 1?



Messages that don't follow this format will not be replied to.

title: Operations Virtual Assistant
description:
Note: Interested applicants must submit their application exclusively through the OnlineJobs platform. Do not
 the company directly. Any candidate who contacts the company outside of the OnlineJobs system will be disqualified from consideration.



Operations Virtual Assistant

(Process-Driven | High-Precision | Behind-the-Scenes Operations)



Job Overview



Maid In America Cleaning Services is hiring an Operations Virtual Assistant to protect schedule integrity, data accuracy, and operational consistency.



This is a behind-the-scenes execution role. You will not be customer-facing. You will work inside defined systems and SOPs to ensure our operational engine runs cleanly and efficiently every day.



If you enjoy structured work, moving quickly without sacrificing accuracy, and taking pride in clean execution, this role will feel natural to you.



What You’ll Do:



1. Scheduling & Job Management (Primary Responsibility)

You will own scheduling preparation and system accuracy for our TN locations.



This includes:

- Creating and modifying clients, jobs, and visits in Jobber

- Preparing future-day schedules for review and approval

- Creating training tasks in Jobber for new tea
mbers

- Re-sequencing jobs and rebalancing teams within defined guardrails

- Maintaining week-to-week schedule consistency whenever possible

- Flagging and correcting conflicts or inefficiencies early

- Executing same-day scheduling adjustments exactly as directed



2. Data Accuracy & System Integrity

You will ensure operational data is accurate, complete, and reliable.



This includes:

- Updating customer notes, job frequencies, and service details

- Invoicing customers promptly after service completion

- Calculating cost-of-service data after jobs

- Preparing timesheet and tips reports for payroll

- Logging complaints and rectified cleans accurately

- Creating and publishing weekly operational reports

- Manual KPI data entry

- Verifying work-to-labor ratios using company tools



3. Administrative Support

You will support operational structure and remove administrative friction.



This includes:

- Supporting the Assistant Operations Manager with administrative execution

- Maintaining internal trackers and shared documents

- Following established documentation and checklists consistently



What This Role Requires

- High pace with high accuracy

- Comfort with structured, repeatable tasks

- Strong attention to detail

- Clear communication when issues arise

- Strong adherence defined systems and guardrails

- Ability to work independently within clear expectations



This role involves a high volume of operational tasks that must be completed correctly and consistently. As the company grows, volume will increase — and this role grows with it.



Who We’re Looking For



Detail-Oriented & Reliable

You take pride in doing things correctly and thoroughly.



High Throughput Executor

You can handle volume without losing structure or focus.



Process-Driven

You work well inside defined systems and appreciate clear expectations.



Accountable Communicator

You flag issues early, own mistakes quickly, and ask for clarification when needed.



Tech-Comfortable

You’re comfortable using tools like Slack, Google Suite, Chrome extensions, and scheduling platforms. Experience with Jobber is a strong plus.



Experienced in Fast-Paced Admin or Scheduling

Background in administrative, dispatch, logistics, scheduling, or operations-heavy roles is

preferred.



Work Requirements

- Monday–Friday, 8AM–5PM U.S. Central Time

- Reliable internet with backup

- Dedicated workspace

- Backup power options in case of outages

- Fluent written English



Our Core Values

- Communication

- Connection

- Quality

- Service

- Teamwork



If these values resonate with you, we want to hear from you.



Important Screening Step (Read Carefully)



SERIOUS APPLICANTS ONLY:

1. Complete our Culture Index survey: 

2. Submit your application with the subject line beginning with the core value you most resonate with (ALL CAPS).

3. Use a minimum of 5 Apply Points when applying

4. In your application message, include one sentence describing the most repetitive task you have performed at a high standard for 6+ months.



Applications that do not follow all instructions will not be reviewed.

title: Google SEO & Ads Expert — Marketing Agency Fulfillment Team | Full-Time Remote
description:
Company: eFreedom — Full-service marketing agency, California, USA

Pay: $800–$1,200/month (full-time, 40 hrs/week)



The role

You are our Google person. Everything Google — for our agency and every client we bring in. SEO, Google Ads, Google Business Profile, Google Search Console, GA4. You own it all.

We are a growing agency. Right now we have a handful of clients. As we grow, you grow with us. You will manage multiple client accounts and be responsible for delivering results across all of them.

What you will do

SEO (all clients + eFreedom):



Keyword research, on-page optimization, meta tags, internal linking, schema markup

Technical SEO: site speed, Core Web Vitals, crawl issues, indexing

Off-page SEO: backlink outreach, guest posting, citation building, directory submissions

Google Business Profile setup and optimization

Content strategy and SEO blog writing or directing content writers

Monthly ranking reports and traffic analysis

WordPress — you can get in and make changes yourself



Google Ads (all clients):



Build and manage Google Search, Display, and Local Services campaigns

Keyword targeting, negative keywords, bid strategy, ad copy

Conversion tracking setup (Google Tag Manager, GA4)

Landing page optimization recommendations

Budget management and weekly reporting on spend, CPL, conversions



Requirements



2+ years hands-on SEO AND Google Ads experience

Show me real results: rankings you improved, traffic you grew, campaigns you ran with actual numbers

You know WordPress and can make on-page changes directly

You know Ahrefs, SEMrush, or similar tools

Google Search Console and GA4 are second nature to you

You can manage multiple client accounts simultaneously

Strong written English

Available during US Pacific Time hours (or 4+ hours overlap)



How to apply

Send:



Resume or portfolio

One SEO result and one Google Ads result you produced (screenshots with numbers)

Short answer: I hand you a new client website with zero SEO and a $50/day Google Ads budget. What do you do in week 1?

title: Graphic Designer for Print on Demand Van Signs
description:
We're a UK-based custom vehicle signage company producing precision-cut magnetic signs for tradespeople and small businesses. We're looking for a detail-oriented graphic designer to join our team and take ownership of the design process from brief to print-ready file.



The Role

You'll be turning small business owners branding & logos into professional, eye-catching vehicle signs. That means taking a client's logo, photos, and brand colours and composing layouts that look sharp on the side or rear of a van — all while working within exact print and cut specifications.

You'll manage multiple jobs at a time, handle client feedback rounds, and ensure every file that goes to production is technically flawless. You will have support from the customer support team to handle the revisions but you will be handling the
s and revisions back and forth with the customer. There will only be 3 revisions per order.



What You'll Be Doing

Receiving customer assets (logos, photos, brand guidelines) and composing vehicle sign layouts to specific panel dimensions for each vehicle make and model

Setting up print-ready files with correct bleed lines, safe zones, and cut paths — ensuring no text or key design elements are clipped at the edges

Reviewing client-supplied images for quality — flagging low-resolution, blurry, or unsuitable photos and requesting replacements before progressing the design

Presenting design proofs to clients, taking on board their feedback, and revising efficiently until sign-off

Troubleshooting file issues: downloading assets from various sources, converting between formats, repairing or recreating corrupted files, and ensuring everything is production-ready

Applying creative judgment to make each sign visually compelling — strong use of hierarchy, colour, spacing, and composition so the finished product stands out on the road



What We're Looking For

Strong working proficiency in Adobe Illustrator (this is your primary tool — you need to be comfortable with vector work, clipping masks, pathfinder operations, artboard management, and export settings)

Experience designing for large-format print — you understand DPI requirements, colour modes (CMYK), bleed, trim, and safe area setup

A sharp eye for image quality — you can spot a stretched, pixelated, or compression-damaged photo immediately

Comfortable working to precise dimensional constraints — every sign must match a specific vehicle panel size down to the millimetre

Good client communication skills — you can interpret vague feedback, ask the right clarifying questions, and manage revision rounds without frustration

Solid general file management and troubleshooting ability — you're the person who fixes the problem, not the person who reports it and waits

A portfolio or examples showing layout work, signage, or branded visual design (vehicle wraps, banners, shop signage, or similar are a strong plus)



Nice to Have

Experience with vehicle wraps or vehicle signage specifically

Familiarity with RIP software or print workflow tools

Experience with CMYK colours and matching these correctly

Experience working with contour cut lines / cut paths for flatbed or vinyl cutters

Basic Adobe Photoshop skills for image correction and enhancement

title: Digital Marketing Content Creator - Account Management
description:
About Us:



Jennings Social Media & MarTech (JSMM) is a globally recognized, woman-owned social media marketing and digital advertising agency. Founded in 2003, JSMM is headquartered in Overland Park, KS, with satellite offices in South Beach, FL, and Orange County, CA. Known for our innovation and excellence, we've earned numerous prestigious awards for entrepreneurship, marketing, women in business, and SEO/SEM.







Position Overview:



JSMM is seeking a talented Digital Marketing Content Creator and Account Manager to join our remote team. This part-time contractor role involves crafting compelling social media captions, images, reels, websites,
s, blogs, and more.







Key Responsibilities:



Write and edit social media posts, eblasts, and other digital content with attention to tone, style, and subject matter.

Develop and manage editorial calendars, ensuring content aligns with client goals and schedules.

Create engaging content, including social media reels and other visuals, as needed.

Collaborate with the team and clients to plan themes and updates for ongoing projects.

Manage content strategy, deadlines, and project timelines effectively.





Qualifications:



Experience: At least 5 years in social media marketing, professional freelancing, and agency account management.

Skills: Strong project management and content strategy abilities, with an excellent track record of meeting deadlines and maintaining schedules.

Education: Bachelor's degree in marketing, communications, or a related field.

Additional Requirements: Proven ability to write and copyedit independently, ensuring high-quality deliverables for clients.





What We’re Looking For:



A creative, detail-oriented professional who thrives in a fast-paced environment. You excel at managing client relationships, planning strategic content, and driving impactful campaigns that resonate with audiences.







Why JSMM?



Join a dynamic, award-winning agency that values creativity, innovation, and results. Be part of a remote-first team dedicated to helping clients achieve their digital marketing goals.

title: Systems & Automation VA (AI Workflow Support)
description:
We are looking for a capable Systems & Automation VA who is strong in workflows, AI tools, automations, SOPs, troubleshooting, and process improvement.



This is not a full coding/developer role. It is for someone who is highly comfortable with systems, tools, AI-assisted workflows, and helping businesses move fro
ssy manual work to cleaner, smarter ways of operating.



Some opportunities may be immediate. Others may be future roles as we continue to grow.



You may be a strong fit if you are confident in:



- Building and improving workflows

- Using automation tools

- Managing AI-assisted processes

- Troubleshooting systems and tools

- Documenting and improving SOPs

- Reducing manual, messy work

- Thinking in systems rather than just tasks



Useful experience

Experience with some of these is a plus:



Zapier

Make

n8n

Notion / Airtable / ClickUp / Asana

HubSpot / CRM tools

ChatGPT / Claude / AI tools

workflow tools and integrations

forms / pipelines / admin automations



This role is best suited to someone who is:



- Systems-minded and detail-oriented

- Confident with AI tools and automations

- Good at troubleshooting

- Process-driven

- Organised and clear in communication

- Comfortable implementing from instructions and refining as needed



How to register interest



Please start your reply with: Best fit - Systems & Automation



Then include:



1) A short intro

2) Your top 3 strengths for this role

3) Your availability (hours per week)

4) Your usual hourly rate in USD

5) A short answer to this question:

What makes you a strong fit for a Systems & Automation VA role?



Please also include the word structured somewhere in your reply.



Shortlisted applicants will be invited to complete a follow-up form for further consideration.

title: Creator Outreach & Partnerships Executive
description:
Department: Growth Partnerships

Reports to: Head of Brand Partnerships

Experience: 1–3 years

Type: Full-time, Remote



Role Overview

We are looking for a Creator Outreach & Partnerships Executive to actively grow our creator network across UGC, affiliate marketing, and partnership ads.



This role is highly execution-driven and requires someone who can identify, reach out to, onboard, and manage creators end-to-end — from first message to finalized collaboration and content delivery.

The ideal candidate understands what makes a high-quality creator profile, is confident in manual outreach and negotiations, and can consistently bring in creators that drive business results.



Key Responsibilities



Creator Outreach & Sourcing

Identify and source relevant creators across platforms (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, etc.)

Conduct daily manual outreach via DMs,
, and other channels

Build and maintain a strong pipeline of potential creators

Creator Evaluation

Assess creator profiles based on:

Content quality and style

Audience relevance and engagement

Brand fit and past collaborations

Shortlist creators aligned with campaign and business goals

Onboarding & Relationship Management

Onboard new creators for:

UGC content creation

Affiliate programs

Partnership ads collaborations

Build and maintain strong relationships with creators

Act as the main point of contact throughout collaborations



Negotiation & Deal Closure



Negotiate deliverables, timelines, and compensation with creators

Finalize collaboration terms in alignment with internal guidelines

Ensure agreements are clearly communicated and documented

Contracting & Coordination

Coordinate contract finalization with internal teams

Ensure all agreements are signed before work begins

Align creators on deliverables, timelines, and expectations

UGC Content Acquisition

Ensure timely delivery of UGC content from creators

Follow up consistently to avoid delays

Coordinate with internal teams for content approvals and usage



Tracking & Reporting



Maintain outreach and creator trackers (status, responses, conversions)

Track onboarding, active creators, and content delivery

Report weekly on outreach performance and pipeline health



Requirements & Skills



1–3 years of experience in creator outreach, influencer marketing, or partnerships

Proven experience in manual outreach and creator communication

Strong understanding of UGC, affiliate marketing, and creator collaborations

Experience in negotiating with creators and closing collaborations

Ability to identify high-quality creator profiles aligned with brand goals

Strong communication and persuasion skills

Highly organized with strong follow-up and tracking ability



Key Traits for Success



Consistent and disciplined in daily outreach

Results-driven (focus on conversions, not just conversations)

Confident communicator and negotiator

Strong ownership and accountability

Ability to manage multiple creators simultaneously



Nice to Have



Experience working with DTC / skincare/beauty e-commerce brands

Familiarity with performance marketing or paid ads (Meta, etc.)

Experience using outreach trackers or CRM tools



What Success Looks Like



Consistent onboarding of high-quality creators

Maintaining long-term relationships with creators

Strong pipeline of active and responsive creators 

Timely delivery of UGC content

Effective conversion from outreach ? onboarding ? content/live campaigns

title: Patient Care Coordinator
description:
We are looking for a highly motivated and experienced Remote Patient Services Representative based in the Philippines. The ideal candidate will manage inbound and outbound calls, assist patients with scheduling appointments, address inquiries, and perform other related tasks to ensure a seamless patient experience.



Key Responsibilities:

• Answer incoming calls promptly and professionally.

• Schedule, reschedule, and confirm patient appointments using our electronic health record (EHR) system.

• Provide accurate information regarding services, insurance, and payment options.

• Address patient inquiries and concerns with empathy and efficiency.

• Maintain and update patient records with a high degree of accuracy.

• Collaborate with the optometry team to ensure optimal patient care.



Performance Metrics:

To ensure excellence in patient service, the following performance metrics will be used to evaluate success in this role:

• Average Handle Time (AHT): The average duration of a patient interaction, including talk time, hold time, and after-call work. Efficiently managing AHT ensures timely assistance to patients while maintaining service quality. ?

• Quality Score: Assessment of call quality based on adherence to protocols, accuracy of information provided, and overall patient interaction effectiveness. High-quality scores reflect a commitment to excellence in patient care.

• Patient Satisfaction Score: A measure of patient contentment with the service provided, often gathered through post-interaction surveys. High scores indicate successful patient engagement and issue resolution.

• Service Level: The percentage of calls answered within a specified timeframe, reflecting the ability to meet patient demand promptly. Maintaining a high service level ensures patient satisfaction and loyalty. ?

• Appointment Scheduling Rate: The efficiency and accuracy in scheduling patient appointments, ensuring optimal utilization of clinic time and resources.



Qualifications:

• Proven experience in a customer service role, preferably in a medical or optometry setting.

• Exceptional verbal and written English communication skills.

• Familiarity with EHR systems and medical scheduling software is a plus.

• Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.

• Ability to work independently and manage time effectively.

• Stable internet connection and a quiet workspace conducive to professional phone conversations.



Work Schedule:

• Full-time position.

• Must be available to work U.S. business hours, including potential evening shifts to accommodate different time zones.



To Qualify, please complete the Assessment below:



1. Application form: wkf.ms/45nfpCJ

2. Complete this assessment: 
/link/index/JB-BYUGHNDRC?u=

title: Patient Care Coordinator
description:
Job Title: Bookkeeper (US-Based Operations)



We are seeking a sharp, proactive, and highly experienced Bookkeeper to take full ownership of our financial records. This isn't just a data entry role; we need a "numbers architect" who catches what others miss, operates with total autonomy, and treats our ledger like a high-stakes puzzle they are determined to solve.



If you are a QuickBooks expert who thrives in a fast-paced environment and prides yourself on presenting insights before they are even requested, you’re exactly who we’re looking for.



Key Responsibilities



Full-Cycle Bookkeeping: Complete oversight of QuickBooks, including sophisticated AP/AR management, complex journal entries, and meticulous ledger maintenance.

Proactive Reporting: Prepare and present monthly P&L, Balance Sheets, and Cash Flow statements with executive-level clarity.

Process Optimization: Audit current workflows to identify "bottlenecks" and implement streamlined, automated processes for maximum efficiency.

Advanced Reconciliation: Handle high-volume bank and credit card reconciliations with 100?curacy, investigating and resolving discrepancies independently.

US Compliance: Manage financial records in accordance with US standards, ensuring readiness for year-end tax preparation and audits.

Platform Integration: Quickly master and integrate secondary platforms (payroll, time-tracking, or inventory) with QuickBooks.



What We’re Looking For:



Experience: Proven track record (3+ years preferred) as a Bookkeeper or Accountant, specifically working with US-based companies.

QuickBooks Expert: You are a power user. You know the shortcuts, the advanced reporting features, and how to troubleshoot the software's quirks.

High Autonomy: You don't need a task list. You see what needs to be done, you do it, and you report the results.

Analytical Mindset: You don’t just move numbers; you understand what they mean for the business and can explain "the why" to leadership.



Tech-Agile: You learn new software at lightning speed and are always looking for tools to make bookkeeping faster and more accurate.



To Qualify – Complete the Assessment and Application Form:

1. Assessment: 
/o/JB-E0PIHSF1P/landing?u=
. Application Form: wkf.ms/45nfpCJ



Note: Both the assessment and the application form must be completed to be considered for this role.

• Service Level: The percentage of calls answered within a specified timeframe, reflecting the ability to meet patient demand promptly. Maintaining a high service level ensures patient satisfaction and loyalty. ?

• Appointment Scheduling Rate: The efficiency and accuracy in scheduling patient appointments, ensuring optimal utilization of clinic time and resources.



Qualifications:

• Proven experience in a customer service role, preferably in a medical or optometry setting.

• Exceptional verbal and written English communication skills.

• Familiarity with EHR systems and medical scheduling software is a plus.

• Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.

• Ability to work independently and manage time effectively.

• Stable internet connection and a quiet workspace conducive to professional phone conversations.



Work Schedule:

title: Electrical Engineer - Solar & Battery Systems (Remote)
description:
Please follow the application instructions below.



About PropFix.ie



PropFix.ie is Ireland's trusted property maintenance specialist, offering comprehensive solutions with years of expertise across the construction and renovation sectors. We transform spaces through our diverse range of services, from handyman solutions and office fit-outs to complete renovations, house extensions, and specialized installations including doors, floors, and partitions.



Our commitment to delivering high-quality property maintenance and electrical solutions has made us a trusted partner for residential, commercial, and industrial clients nationwide. With decades of experience in electrical systems, installations, and maintenance, we take pride in our technical expertise and craftsmanship—ensuring our clients’ properties remain safe, efficient, and fully compliant with modern standards.



Role Overview



We are seeking a skilled and detail-oriented Electrical Engineer to join our team. This role involves electrical design, project coordination, system analysis, and technical documentation. The successful candidate will work closely with project managers, site teams, and clients to ensure accurate planning, safe installations, and seamless execution of all electrical works—from concept design to project completion.



Key Responsibilities

Electrical Engineering & Design



Electrical System Design: Develop, review, and interpret electrical plans, schematics, and load calculations.

Technical Specifications: Prepare detailed specifications, diagrams, SLDs (single-line diagrams), and layout drawings.

Material & Equipment Selection: Determine appropriate electrical components, materials, and equipment required for projects.

Compliance & Standards: Ensure designs meet electrical codes, safety standards, and regulatory requirements.



Project Coordination & Client Management



Site Coordination: Work with contractors, site engineers, and electricians to ensure proper installation and site execution.

Client Communication: Liaise with clients to clarify requirements, provide technical updates, and explain engineering decisions.

Documentation: Prepare project reports, progress updates, testing results, QA/QC records, and risk assessments.

Change Management: Document revisions to electrical plans and update load calculations, cost impacts, and schedules accordingly.



Testing, Maintenance & Quality Control



System Testing: Perform testing, commissioning, and troubleshooting of electrical systems and equipment.

Preventive Maintenance: Evaluate system performance and recommend maintenance schedules or upgrades.

Safety Compliance: Ensure all electrical work follows safety protocols, lock-out/tag-out procedures, and hazard assessments.



Financial Administration & Office Support



Cost Estimation: Prepare electrical cost estimates, material take-offs, and assist in budget planning.

Invoice & Documentation: Support invoicing, procurement coordination, and inventory updates for electrical materials.

Technical Records: Maintain accurate documentation, permits, and electrical certification records.



Required Skills & Experience

Technical Requirements



Electrical Engineering: Proven experience in electrical design, installation supervision, testing, and commissioning.

Codes & Standards: Strong understanding of local electrical codes, NEC/IEC standards, and safety regulations.

Technical Proficiency: Skilled in electrical drafting tools (AutoCAD, Revit MEP, or similar) and testing instruments.

Project Knowledge: Familiarity with construction processes, electrical layouts, and engineering documentation.



Professional Skills



Analytical Ability: Strong problem-solving and technical analysis skills.

Communication: Excellent verbal and written communication for client and contractor coordination.

Organization: Ability to handle multiple projects, documentation, and scheduling tasks efficiently.

Adaptability: Capable of managing both office-based work and technical project duties.



What We Offer



Competitive compensation package

Opportunities to work with clients across Ireland and the UK

Professional development and training programs

Collaborative and supportive remote work environment

Clear career advancement pathways

Exposure to diverse engineering and construction projects

Flexible remote working systems with comprehensive support



Application instructions

Please complete the attached application form and submit it along with your CV:

title: Senior Software QA Tester (US - Remote)
description:
About Entvas Technology

Entvas Technology is a custom software development and technology consulting company specializing in building AI-ready, end-to-end business systems. We help companies transition from scattered, disconnected tools to unified custom platforms that streamline operations using AWS cloud infrastructure.

We work on complex, mission-critical systems that run entire businesses - from CRM and ERP integration to inventory management, compliance tracking, and financial systems.



The Role

We're looking for a Senior Software QA Tester who can ensure the quality and reliability of our custom business applications. You'll be responsible for creating comprehensive test strategies, implementing automated testing frameworks, and maintaining high quality standards across multiple complex projects.

This is a critical role as we scale our development operations and deliver faster without compromising quality.



What You'll Do



* Design and implement automated test frameworks for web applications and APIs

* Create and execute comprehensive test plans for complex, end-to-end business systems

* Build and maintain automated test suites using modern testing tools and frameworks

* Perform API testing to ensure backend services are reliable and performant

* Identify, document, and track bugs through resolution with clear reproduction steps

* Work closely with developers to understand features and provide quality feedback early

* Establish QA best practices and testing standards across the team

* Participate in sprint planning and provide testing estimates

* Ensure regression testing is performed before every release



Required Qualifications / Experience & Skills



* 5+ years of software QA/testing experience in a professional environment

* Strong expertise in test automation for web applications (Selenium, Cypress, Playwright, or similar)

* Proven experience with API testing (Postman, REST Assured, or similar tools)

* Proficiency in at least one programming language (Python, JavaScript, or Java preferred)

* Experience testing complex business applications with multiple integrated systems

* Strong understanding of software development lifecycle and agile methodologies

* Excellent bug documentation skills with attention to detail

* Experience with test management tools (Jira, TestRail, or similar)



Nice to Have



* Experience with CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, Jenkins, GitLab CI)

* Knowledge of AWS cloud services and testing cloud-based applications

* Experience with performance testing or load testing tools

* Familiarity with SQL and database testing

* Experience testing AI-powered applications or integrations

* Background in testing enterprise SaaS platforms



What Makes You a Great Fit



* You have a quality-first mindset and take pride in catching issues before they reach production

* You're proactive and self-motivated - you don't wait to be told what to test

* You can think like an end user and anticipate real-world usage scenarios

* You're detail-oriented but also understand the bigger picture and business impact

* You communicate clearly with technical and non-technical tea
mbers

* You're comfortable working independently in a remote environment

* You stay current with testing tools and methodologies



Working with Us



* Fully remote - work from anywhere in the Philippines

* Flexible schedule with core overlap hours for team collaboration

* Work on meaningful projects that directly impact real businesses

* Small, experienced team where your contributions make a visible difference

* Opportunity to establish QA standards and shape testing practices

* Continuous learning - we support your professional development

* Long-term contractor relationship with consistent work



Compensation

Competitive contractor rates based on experience and qualifications. We value expertise and are willing to pay for quality talent.



How to Apply



Please submit:



* Your resume/CV highlighting relevant QA experience

* A brief cover letter (3-5 sentences) explaining:

* Your experience with test automation

* The most complex system you've tested

* Why you're interested in this role

* Links to any relevant work (GitHub repos with test code, portfolios, etc.) if available

* Applications without a cover letter will not be considered.



Interview Process



* Application Review (2-3 days)

* Initial Video Interview (30 min) - get to know you, discuss experience

* Technical Assessment (take-home, ~2-3 hours) - practical testing scenario

* Final Interview (45 min) - discuss technical assessment, team fit, logistics

* Offer (same day if mutual fit)



We move quickly for the right candidate. Total process: 1-2 weeks.

title: Senior Full Stack Developer - 10+ years of experience
description:
We're looking for a Senior Full Stack Developer who's passionate about building exceptional web applications and solving real-world problems for growing businesses. This is your chance to be part of a fast-moving team that values technical excellence, collaboration, and making an impact.



If you're highly skilled in React, Next.js, Nest.js, and Node.js, hold an AWS certification, and are comfortable working US business hours, we'd love to meet you.



Key Responsibilities



Lead the design, development, and deployment of high-performance web applications on AWS infrastructure.

Work across the stack using React, Next.js, Nest.js, and Node.js to build scalable, maintainable features.

Collaborate with product managers, designers, and fellow engineers to ship high-quality solutions.

Own development cycles from concept to deployment—including testing, documentation, and performance optimization.

Implement and maintain robust, well-tested APIs and backend services.

Contribute to architectural decisions and help mentor junior developers as needed.



Requirements



Minimum of 10+ years of hands-on experience as a Full Stack Developer.

Active AWS Certification required (Cloud Practitioner or any foundational-level certification at minimum). Candidates are expected to pursue Associate or Professional-level certifications after joining.

Hands-on experience with AWS services (e.g., Lambda, S3, API Gateway, EC2) in production environments.

Expertise with React, Next.js, Nest.js, and Node.js in production environments.

Proficiency with REST APIs, modern JavaScript/TypeScript, and async programming.

Strong experience with Git and collaborative workflows (e.g., GitHub, GitLab).

Excellent debugging, optimization, and problem-solving skills.

Clear written and verbal communication.

Availability to work full-time during US business hours.



Preferred Qualifications



AWS Associate or Professional-level certification (Solutions Architect, Developer, or DevOps Engineer).

Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines, DevOps practices, and infrastructure as code.

Experience with serverless architectures and performance-focused applications.



What We Offer



Competitive compensation (DOE).

Flexible, remote-friendly role aligned with US time zones.

Opportunities for continuous learning, mentorship, and career growth—including support for AWS certification advancement.

A supportive, collaborative team culture that values quality and innovation.

The chance to work on meaningful projects that drive real business value.



If you're a seasoned developer ready to take ownership and grow with a team that values your expertise—apply now and let's build something great together.

title: Looking for a WordPress & Elementor Expert (SEO + Web Development)
description:
We're looking for a skilled WordPress developer to join our team on an ongoing basis. This is a hands-on role that covers both building websites from scratch and optimizing existing ones for SEO and performance.



What you'll be doing:



Building new WordPress websites from the ground up using Elementor - from initial setup to a fully functional, polished site. On the SEO and optimization side, you'll work on improving site structure, speed, and technical performance, and you'll use plugins like Yoast and Rank Math to push rankings higher.



What we're looking for:



Strong WordPress and Elementor skills, solid SEO knowledge, experience with site speed optimization, and the ability to work independently and take ownership of projects. Fluent English (spoken and written) is a must.



If you enjoy building clean, fast, well-ranked websites and want to be part of a growing team - we'd love to hear from you!

title: Creative Strategist
description:
Creative Strategist & Ad Producer — Video + Static (10 Videos/Week)

I'm looking for a high-output creative strategist who can think AND execute. This isn't a "post ideas in a doc" role — I need someone who understands direct-response advertising from the ground up and can produce ready-to-ship creatives every week.

What you'll do:



Produce 10 video ad scripts/week (with hooks, structure, CTA) across formats (UGC-style, VSL, talking head, b-roll driven)

Deliver static ad concepts alongside video output (copy + visual direction)

Build creatives rooted in deep avatar understanding — not generic messaging

Analyze what's working, iterate fast, and bring fresh angles weekly



You must have:



Proven experience in performance/direct-response advertising (Meta, TikTok)

Real avatar research skills — you know how to extract VOC, identify pain points, and match awareness levels

Strong copywriting instincts (hooks, body, CTA)

Experience across niches like health, supplements, fashion, or physical products is a major plus

Portfolio of video ad scripts or produced ads you've worked on



Nice to have:



Familiarity with UGC workflows and briefing creators

Ability to classify and organize ad creative libraries



How we work:

Fast feedback loops, weekly batches, direct communication. I'm not micromanaging — I expect you to own your creative output and bring ideas to the table proactively.

title: Senior Customer Support Representative (Shapewear Brand)
description:
Hi! We’re a fast-growing shapewear brand looking for a Senior Customer Support Representative who can take ownership of our customer experience and help support our operations.



This is not an entry-level role. We’re looking for someone reliable, proactive, and detail-oriented who can think ahead and solve problems without constant supervision.



What you’ll be doing:



• Handle high volumes of customer inquiries daily:

o Respond to
s about order status, changes (size/address), returns, refunds, and exchanges



• Work closely with our fulfillment team:

o Follow up on shipment delays

o Resolve delivery issues

o Handle lost or damaged parcels



• Maintain internal operations:

o Maintain trackers and records

o Monitor and flag remote area surcharges

o Track delivery performance and help prepare weekly reports (delays, issues, trends)



• Work alongside our Junior Customer Support tea
mber:

o Help guide and support daily tasks when needed



What we’re looking for:



• Strong experience in e-commerce customer support

• Excellent written English with a professional and empathetic tone

• Highly organized and detail-oriented

• Proactive and able to identify issues before they escalate

• Comfortable working independently and taking ownership

• Experience with Shopify, Google Sheets, and support tools is a strong plus



Work setup:



• Remote

• Full-time

• Flexible working hours (as long as work is completed and coverage is maintained)





To apply, please send your resume and complete the test task below. Applications without the test task will not be reviewed.



Test Task (required):



Write a reply to this customer:



“Hi, I received my order today but it doesn’t fit at all. I followed your size chart but it’s way too small. I’m really frustrated and want a refund.”



Your reply should:

• Be professional and empathetic

• Align with a final sale policy (no refunds)

• Offer a solution that still keeps the customer satisfied

• Be written as if you are representing a brand



Important:

At the very top of your application, include the word “SHAPEWEAR” so we know you read everything.



We look forward to reviewing your application.
