title: Senior UI/UX Designer (Custom Web + Mobile Apps)  US Remote
description:
** PLEASE READ THIS JOB DESCRIPTION TO THE END.   IF YOU DO NOT FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS, WE WILL NOT CONSIDER YOUR APPLICATION.



About the Role



We’re looking for a senior UI/UX designer who crafts distinctive, non-template websites and polished mobile app experiences. You’ll lead projects end-to-end—from discovery and UX strategy to high-fidelity UI, motion specs, and developer handoff—building design systems that feel truly bespoke while shipping fast with engineering.



What You’ll Do

 •Own the product & brand experience: Turn vague goals into sharp briefs, user journeys, sitemaps, and information architecture. Establish a unique visual language (layout, typography, color, art direction) that does not read like a theme.

 •Design custom marketing & product websites: Responsive layouts across breakpoints, performance-minded components, empty/loading/error/zero states, and conversion-focused flows.

 •Design mobile apps (iOS & Android): Define navigation models, key flows, platform-native patterns, and micro-interactions; deliver tappable prototypes for usability tests.

 •Ship scalable design systems: Tokens, components, variants, grid systems, and accessibility-first patterns (WCAG 2.2 AA). Maintain a living library in Figma.

 •Prototype & spec motion: Create interaction prototypes (Figma prototyping/Framer/ProtoPie), motion guidelines, and Lottie-ready animations where useful.

 •Test & iterate with data: Plan quick studies, run usability tests, and partner on analytics to move metrics (task completion, funnel conversion, retention).

 •Partner tightly with engineering: Map designs to React/Next.js or React Native components, provide redlines and Dev Mode annotations, review staging, and resolve edge cases.





What You’ve Done



 • 5+ years designing custom, non-template websites with shipped examples that show original art direction.

 • 2+ years designing mobile apps (shipped to App Store/Play or robust prototypes).

 • Deep mastery of Figma (Auto Layout, components/variants, constraints, styles/tokens, Dev Mode).

 • Strong command of typography, grids, composition, and color; you can explain your decisions clearly.

 • Solid UX research & strategy skills (journey mapping, heuristic evals, JTBD thinking) and accessibility know-how.

 • Practical understanding of web fundamentals (responsive behavior, image optimization, Core Web Vitals) and dev handoff (design tokens, Storybook mapping, Tailwind-friendly specs).

 • Excellent written UX copy for microcopy, labels, and in-product messaging (bonus).



Nice to Have

 • E-commerce flows (checkout, PDPs, bundles), CMS-driven sites, dashboards/B2B SaaS.

 • Motion design (After Effects/Lottie), illustration/icon systems.

 • Experience with AI/LLM UX patterns, localization, and design for performance.





Portfolio Requirements (must include links)

 1. 3–5 custom websites (no themes)—describe your role, constraints, and the specific choices that make each feel bespoke.

 2. 2 mobile apps (store/TestFlight/Play links or prototypes).

 3. 1 process case study showing discovery ? iterations ? results (include metrics or qualitative impact).





How We Work

 • Weekly design reviews, async updates, and close PM/dev collaboration.

 • Tools: Figma/FigJam, Framer or ProtoPie, Notion, Linear/Jira, Slack, Loom.

 • We ship in focused design sprints with quick validation loops.





What Success Looks Like (90 Days)

 • 30 days: Audit current brand/product, ship a bespoke homepage concept + mobile nav pattern, establish initial tokens/components.

 • 60 days: Launch a custom web experience (one core flow) and a tappable mobile prototype; document the design system v1.

 • 90 days: Improve a key metric (e.g., +15–25% on a target conversion or task success) through iterations and validated UX changes.





Application



Reply to the job post with subject line:

“Senior UI/UX Designer — [Your Name]”

Include:

 • 3 bullet points on how you avoid “template look” on the web.

 • 1 mobile pattern trade-off you recently made (and why).

 • Your comp expectations, preferred engagement type (FT/contract), and timezone.



* If you do not follow this format, we will not consider your application.





Short, Paid Design Exercise (final stage)

 • Brief: Redesign the above-the-fold of a local e-commerce homepage (desktop + one mobile breakpoint) to look unmistakably custom.

 • Deliverables (within 48 hours): Figma file with grid, type scale, components, and a 1-page rationale for decisions (art direction, motion opportunities, performance & accessibility notes).

description:
Cold Caller / Appointment Setter – Real Estate

title: Real Estate Virtual Assistant (REVA)
description:
We are looking for a highly organized and proactive Real Estate Virtual Assistant (REVA) to support our growing real estate operations. The ideal candidate should have 1–2 years of proven experience as a real estate VA, excellent communication skills, and the ability to manage lead follow-ups, CRM systems, and digital interactions effectively.



TO APPLY: Please include your resume link and portfolio link. Only candidates with real estate VA experience will be considered.



Key Responsibilities:



Manage and respond to incoming leads promptly and professionally.

Handle direct messages (DMs) across platforms including
, Instagram, LinkedIn, etc.

Maintain community engagement and consistently interact with potential clients.

Manage and update CRM systems such as Follow Up Boss, Go High Level, KVCore, and Trello.

Input new contacts and ensure proper lead management and follow-ups.

Create and maintain an organized CRM system for tracking prospects, contracts, and client communication.

Support social media and digital marketing efforts, including managing inquiries and routing qualified leads.

Assist with graphics, website updates, and social media management (SMM) tasks as needed.

Learn and adapt quickly to new tools, workflows, and real estate systems.



Requirements:



1–2 years of experience as a Real Estate Virtual Assistant or in a similar role.

Strong working knowledge of KVCore, Follow Up Boss, and/or Go High Level (preferred).

Experience managing multiple platforms and responding to messages efficiently.

Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English.

Highly organized, detail-oriented, and quick to learn new systems and processes.

Able to work night shift (PST hours) and available to start immediately.

Must have a reliable device, stable internet connection, and home office setup.

Experience with contracts, basic graphics, website management, and SMM is preferred.

Part time potential to full time after few weeks



TO APPLY: Please include your resume link. Only candidates with real estate VA experience will be considered.

title: Outbound Sales Assistant (Remote)
description:
Maintain Customers. Drive Results. Close Deals.



We’re looking for a motivated and communicative Sales Representative to support our sales process and help turn leads into long-term customers. If you enjoy talking to people, following up with prospects, and working toward clear goals - this role is for you.



As part of our sales team, you’ll be responsible for reaching out to potential clients, maintaining long term customers, and supporting the sales pipeline.



What You’ll Do:

-Contact and follow up with leads via
 or chat.

-Qualify prospects and identify sales opportunities

-Support the sales process from first contact to closing

-Update customer information and track interactions

-Work closely with the team to meet sales targets



Requirements:

Excellent written English communication skills

Confident, friendly, and persuasive communication style

Basic understanding of sales or lead generation

Organized and goal-oriented

Reliable internet connection and availability



If you enjoy sales and turning conversations into opportunities, we’d love to hear from you!

title: Social Media Manager/Admin Real Estate (WFH)
description:
Social Media Manager – Real Estate



Remote | Night Shift (PST)



We are looking for a creative and proactive Social Media Manager with experience in the real estate industry to handle content creation, posting, engagement, and basic website management for our brand. This role is ideal for someone who understands real estate marketing, is skilled in social media strategy, basic video editing, and can support light personal assistant and website-related tasks when needed.



To apply, please attach your resume link and portfolio link.



Key Responsibilities:



-Manage and grow social media accounts across
, Instagram, TikTok, and LinkedIn

-Create, schedule, and publish engaging content, including graphics, reels, and short-form videos

-Edit videos for social platforms using tools such as CapCut, InShot, or similar

-Respond to comments and direct messages to build and maintain community engagement

-Coordinate with the team to align content with marketing and branding needs

-Monitor analytics and prepare reports to improve engagement and lead generation

-Stay updated on social media trends and real estate marketing best practices

-Research property details using Zillow for content creation and posting

-Support basic tasks using CRM and project management tools such as GoHighLevel, Follow Up Boss, and Trello (preferred)

-Assist with basic website management.



To apply, please attach your resume link and portfolio link.



Requirements:



At least 1 year of experience in social media management

Experience with basic website management (e.g., updating content, posting blogs or listings)

Proficient in Canva and video editing tools (CapCut, InShot, or similar)

Basic understanding of the real estate industry and property marketing

Familiarity with CRM tools and project management platforms

Strong organizational and time-management skills

Must be available to work night shift (PST hours)

Reliable device and stable internet connection

title: Senior Appointment Setter – Work From Home | US Account
description:
Apply Here:

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Job Type: Full-Time | Permanent

Schedule: Night Shift (US Business Hours)

Industry: Website Services / Digital Marketing



About the Role



We are hiring a Full-Time Appointment Setter / Lead Generation Specialist to make outbound calls to small business owners in the United States and Canada.



This is a permanent work-from-home position — not a short-term campaign or seasonal contract.



You will work with a fast-growing website company that has:



110+ full-time tea
mbers



30%+ annual company growth for 8 consecutive years



2,000+ verified 5-star reviews



100% of managers promoted internally



If you are experienced in cold calling, outbound sales, lead generation, or appointment setting, this role is for you.

Make outbound cold calls to small business owners (US account)



Introduce website and digital services



Qualify leads and schedule appointments



Answer inbound calls when needed

Salary & Benefits



Php 6,350 base pay per week



Night differential (Total: approx. Php 7,000/week)



Weekly performance incentives



Monthly attendance bonus



Monthly technology allowance

Stable long-term employment

Cold Calling



Lead Generation



Outbound Sales



BPO (US account preferred)



Strong objection-handling skills

Team player with professional attitude

Stable, growing US-based company



No campaign-based contracts



Clear path for promotion



Supportive team culture

title: Process Support Executive
description:
APPLICANTS WITHOUT RELEVANT EXPERIENCE WILL NOT BE ANSWERED!!! IMPORTANT: WE ARE ONLY CONSIDERING APPLICANTS WHO HAVE WORKED DIRECTLY WITH FIELD-SERVICE OR TRADE-BASED COMPANIES



• HVAC contractors

• Plumbing companies

• Electrical service providers

• Property or facility maintenance companies

• Residential or commercial trade businesses

• Energy installation or technical service companies

• Other similar service-driven operations



If your background is not within these types of businesses, your application will not move forward.





About the Role

We are hiring a reliable and detail-oriented Process Support Executive to help manage and maintain our internal systems and documentation.



This is a backend operations role focused on keeping workflows structured, paperwork accurate, and processes running smoothly. There may be occasional light customer-facing tasks, but the primary focus is administrative and operational support.



If you thrive in organized environments and enjoy structured, process-based work — you’ll do well here.



Key Responsibilities

• Process warranty registrations for HVAC and related equipment

• Submit rebate documentation for energy-efficient installations

• Maintain organized digital records and internal tracking systems

• Assist leadership in refining and improving workflows

• Draft and schedule social media posts

• Prepare and send invoices once services or installations are completed

• Provide basic administrative customer assistance when necessary



Qualifications We Require

• Strong English communication skills (written and verbal)  (REQUIRED)

• Direct experience supporting a field-service or trade-based business (REQUIRED)

• Previous experience as a Virtual Assistant, Admin Assistant, or Operations Support (REQUIRED)

• Familiarity with permits, compliance paperwork, rebates, or service-related documentation (PLUS)

• High level of accuracy and attention to detail

• Strong organizational skills and ability to handle multiple responsibilities

• Comfortable learning and adapting to new systems quickly



Work Arrangement

• Full-time remote position

• 8 hours per day

• 5 days per week





Application Instructions

To be considered:

1. Use PROCESS as the subject line of your

2. Include a short introduction about your experience

3. Provide a working link to your CV or resume



***Applications without an accessible CV/resume link will not be reviewed.***

title: Real Estate Virtual Assistant (REVA)
description:
This is Remote | Night Shift (U.S. Timezone)



Looking for an experienced Real Estate Virtual Assistant (REVA) to support U.S.-based agents and teams. You will handle listing management, CRM updates, transaction coordination, marketing, and admin tasks.



Requirements:



1-2 + years of prior experience as a REVA supporting U.S. Clients

Familiar with MLS, CRMs (Follow Up Boss, GoHighLevel, Podio, etc.), and transaction workflows

Highly organized, proactive, and able to work independently

Strong communication and time-management skills



Responsibilities:



Upload and manage property listings in MLS

Track leads, manage pipelines, and maintain CRM records

Assist with document preparation, contracts, and deadlines

Create marketing materials and post listings on real estate platforms



If you meet the above requirements, please apply here:

title: Performance Video Editor for Meta Ads — Repurpose & Scale Winning Creatives (Massage Device Brand)
description:
Estimated Duration: 1–2 months (potential for ongoing work)

Workload: 10 base videos ? Multiple variations from 2–3 winning creatives

Start Date: Immediate



About the Project



We’re a fast-growing e-commerce massage & muscle recovery device brand scaling aggressively on Meta 
 & Instagram).



We currently have 2–3 proven winning creatives and 10 base videos that need to be strategically repurposed into high-performing variations to scale campaigns and fight ad fatigue.



We are looking for a performance-driven video editor who understands direct-response marketing — not just editing for aesthetics, but editing for conversions.



You will receive clear creative direction, winning examples, and structured angles. Your role is to transform them into multiple high-ROAS variations optimized for paid media testing.



This is strategic ad iteration — not general content editing.



Responsibilities



• Repurpose 10 base videos into multiple performance-driven variations

• Create new hooks from existing winning creatives

• Maintain proven structure while refreshing pacing and visual flow

• Update calls-to-action, hooks, and text overlays to improve conversions

• Adjust music, color grading, transitions, and pacing to test new angles

• Add captions, graphic overlays, motion elements, and pattern interrupts

• Optimize formats for Meta placements (Feed, Reels, Stories)

• Create A/B testing variants to help scale ad performance

• Deliver ad-ready creatives optimized for paid media campaigns



What We’re Looking For



• Experience in direct-response and performance marketing

• Proven background editing Meta or TikTok ads for e-commerce brands

• Strong understanding of hooks, retention, thumb-stop rate, and ROAS

• Skilled in Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, or DaVinci Resolve

• Ability to work independently with clear direction

• Fast turnaround and strong communication



Nice-to-Have Skills



• Experience with UGC-style ad editing

• Motion graphics or light animation skills

• Understanding of performance metrics (CTR, hook rate, retention, ROAS)

• Experience in health, fitness, or recovery niches



Compensation will be based on:

• Experience

• Quality of output

• Speed of delivery



Additional batches will be assigned upon successful completion and approval.



When Applying, Please Include:



Your fixed price for creating variations from 10 base videos



Portfolio or links to Meta ad / e-commerce ad work



Your turnaround time



Confirmation of availability for the next 1–2 months



We’re looking for a long-term performance editor who understands how to scale winning ads — not just make them look good.

title: Executive Assistant (Operations | Real Estate | Night Shift)
description:
AP Required to Apply: 10+ Points (the more points you have, the more serious we know you are. Anything less than 10 AP will be archived)



This is not a traditional Executive Assistant role.



This is a high leverage role supporting a fast-moving real estate CEO who values precision, ownership, and speed.



If you need hand-holding, constant reassurance, or loose expectations—this is not for you.



This role is best suited for someone who prefers structure, ownership, and high standards over comfort or flexibility.



If you take pride in anticipating needs, protecting time, and executing cleanly—keep reading.



-



Location: Remote / Virtual

Schedule (PHT): Tuesday–Saturday | Start Time 09:30 PM (1-hour unpaid break)

Schedule (CST): Monday–Friday | Start Time 8:30 AM (1-hour unpaid break)

Compensation: Starts at ~$9.50/hour USD (based on experience and performance)

Type: Full-Time Salary includes 13th month pay (prorated) 



-



About ZenHomes



ZenHomes is a lean, high-performing real estate company based in Texas. We acquire off-market properties, manage rentals, and operate with clarity, accountability, and systems.



We run a small, trusted team across the U.S. and the Philippines. We don’t do busywork. We don’t micromanage. We care about outcomes.



-



About This Role (Read Carefully)



This is a high-expectation Executive Assistant role supporting the CEO directly.



Even though the position is remote, expectations are real from Day 1: speed, accuracy, follow-through, and emotional maturity.



This role exists to:

 • Buy back the CEO’s time immediately 

 • Reduce noise, errors, and dropped details

 • Execute quickly within clear guidelines

 • Improve rapidly through direct feedback



Feedback here is direct and timely because standards are high. The goal is improvement, not perfection—but repeated mistakes signal misalignment.



If something is unclear, elite operators pause and ask first. Once clarified, execution must be fast and precise.



Autonomy is earned quickly through judgment, correction speed, and consistency.



-



What You’ll Own



Immediate Responsibilities (Day 1 Standard)



Calendar & Time Protection

 • Own and manage the CEO’s calendar daily +1 week out

 • Book, reschedule, and confirm events/meetings

 • Enforce calendar rules with discipline

 • Prepare daily sync agenda's and context so nothing is reactive



Communication & Coordination

 • Triage incoming messages and requests

 • Draft clear, professional responses in the CEO’s voice

 • Flag decisions cleanly with relevant context

 • Coordinate logistics, scheduling, reminders, and next steps



Task Tracking & Execution

 • Track tasks and open loops in Asana

 • Ensure nothing drops, stalls, or surprises the CEO

 • Prepare before asking questions

 • Execute once aligned—fast and clean



-



Earned Responsibilities (After Trust Is Demonstrated)

 • Handle tenant, guest, and vendor coordination with minimal escalation

 • Surface risks, conflicts, or gaps before they become problems

 • Reduce unnecessary interruptions and “quick questions”

 • Act as a true gatekeeper of the CEO’s time



-



Required Experience & Traits

 • 2+ years as an Executive Assistant, Operations Assistant, or similar

 • Excellent written and spoken English (neutral accent required)

 • Highly organized, responsive, and detail-oriented

 • Comfortable in fast-paced, high-expectation environments

 • Emotionally steady and receptive to direct feedback

 • Loyal, discreet, and dependable



-



You Will Thrive Here If You:

 • Think in systems, workflows and outcomes

 • Take responsibility personally

 • Dislike chaos and proactively fix it by immediately building systems so it never happens again

 • Ask smart questions after attempting solutions

 • Prefer clear feedback over vague praise

 • Stay calm under pressure and don’t personalize corrections



This Role Is Not for You If You:

 • If you have ever missed a deadline, payment, or critical
 due to disorganization or oversight, this role will not be a fit. This role requires zero tolerance for missed financial or operational items.

 • Need constant reassurance or validation

 • Guess instead of asking when unclear

 • Take feedback personally

 • Avoid accountability

 • Prefer slow, low-pressure environments



-



What Success Looks Like

 • The CEO’s calendar is accurate, structured, and protected

 • Inbox = Zero Daily (for critical items)   

 • Tasks are handled without reminders

 • Errors are corrected quickly by creating systems and workflows and do not repeat

 • Communication is short, concise, and proactive

 • Trust compounds and responsibility expands rapidly



-



Why This Role Is Different

 • You get a front-row seat to how a real estate investment business is built and scaled

 • Strong performance leads to expanded responsibility, trust, and compensation

 • This is a long-term role for someone who wants to grow with a CEO—not hop jobs



-



Tools We Use

 • Google Workpace (Gmail, Calendar, Google Sheets, Google Docs) 

 • Asana

 • Slack

 • Airbnb / VRBO / Hospitable

 • REsimpli CRM

 • NordVPN (provided)

 • ChatGPT (not provided but required for this role) 





-



Non-Negotiable Setup Requirements

 • Quiet, separate, dedicated home office

 • Two monitors with an external mouse

 • Noise-canceling Bluetooth headset

 • Hardwired internet (minimum 300 Mbps download & upload speed)

 • Backup internet and backup power



Paid Time Off (PTO) 



After completing 90 days of employment, you will begin accruing paid time off equivalent to 10 days per year, accrued monthly starting on Day 91 (approximately 0.83 day per month).

-



Application Process (Follow Exactly or Your Application Will Not Be Reviewed)



Step 1: Attach your resume



Step 2: Record a Loom video answering:

 1. Why this role excites you

 2. A time you protected a leader’s time under pressure

 3. A mistake you made—and how you ensured it never happened again

 4. How you handled direct feedback

 5. Include the word “Control” in your Loom video.



Step 3:

 • Screenshot from Speedtest.net

 • Photo of your current home office setup



-



Trial Period



All hires begin with a 30-day paid trial period. Expect daily check-ins, real responsibility, and fast feedback. Repeated mistakes without system improvement will result in immediate termination.



We hire based on performance, correction speed, judgment, and character.

title: 3D & Graphic Designer
description:
We are looking an Experienced in 3D & Graphic Designer



-- Know how to using Adobe Illustrator, Adobe Photoshop (other 3D software is acceptable too), Sketch Up & 3D modelling

-- Able to work in a fast-paced environment

Jobscope

-- Liaise with sales person for all design

-- Artwork adaptation - making changes to layout (can be both 2D and 3D)

-- Developing ideas, brainstorming and conceptualizing





Job Requirements:



-- At least 3 years’ relevant work experience as a 3D & graphic designer

-- Good command of English, both written and spoken.

title: GHL Expert & SEO Specialist (50/50 Profit Sharing Partnership)
description:
PLEASE READ CAREFULLY BEFORE APPLYING



Do you want to build long-term passive income instead of just working hourly?



I am looking for an expert GoHighLevel (GHL) Web Developer and SEO Specialist to partner with me in a "Rank and Rent" business model.



What is Rank and Rent?

The goal is to build "Digital Real Estate." We build high-quality websites, optimize them for SEO, and rank them on the first page of Google. Once the websites start generating leads (usually in 3–6 months), we rent the websites to U.S.-based business owners or sell them the leads.



This is a long-term partnership. While it takes time to rank, the reward is passive income for both of us once the revenue starts coming in.



The Partnership Split:

This is NOT an hourly job. This is a high-commission partnership.



You will receive 50% of the net profit from every website you build and manage.



You will have full transparency to track the leads and the money earned from your specific sites.





My Role (The Business Owner):

1. Set up the U.S. Company (LLC) and Business Bank Account.

2. Provide all software, subscriptions, and tools needed for operations.

3. Find and close deals with U.S. companies to rent our sites or buy our leads.

4. Manage all bookkeeping and ensure you are paid your 50% share on time.



Your Role (The Developer/SEO Specialist):

1. Build high-converting, SEO-optimized websites on GoHighLevel.

2. Set up all necessary automations within GHL.

3. Perform SEO audits and maintenance to keep the websites ranking high.

4. Manage the technical side of the lead generation for the businesses we partner with.



Requirements:

1. Expert knowledge of GoHighLevel (GHL).

2. Proven experience in SEO (Search Engine Optimization).

3. A "Delayed Gratification" mindset—you understand that SEO takes 3–6 months, but the long-term passive income is worth the wait.

4. Strong communication skills and honesty.



How to Apply:

If you have never heard of this business model, please watch this video to understand the strategy before applying: 



To apply, please send a message with:

1. Your experience with GoHighLevel and SEO.

2. Any websites you have ranked on Google in the past.

3. Why you are interested in a 50/50 profit-sharing partnership rather than an hourly wage.



PS: Payments will be made via Wise or Paypal every month. You will have a live dashboard to see exactly how many leads are generated and what the profit is for the sites you manage.

title: Lead Bookkeeper & Operations Partner (50/50 Profit Share)
description:
Hello! My name is Kurtis. I am starting a new bookkeeping agency specifically designed for U.S. Home Service businesses (plumbers, roofers, HVAC, etc.). We provide high-quality, day-to-day bookkeeping at a more affordable rate than standard U.S. accounting firms.



I am not looking to hire an hourly employee. I am looking to hire a true Business Partner.



If you are a highly skilled QuickBooks Online (QBO) expert who wants to build a business from the ground up and share the profits, please read below.



The Opportunity: 50/50 Profit Split



This is not an hourly job. This is a high-commission partnership. We will split the net profits of the business 50/50. Because of our pricing structure and low overhead, your 50% share will scale quickly and be much higher than a standard hourly wage from a U.S. firm.



Requirements to Apply:

1. You must have at least 4 years of experience doing bookkeeping for U.S.-based businesses or accounting firms.

2. You must be an expert in QuickBooks Online (QBO). (Experience with trade software like Jobber or ServiceTitan is a massive bonus).

3. You must have excellent, fluent English communication skills (both written and spoken).

4. You must be comfortable working/overlapping with U.S. Pacific Standard Time (PST) to take sales calls with contractors and CPAs.



You must be an entrepreneur at heart—comfortable with outbound outreach and building systems.



How We Will Divide the Work:

My Responsibilities (Kurtis - The U.S. Founder):



1. I will set up the U.S.-based Corporation and handle all legal/tax compliance.

2. I will set up the U.S. business bank accounts and payment processing (Stripe).

3. I will pay for all startup expenses, software subscriptions (CRM,
 scrapers), and lead-generation tools.

4. I will act as the "face" of the U.S. company in trade groups and help you close deals on Zoom.



Your Responsibilities (Lead Operator & Partner):



1. Marketing & Outreach: You will execute our outbound marketing strategy (sending cold
s to U.S. CPAs, recording short Loom video audits for prospects, and managing our CRM).

2. Sales: You will handle inbound leads and book discovery calls.

3. Fulfillment: You will handle the day-to-day categorization, reconciliation, and month-end P&L generation for the clients we sign.



Our Pricing Strategy (Your Earning Potential):

To give you a clear idea of how much money you can make with your 50% split, here is what we charge our clients. (Notice this is much more affordable than the U.S. industry average, making it an easy sell!)



[ Starter Plan ] - $97 / month

Up to 100 Transactions

(U.S. Industry Avg: $250 - $400/mo)



[ Growth Plan ] - $197 / month (Most Popular)

101 to 250 Transactions

(U.S. Industry Avg: $450 - $650/mo)



[ Pro Plan ] - $297 / month

251 to 500 Transactions

(U.S. Industry Avg: $750 - $1,000+/mo)



If you are tired of working for a fixed hourly rate and want to build a real business where you get paid half of the profits for your hard work, this is the perfect opportunity.



How to Apply:

Please reply with the phrase "50/50 Partner" at the top of your message. Include a brief summary of your U.S. bookkeeping experience, your familiarity with QuickBooks Online, and why you are interested in a profit-share model instead of an hourly wage. Remember, you do need at least 4 years of experience working for a US bookkeeping/ accounting firm.

title: Executive Administrator
description:
Type: Full-Time (Remote)

Schedule: Monday–Friday (8-4 pm CST Hours Required | Flexibility for Executive Needs)



About Team Integrity Knowledge Center (TIKC) & Integrity Global Logistics (IGL)

Team Integrity Knowledge Center (TIKC) is a premier government contracting, consulting, and education firm that helps small businesses build, grow, and scale through strategic positioning, certifications, and contract readiness.

Integrity Global Logistics (IGL) is a minority women-owned logistics firm delivering transportation and supply chain solutions within the government and commercial sectors.

Together, these organizations operate at the intersection of strategy, execution, and opportunity, supporting businesses and agencies in navigating the government marketplace.

At the center of both is a CEO driving vision, partnerships, and growth—this role exists to protect, structure, and multiply that leadership capacity.



Role Overview

We are seeking a high-level Executive Administrator to serve as a strategic right hand to the CEO. This is not a traditional administrative role—this position is designed to operate alongside leadership, ensuring the CEO’s time, energy, and priorities are aligned with business growth and impact.

You will manage daily executive operations, streamline communication, oversee scheduling, and ensure follow-through across both companies. You will also support strategic initiatives, partnerships, guest speaking, travel, business growth, and government contracting activities, acting as a force multiplier in execution.

Your success is measured by how effectively you create structure, eliminate bottlenecks, and increase the CEO’s ability to operate at a high level.



Key Responsibilities

- Executive Calendar & Time Optimization

- Own and manage the CEO’s calendar with precision and strategy

- Prioritize meetings based on revenue, partnerships, and growth initiatives

- Ensure all meetings are prepared, confirmed, and aligned with clear outcomes

- Create structure in daily, weekly, and quarterly executive planning (this is important).



Executive Communication Management

- Manage and organize CEO
 inbox, ensuring timely responses and prioritization

- Draft, edit, and send high-level communications on behalf of the CEO

- Coordinate internal and external communication across stakeholders, partners, and clients

- Ensure clarity, professionalism, and alignment in all messaging and meetings



Operational Execution & Follow-Through

- Track and manage action items fro
etings, calls, and strategic discussions

- Ensure deadlines are met and tasks are completed across teams

- Act as a liaison between the CEO and internal departments (Marketing, Sales, Operations)

- Identify and eliminate operational bottlenecks



Strategic Support & Business Growth

- Assist in managing initiatives across TIKC and IGL, including partnerships, programs, tea
mbers, and revenue-generating activities

- Support contract sourcing, opportunity tracking, and high-level GovCon strategy (preferred experience)

- Prepare summaries, reports, and briefing documents for executive decision-making

- Help structure and maintain pipelines related to growth, partnerships, and contracting opportunities



Systems, Tools & Workflow Management

- Utilize and manage tools such as Slack, Google Workspace, Zoom, and 

- Leverage AI tools (e.g., Claude, ChatGPT) to increase efficiency in communication, research, and workflow automation

- Build and maintain organized systems for document management, communication tracking, and task execution

- Continuously improve workflows to enhance operational efficiency



Administrative Excellence

- Coordinate travel, meetings, and executive logistics

- Maintain confidentiality and discretion in all business matters

- Ensure all administrative functions are executed with precision and professionalism

- Anticipate needs before they arise and proactively solve problems



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

- Calendar efficiency and alignment with strategic priorities

-
 and communication response time and organization

- Task completion and follow-through across executive initiatives

- Reduction of operational bottlenecks and missed deadlines

- Increased executive productivity and time optimization

- Effectiveness in supporting revenue-generating and growth initiatives



Required Qualifications

- Proven experience in Executive Administration or Executive Operations

- Strong proficiency in Slack, Google Workspace, Zoom, and 

- Exceptional time management, organization, and prioritization skills

- Strong written and verbal communication skills in English

- Ability to manage high-level, confidential information with discretion

- Experience supporting senior leadership or C-level executives

- Tech-savvy with the ability to leverage AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT) for efficiency



Preferred Qualifications

- Experience in government contracting (GovCon)

- Knowledge of contract sourcing, federal/state opportunities, and bidding lifecycle

- Familiarity with proposal writing and project management

- Experience supporting businesses in logistics, transportation, or professional services

- Background in scaling operations or supporting high-growth environments



Ideal Candidate Traits

- Highly proactive and anticipatory

- Strong sense of ownership and accountability

- Strategic thinker with operational execution skills

- Detail-oriented with high-level awareness

- Calm under pressure and solution-focused

- Loyal, trustworthy, and aligned with leadership vision

- Able to move fast while maintaining accuracy and structure



Why This Role Matters

- This role is the force multiplier behind the CEO.

- By creating structure, managing priorities, and ensuring execution, you allow leadership to operate at the highest level—focusing on vision, partnerships, revenue, and impact.

- When done well, this role directly influences:

- Business growth across TIKC and IGL

- Execution of strategic initiatives

- Increased efficiency and decision-making speed

- Strengthened relationships with partners, clients, and stakeholders

- This is not just support—it is strategic leadership enablement.



------



How to Apply

If you are ready to operate at a high level and serve as a strategic partner to a growing CEO and multi-entity organization:

Apply here:

title: Applications Engineer
description:
Please only apply through this link: 





Company: FSW Group (Welsford and ValveMan)

Hours: Full-time, aligned with 8:00am - 5:00pm Eastern Time

Reports to: Sales / Technical Leadership

Compensation: $4-$8 per hour (based on experience)





-About Us



The FSW Group that is inclusive of Welsford and Valveman, is a family-owned, solution-focused distributor of valves and instrumentation with over 60 years of experience in the industrial, sanitary, and high-purity markets. We pride ourselves on expert service, high responsiveness, and a collaborative, supportive team culture.





-Position Summary



Our sales teams win by being fast, accurate, and consultative. The Applications Engineer is the technical backbone - you’ll collect the right process data, size/select/specify the right product, and help our team deliver the best customer experience in the valve and instrumentation space.





-Key Responsibilities



Technical intake: Receive information from the sales engineer around application details. (fluid, pressure/temperature, Cv/flow, materials, end connections, shutoff class, actuation, codes/standards, cleanliness requirements, etc.)



Product selection & specification: Recommend and specify the right solution across:



control valves, regulators, actuated valves, ball/butterfly/diaphragm valves



sanitary/high-purity valves and components



steam specialties (traps, PRVs, condensate) and safety relief (as applicable)



instrumentation tied to the application (basic accessories, gauges/transmitters where relevant)



Sizing & documentation: Perform or support sizing (as applicable), build clean submittals, and document assumptions clearly.



Expert for a few selected manufacturers (e.g. Jordan Valves, Steriflow)



Customer coordination: Work with customers as needed for technical specifications



Vendor coordination: Work with manufacturers/factories for technical confirmations, lead times, and quote support.



Sales enablement: Provide short, confident technical recommendations that help sales move faster 
-ready summaries).



Quality & high accuracy: Maintain clean records in our systems and to avoid doing re-quotes (product notes, selections, revisions, and key application data).



To generate quotes within the Prophet21 system for the outside sales team



Continuous learning: Become fluent in our line card and standard selection approach; build repeatable “playbooks” for common applications.





- Success Metrics



Strong product knowledge and selection skills across the FSW Group offering - especially control valves and regulators, with the ability to size, specify, and select the correct solution for the application.



Fast cycle time from inquiry ? recommended solution, with quick action and responsiveness to customer requests.



High accuracy (fewer re-quotes/returns/technical corrections) driven by clear, complete application data captured up front.



Strong vendor responsiveness, including timely follow-up and documented technical confirmations.



Consistent, professional write-ups the sales team can send directly to customers.



Team-first mindset - collaborative, reliable, and consistently living the company’s core values in a way that makes the sales team’s job easier.





- Required qualifications



Bachelor’s degree in Engineering (Mechanical/Chemical/Industrial) or equivalent technical experience with strong valve/process aptitude



3+ years in valves/instrumentation/process equipment or proven applications/technical sales support experience



Ability to read/interpret P&IDs, datasheets, specifications, IOMs



Strong written English - able to produce clean, customer-ready summaries



Highly organized: you follow a process, document assumptions, and close the loop





- Nice to have



Control valve/regulator sizing familiarity (or eagerness to learn quickly)



Experience supporting pharma, food & beverage, OEM skids, utilities, or power



CRM/ERP experience (Pipedrive, QuickBooks, BigCommerce, or similar)



Familiarity with sanitary/high-purity standards and materials





- Tools & work style



Remote-first collaboration 
/chat/video) with U.S.-based teams



Comfortable working with structured templates and SOPs



Security-minded: follows strong password/device hygiene and company data practices

title: Website Content & Page Builder Specialist (SEO-Aware)
description:
Overview

We’re looking for a detail-oriented Website Content & Page Builder Specialist to help build and populate pages using a block-based builder. This role is focused on execution—taking structured content and turning it into clean, well-formatted, SEO-friendly web pages.



This is not a project management or client-facing role. You’ll be working closely with me, and I will provide direction, structure, and priorities.



What You’ll Be Doing



Building pages using a block-based website builder (WordPress/Gutenberg (primary), Elementor, Divi, etc.)

Populating pages with provided content (text, images, sections)

Ensuring pages are clean, visually consistent, and properly structured

Applying basic on-page SEO best practices, including:

Correct URL structure

Proper use of H1, H2, H3 tags

Meta titles and descriptions (when needed)

Internal linking where appropriate

Double-checking your work to ensure pages are complete before marking them done



What I’m Looking For



Experience working with block-based website builders

Basic understanding of layout/design (spacing, hierarchy, readability)

Solid attention to detail (this is critical)

Familiarity with basic SEO principles (no advanced SEO required but this would be a plus)

Ability to follow instructions and execute consistently

Reliable communication and ability to stay aligned on tasks



What This Role Is NOT



Not a project management role

Not a strategy role

Not a client communication role



You will not be responsible for managing projects or speaking with clients.



Nice to Have 



Lots of Experience with WordPress

Light image editing or formatting skills

Previous experience working with agencies or production workflows



Working Style



Tasks will be clearly assigned with instructions

Communication will be primarily async, with some expected overlap for alignment

You’ll be expected to complete tasks and ensure they are fully finished before submission



How to Apply

Please create a video introduction using something like 
 or similar and go over the following items in the video:



Examples of pages you’ve built or worked on

What builders/CMS platforms you’ve used

A brief description of your SEO experience (basic is fine)

Your availability and time zone, I will need to sync up with you to clear up confusion, provide feedback, etc



This is less of a 9-5 type role and more of a just get tasks in your queue done. I will not be monitoring when you are at your computer or anything like that but I do expect to be able to get in touch with you (primarily via slack /
)



Important: Attention to detail is critical in this role. In your response, include the word “structured” so I know you’ve read this fully.

title: Digital Marketing VA – Meta Ads & GoHighLevel (Australian Clients)
description:
Digital Marketing VA – Meta Ads & GoHighLevel (Australian Clients)

About Us

We’re a growing Australian digital marketing agency specialising in lead generation for local businesses. We’re scaling hard and need a sharp, reliable VA to own the back end of our operations. This is a long-term role with real growth potential — we’re not looking for someone to fill a seat, we’re looking for someone who wants to grow with us.

The Role

You’ll be a core part of how we deliver results for our clients. You’ll follow our SOPs, build out campaigns, set up systems, and keep everything running smoothly behind the scenes. We need someone who is detail-oriented, takes ownership, and doesn’t need to be chased.

What You’ll Be Doing

 • Building and managing Meta/Facebook ad campaigns focused on lead generation for Australian businesses

 • Following SOPs accurately and flagging issues before they become problems

 • Communicating clearly and consistently with the team

What We’re Looking For

 • Proven hands-on experience with Meta Ads Manager, specifically lead generation campaigns

 • Solid experience with GoHighLevel — account setup, workflows, forms, and pipelines

 • Someone who can follow SOPs precisely and asks smart questions when needed

 • Strong attention to detail — our clients are paying for results and mistakes cost them money

 • Reliable, fast internet connection and a professional home working setup

 • Self-motivated, organised, and honest

 • Experience working with Australian businesses or Australian clients is a strong advantage

Bonus Points If You Have

 • Basic graphic design or ad creative skills using Canva or similar tools

 • Previous experience working inside a digital marketing agency

Pay & Hours

 • Competitive pay based on your experience and skill level — if you’re good, we’ll pay you well

 • Paid weekly for the first 2 months

 • Starting part-time with a clear path to full-time as we grow

 • Long-term position for the right person

How to Apply

To be considered, you must include all of the following:

 1. A summary of your Meta Ads experience — specifically lead generation campaigns and results you’ve driven

 2. A breakdown of your GoHighLevel experience — be specific about what you’ve built

 3. A Loom video (2–3 minutes) introducing yourself and walking through a campaign or GHL account you’ve set up

 4. Write the word “DIALED” at the top of your application

Applications missing any of the above will not be reviewed. No exceptions.????????????????

title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer, AI Automation
description:
We are building advanced autonomous AI agents that can reason, act, verify outcomes, self-correct, and operate real-world systems. These are not chatbots and not prompt-based toys. They are production-grade systems designed to execute complex tasks reliably and deterministically.



Our agents operate across multiple platforms, including but not limited to e-commerce systems such as Shopify, modern web frontends built with any stack, SaaS tools, internal systems, and automation workflows.



These agents are capable of interacting with real production environments. They can modify real codebases, operate browsers like real users, verify outcomes, diagnose failures, retry operations intelligently, and roll back changes safely when required.



We are looking for senior, hands-on engineers who can design, build, and own these systems end-to-end, from architecture to execution and verification. This is a deeply technical role focused on building real systems that operate autonomously.



What you will be building:



Autonomous AI agents with multiple roles, including planner or architect agents, executor agents, verifier agents, debugger agents, and supervisor or coordinator agents.



These agents analyze requirements, generate deterministic plans, apply changes safely, test outcomes, and self-correct when something breaks.



You will also work on cross-platform automation systems, including real browser automation that mimics user behavior, code modification agents, API-driven systems, event-driven workflows, and self-healing automations.



Real-world examples of problems these systems solve include safely modifying live frontend features, detecting broken user experiences and fixing them automatically, intercepting and controlling user flows such as forms, carts, and navigation, applying changes, testing them, and rolling back if tests fail, and operating across multiple products without platform lock-in.



Required skills (must have):



Strong engineering background with advanced Python experience and strong JavaScript skills for browser and frontend logic. Solid understanding of HTTP, REST APIs, and OAuth. Experience designing state machines and orchestration systems. Excellent debugging and system-level problem-solving skills.



Automation and systems experience, including Playwright or Puppeteer, DOM and network inspection, headless browser automation, event interception, and deterministic execution pipelines.



AI and agent systems experience, including programmatic use of large language models such as OpenAI, Gemini, or Anthropic, multi-agent coordination, guardrails against hallucinations, understanding deterministic versus probabilistic execution, and building tool-using agents beyond simple chat interfaces.



Strongly preferred qualifications:



Experience building autonomous or semi-autonomous systems. Experience safely modifying production systems and code. Familiarity with multiple platforms such as e-commerce, SaaS, and internal tools. Understanding of verification, rollback, and idempotency. Experience combining multiple AI models within a single system. Experience building internal UI tooling such as dashboards or admin panels.

title: Senior AI Systems Engineer (Local LLMs & Autonomous Agents)
description:

Your goal is to build a Python-based Orchestrator that manages LLM agents to plan, code, test, and deploy software without human intervention.

Python: Expert (Asyncio, Pydantic, FastAPI).



NVIDIA Stack: CUDA, NVIDIA Container Toolkit, Multi-GPU Inference (vLLM/TensorRT-LLM).

Testing: Implementing automated Fuzzing and Mutation testing pipelines.

Experience with S-LoRA (Serving thousands of LoRA adapters).



Background in compiler design or static analysis tools.

Hardware: 4x RTX 6000 (Ada/Blackwell).



OS: Ubuntu 24.04.



Language: Python 3.11+.



Container: Docker (GPU Enabled).

title: Photo Selection and Editing Specialist
description:
Role Focus (Primary Responsibility):



The core responsibility of this role is culling and photo selection - reviewing large volumes of images from professional shoots and identifying the top-tier photos that meet the photographer’s creative vision and quality standards.This includes:



* Selecting the best (typically 1 in 10) images from thousands of shots based on composition, emotion, lighting, sharpness, and overall impact

* Understanding and consistently applying the photographer’s style, brand, and artistic eye

* Eliminating duplicates, weak shots, and near-misses to deliver a clean, high-quality final selection

* Acting as a trusted second eye to streamline the post-shoot workflow and save significant time



Secondary Responsibilities:

* Edit and enhance selected images with accuracy and consistency

* Perform photo corrections including:

1. Cropping and straightening

2. Lighting and exposure adjustments

3. Color correction and grading

4. Background cleanup and retouching

* Prepare files for print production and digital delivery

* Ensure all edited images meet brand and client standards

* Organize, rename, and manage photo files efficiently

* Coordinate with the photographer on preferences, revisions, and deadlines

* Assist with light admin tasks related to photo workflows and delivery



Required Qualifications:

* Proven experience in photography, photo editing, or image curation

* Strong visual judgment with a keen eye for selecting standout images

* Proficiency in Adobe image editing software (Lightroom strongly preferred)

* Ability to quickly and accurately review high volumes of photos

* Strong understanding of composition, lighting, and storytelling through images

* High attention to detail and consistency in quality standards

* Organized, dependable, and deadline-driven

* Strong communication skills and ability to take direction on style preferences



Preferred Skills:

* Experience working directly with professional photographers or studios

* Familiarity with Lightroom workflows (culling, tagging, batch editing)

* Knowledge of print-ready file preparation

* Ability to match and maintain a consistent editing style across large batches

* Fast turnaround capability without sacrificing quality





Ideal Candidate:



A visually sharp, detail-oriented professional who naturally sees what others miss—someone who can step into a photographer’s workflow and confidently say, “These are the shots.”This person thrives in high-volume environments, has a refined aesthetic sense, and can act as an extension of the photographer’s creative eye, dramatically reducing post-production time while maintaining exceptional quality.





To fast-track your application, please submit the following information:

Resume: A link to your Google Drive. Please ensure the sharing setting is set to "Anyone with the link."



IMPORTANT REMINDER: To advance in the screening process, you must submit the Podio Form. Timely completion is essential to guarantee your application receives prompt attention.



[REQUIRED] Podio Form Link: 
/webforms/
/

title: Social Media Manager
description:
Job Description: 

As the Social Media Manager will be the voice of our brand across various social media channels. The Social Media Manager will be responsible for developing and executing engaging content strategies that educate and inform our audience about the importance of firearm safety, showcase our innovative products, and foster a positive online community. 

 Key Responsibilities:

• Content Creation: Develop and curate compelling content (text, images, videos) that aligns with our brand voice, resonates with our target audience.

• Community Management: Engage with followers, respond to comments and messages promptly, and foster a positive and supportive online community. 

• Campaign Execution: Plan and execute social media campaigns that align with our marketing objectives and drive measurable results in terms of brand awareness, engagement, and lead generation.

• Trend Monitoring: Stay up to date on the latest social media trends, algorithm changes and technology space.

• Qualities: Highly creative, organized, and detail-oriented. Excellent communication and interpersonal skills. Passionate about social media and its impact on business, with a strong interest in firearm safety and technology.

title: Property Management - Remote
description:
Please follow the application instructions below.



PropFix.ie is Ireland's trusted property maintenance specialist, offering comprehensive solutions with years of expertise across the construction and renovation sectors. We transform spaces through our diverse range of services, from handyman solutions and office fit-outs to complete renovations, house extensions, and specialized installations including doors, floors, and partitions.



Our commitment to delivering the best value property maintenance has established us as a reliable partner for residential and commercial clients nationwide. With decades of experience, including 50 years of expertise in garage conversions, we pride ourselves on impeccable craftsmanship, turning our clients' visions into reality while ensuring their properties remain in top condition.



Role Overview

We are seeking a proactive and detail-oriented Property Management Virtual Assistant to join our dynamic team. This role focuses on identifying and analyzing property investment opportunities in the UK market, managing tenant relations, and supporting property operations through comprehensive administrative and research functions. The successful candidate will work closely with property investors, agents, and stakeholders to identify profitable deals, maintain property portfolios, and ensure smooth property management operations across the UK market.

Property Analysis: Evaluate property deals based on location, condition, investment potential, and return on investment (ROI)

Investment Presentations: Prepare detailed property analysis reports and presentations for investment review

Opportunity Assessment: Screen and qualify property opportunities to ensure alignment with investment strategy



Property Marketing & Lead Generation

 Management: Draft, send, and organize
s, ensuring timely responses and professional communication

Administrative & Operational Support

Microsoft Office: Advanced proficiency in Excel for financial analysis, Word for documentation, and PowerPoint for presentations

Communication Skills

Phone Etiquette: Confident and professional telephone manner for agent and client calls

 Management: Ability to draft clear, professional
s and manage correspondence efficiently

Stakeholder Relations: Strong interpersonal skills for building relationships with agents, tenants, and investors



Analytical & Research Capabilities



Market Analysis: Ability to research and analyze property prices, rental yields, and market trends

Investment Assessment: Understanding of property investment metrics (ROI, yield, capital appreciation)

Attention to Detail: Meticulous attention to detail in property analysis and documentation

Critical Thinking: Strong problem-solving skills for evaluating property opportunities



Organizational Skills

Documentation: Strong record-keeping abilities and systematic approach to file management

title: JOB TITLE: Instagram Christian Social Media Marketer — Grief and Healing Niche
description:
ABOUT THIS ROLE

We are looking for an experienced Instagram social media marketer who understands Christian faith-based content, grief and healing topics, and funnel-driven Instagram strategy. This is a long-term part-time remote position supporting a growing digital healing community for women who have experienced pregnancy and infant loss.

This role is not for a general social media VA. We need someone who genuinely understands the emotional sensitivity required to market to grieving women, the nuances of Christian faith-integrated content, and the specific Instagram strategies that drive quiz completions and funnel conversions.

If you are a strong content scheduler who does not understand funnel strategy and conversion-focused content — this role is not the right fit.

If you understand how Instagram content drives lead generation, how ManyChat automation works alongside organic content, and how to speak to a deeply vulnerable audience with warmth and precision — we want to hear from you.



ABOUT THE BUSINESS

Pam Vredevelt is a Licensed Professional Counselor with 40 years of clinical experience, a bestselling author whose book Empty Arms has sold over 200,000 copies, and the author of Mending Miracles — a number one bestseller endorsed by celebrated author Anne Patchett.

Pam and her daughter Jessie co-lead a digital healing community — the Healing Path Community — for women healing from miscarriage, stillbirth, ectopic pregnancy, SIDS, and infant loss. The business includes a quiz-based lead generation funnel, personalized healing guides, a professional online course, and a monthly membership community with live



WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR

You are the right person for this role if all of the following are true.

You have at least two years of experience managing Instagram accounts for Christian, faith-based, wellness, or grief-related businesses.

You have experience creating or scheduling content that drives a specific action — quiz completions, link in bio clicks, DM responses, or funnel entries — not just likes and follows.

You understand ManyChat or are willing to learn it immediately. Our entire Instagram lead capture system runs through ManyChat and you will be responsible for monitoring its performance and flagging issues.

You are personally comfortable with Christian faith content. You do not need to share Pam’s faith but you must be able to write and schedule content that integrates scripture, prayer, and Biblical wisdom naturally and respectfully.

You understand grief. You have either personal or professional experience with loss and you understand instinctively why certain words, images, and tones are inappropriate for this audience. You will never post content that feels rushed, toxic-positive, or dismissive of grief.

You communicate proactively. You send updates without being asked. You flag concerns before they become problems. You ask for clarification before interpreting independently.

You are detail-oriented. Every caption, every hashtag, every posting time, every ManyChat keyword matters in a conversion-focused Instagram strategy. Careless execution is not acceptable in this role.



WHAT YOU WILL DO

Content Scheduling and Publishing

Schedule and publish three to four Instagram posts weekly across feed, Reels, and Stories using a content calendar provided and approved by Pam.

All captions are written by Pam or provided in copy documents. Your role is formatting, hashtag optimization, scheduling at optimal times, and confirming publication.

For Reels — download provided video files, add captions burned into video using CapCut or similar tool, format to correct dimensions, and schedule using Meta Business Suite or Later.

For Stories — design story cards in Canva using provided brand templates and copy, add link stickers pointing to quiz or relevant funnel pages, and publish on correct schedule.

For feed posts — format provided images or graphics to correct dimensions, apply provided captions with hashtags, and schedule at optimal posting times based on account analytics.

ManyChat Monitoring and Management

Monitor ManyChat daily for any flow errors, broken triggers, or failed message deliveries.

Respond to flagged conversations requiring personal response — specifically the I Have A Question trigger — within two hours by notifying Pam immediately.

Track keyword trigger performance weekly — how many people triggered each keyword, how many received the quiz link, how many clicked through. Report in weekly analytics summary.

Update ManyChat keyword lists when new campaign keywords are introduced.

Hashtag Research and Optimization

Maintain a master hashtag library of 150 to 200 researched hashtags organized by category.

Categories include pregnancy loss, miscarriage, stillbirth, infant loss, Christian grief, healing journey, faith and healing, women’s wellness, Christian women, grief support, and baby loss awareness.

Rotate hashtag sets across posts to avoid repetition penalties from the Instagram algorithm. No post uses the exact same hashtag set as the previous post in the same category.

Research and add minimum five new relevant hashtags monthly based on trending content in the grief and Christian wellness space.

Analytics and Reporting

Every Monday morning send a one-page weekly analytics report covering the following metrics for the previous week.

Top performing post by reach

Top performing post by saves

Top performing post by shares

Stories average reach and link sticker click rate

Reels average view rate at three seconds and fifteen seconds

Profile visits

Bio link clicks

ManyChat keyword trigger volume

Quiz entries attributed to Instagram traffic — tracked via UTM parameters

Net follower change

Flag immediately any metric that is significantly below the previous week’s baseline. Do not wait for Monday’s report if something is broken.

Content Calendar Management

Maintain a shared content calendar in Google Sheets or Trello updated at least one week in advance at all times.

Calendar shows post date, post type, copy status, design status, approval status, and published confirmation for every piece of content.

Flag any content gaps — days without scheduled content — at least five days in advance so Pam has time to provide new copy or repurpose existing content.

Campaign Coordination

When Pam launches a campaign — journal review request, membership open enrollment, podcast episode release, book promotion — coordinate the Instagram campaign elements across feed, Reels, and Stories according to the campaign deployment schedule provided.

Ensure all campaign content is scheduled correctly, all link stickers point to correct destinations, and all ManyChat keywords relevant to the campaign are active and tested before campaign launch date.



WHAT YOU WILL NOT DO

You will not write original copy from scratch without Pam’s input. All messaging decisions belong to Pam. You may suggest copy adjustments for formatting or character limits but you do not change the meaning or tone of any content independently.

You will not post anything that has not been approved by Pam. Every piece of content — feed post, Reel, Story card — requires Pam’s approval before publishing. Build your workflow around this requirement.

You will not engage in comment conversations on behalf of Pam without explicit written guidelines for how to respond. When in doubt, flag for Pam rather than responding independently.

You will not make strategic decisions about content direction, campaign timing, or audience targeting without Pam’s input. Your role is expert execution of defined strategy — not strategy creation.



TOOLS YOU MUST KNOW

Required — prior experience essential:

Meta Business Suite — scheduling and analytics

Canva — story card and graphic design using provided brand templates

ManyChat — flow monitoring and keyword management

Google Sheets or similar — content calendar management

CapCut or similar — Reel caption burning and basic video formatting

Required — willing to learn immediately if not already familiar:

Later or Planoly — alternative scheduling tool if preferred

UTM parameter tracking — basic understanding of how to add UTM parameters to links for traffic attribution

Meta Ads Manager — basic familiarity for coordinating organic content alongside paid ad campaigns



CHRISTIAN CONTENT REQUIREMENTS

This is a faith-integrated business. Christian content is not a peripheral element — it is central to who Pam is and who her audience is. You must be able to work confidently with the following content types.

Scripture graphics — formatting and scheduling posts that feature Biblical verses relevant to grief and healing

Prayer prompts — posts that invite the audience into prayer or reflection

Faith and neuroscience content — posts that bridge clinical healing science with Biblical wisdom

Testimony content — posts that share transformation stories through a faith lens

Holiday and liturgical calendar awareness — understanding which Christian holidays and observances are relevant to your posting schedule. Mother’s Day, Christmas, Easter, and Advent are particularly significant for a pregnancy loss audience and require thoughtful content planning in advance.

If you are uncomfortable with any of these content types please do not apply.



SCHEDULE AND AVAILABILITY

This is a part-time role requiring approximately fifteen to twenty hours per week.

You must be available for a weekly thirty-minute check-in call with Pam at a mutually agreed time. Calls are held via Zoom.

You must be reachable by
 or messaging app within four hours during your working hours Monday through Friday.

Urgent flags — ManyChat failures, broken links, campaign errors — require response within two hours regardless of day.

Time zone flexibility is required. Pam is based in Central time USA. You do not need to work Central hours but you must have sufficient overlap for weekly calls and prompt communication.



COMPENSATION

This is a negotiable monthly retainer based on experience and demonstrated results.

Expected range: $400 to $800 USD per month for fifteen to twenty hours weekly.

Candidates with documented experience driving Instagram lead generation and funnel conversions for Christian or faith-based businesses will be considered at the higher end of this range.

Candidates whose experience is primarily content scheduling without conversion focus will be considered at the entry level of this range with performance review at ninety days.

This role has growth potential. As the Healing Path Community scales and paid ad campaigns launch alongside organic content, the scope and compensation of this role will grow with demonstrated results.



HOW TO APPLY

Please answer all five questions below. Applications that do not address all five questions will not be reviewed. We are looking for someone who reads carefully and communicates specifically — your application is the first demonstration of both.

Question One

Describe one Instagram account you have managed for a Christian, faith-based, grief, or healing-related business. What was the account about, what was your specific role, and what measurable result did your work contribute to?

Question Two

Have you worked with ManyChat before? If yes describe one specific flow you built or managed and what it was designed to do. If no describe your experience with Instagram automation tools and your willingness to learn ManyChat before starting.

Question Three

This role serves women who have experienced miscarriage, stillbirth, and infant loss. Describe in two to three sentences how you would approach creating and scheduling content for this specific audience. What would you never do and why?

Question Four

Describe your experience with conversion-focused Instagram content — content designed to drive a specific action like a link click, DM response, or quiz completion. Give one specific example.

Question Five

What is your proposed monthly retainer for fifteen to twenty hours per week and what tools do you currently use for content scheduling and analytics?



ONE FINAL NOTE

This role requires someone who genuinely cares about the women this business serves. Behind every Instagram impression is a grieving mother searching for something that understands her pain. The content you schedule and the ManyChat flows you monitor are the first point of contact between her and a resource that could genuinely change her healing journey.

We do not take that lightly. We hope you won’t either.

If this resonates with who you are and how you work — we look forward to hearing from you.

Pam Vredevelt Team

title: Hotel Acquisition Consultant
description:
TERMS OF REFERENCE (ToR)

Consultant to Develop Business Plan, Financial Model, and Investor Pitch for Hotel Acquisition & Expansion Project in Antigua & Barbuda

1. Background



The Sponsor is evaluating the acquisition and repositioning of a 40-room hotel in Antigua & Barbuda, with a strategy to renovate, stabilize operations, and expand the property to 80–100 rooms over time. The project includes:



Acquisition and renovation of an existing hotel asset

Operational repositioning into a differentiated boutique/lifestyle offering

Phased expansion to increase room inventory and revenue capacity

Structuring and raising equity capital, including potential use of international crowdfunding platforms



The Sponsor seeks to engage a qualified consultant (or firm) to prepare a bankable business plan, financial model, and investor pitch materials to support capital raising and strategic decision-making.



2. Objective of the Assignment



The objective is to produce investment-grade documentation and analysis that will:



Assess the commercial viability of the project

Define a clear repositioning and operating strategy

Develop a robust financial model and capital structure

Prepare a compelling investor pitch suitable for international equity investors and crowdfunding platforms

3. Scope of Work



The consultant will be responsible for the following:



3.1 Market and Industry Analysis

Overview of Antigua tourism and hospitality market

Demand segmentation (leisure, business, long-stay, airline crew, etc.)

Competitive benchmarking (ADR, occupancy, positioning)

Identification of target customer segments

3.2 Hotel Concept and Operating Strategy

Recommended positioning (e.g., boutique, lifestyle, extended stay)

Differentiation strategy to drive ADR and occupancy

Branding and guest experience concept

Operating model (independent vs branded vs managed)

Staffing and operational structure

3.3 Development and Expansion Strategy

Phased expansion plan (room additions, amenities)

High-level site utilization recommendations

Capex estimates (renovation and expansion)

Implementation timeline

3.4 Financial Model (Core Deliverable)

10-year integrated financial model including:

Revenue projections (ADR, occupancy, segmentation)

Operating costs (detailed line items)

EBITDA and cash flow projections

Sensitivity analysis (ADR, occupancy, cost inflation)

Development of:

Base case, downside, and upside scenarios

Capital structure modeling:

Debt financing scenarios

Equity contributions

Phased investment strategy

3.5 Deal Structuring and Investor Returns

Recommended capital stack (debt, equity, preferred equity)

Investor return framework (IRR, cash yield, exit assumptions)

Waterfall structure (preferred return, profit-sharing)

Exit scenarios and valuation

3.6 Investor Pitch Book / Investment Memorandum



Preparation of a high-quality pitch deck suitable for:



High-net-worth investors

Institutional investors

International crowdfunding platforms



The pitch deck should include:



Investment thesis

Market opportunity

Project concept and differentiation

Financial highlights

Capital structure and returns

Use of proceeds

Exit strategy

3.7 Crowdfunding Strategy (Optional but Preferred)

Assessment of suitable international platforms

Structuring approach for crowdfunding raise

Investor targeting strategy

Key messaging for retail and diaspora investors

4. Deliverables



The consultant will provide:



Comprehensive Business Plan (Word/PDF)

Financial Model (Excel, fully dynamic and editable)

Investor Pitch Deck (PowerPoint, professional quality)

Executive Summary (5–10 pages)

Optional: Crowdfunding strategy note



All deliverables must be of investment-grade quality, suitable for external investors.



5. Duration and Timeline

Expected duration: 4-6 weeks

Key milestones:

Inception report: Week 1

Draft business plan and model: Week 2-4

Draft pitch deck: Week 5



6. Required Qualifications



The consultant must demonstrate:

Master's Degree in Accounting, Finance or relevant field.



Core Expertise

Proven experience in hotel or hospitality consulting

Strong track record in business plan development

Advanced skills in financial modeling and investment analysis

Experience in deal structuring (debt/equity, waterfalls, IRR analysis)

Highly Desirable

Experience with hotel acquisitions or developments

Experience preparing investor pitch decks

Exposure to equity fundraising or crowdfunding platforms

Knowledge of Caribbean or small island tourism markets (is a plus)





7. Submission Requirements



All applicants must submit:



Consultant Profile

Relevant qualifications

Portfolio / Track Record (MANDATORY)

At least 3–5 examples of similar assignments, including:

Hotel or real estate business plans

Financial models

Investor pitch decks

Clear description of role played in each project



???? Applications without a portfolio will not be considered



8. Evaluation Criteria

Criteria Weight

Relevant experience and portfolio 30%

Technical approach and methodology 25%

Financial modeling and structuring expertise 20%

Quality of past work (pitch decks, plans) 15%

Cost 10%



All information related to the project must be treated as strictly confidential and may not be disclosed without prior written consent from the Sponsor.

title: AI Video Editor - Long-Form (Sleep & Educational History Content)

We’ve built an internal application that significantly speeds up production; it generates the script, voice-over, image prompts, and initial images within a few steps. This removes hours of manual work. Your role will be to manage and refine this pipeline, ensuring everything aligns and translates into a high-quality final video.



What You’ll Do:

Create long-form videos (1–2+ hours), including:

-Sleep / relaxation content

-Educational / B-roll-style videos



Manage the AI pipeline:

-Take generated scripts, voice-overs, and visuals from our tool

-Adjust and refine images so they match what the voice-over is saying

-Ensure scenes are visually consistent and make sense contextually

-Edit and assemble the final videos:

-Create a natural, engaging viewing experience

-Produce the final output and upload to YouTube

-Editing and assembling into a final video

-Important: Quality Standard



We are aiming for content that:



-Feels authentic and not overly AI-generated

-Uses AI video + B-roll, not just static AI images

-Has enough visual variation to maintain engagement

-Avoids repetition and low-effort scene generation



Examples:

-

-
