title: YouTube Thumbnail Designer (History Docuseries | High-CTR / Viral Style)
description:
About Us:



My name is Reece, and we’re expanding our network of YouTube channels across history-focused niches, using storytelling and long-form videos.



We’re building a portfolio of high-performing YouTube channels designed to reach millions of viewers globally, and we’re looking for a Thumbnail Designer who understands clicks (not just design)



Your work will directly impact whether a video gets ignored… or gets 100K–1M+ views. Thumbnails are one of the biggest drivers of that growth.



This isn’t a one-off project. There’s long-term upside as we expand into more channels.



The Opportunity:



This is not a typical design role. You’ll be responsible for creating thumbnails that:

- Stop the scroll

- Create curiosity instantly

- Drive high click-through rates (CTR)



You’ll work on content designed to:

- Hit 100K–1M+ views

- Compete with fast-growing history channels

- Stand out in highly competitive feeds



You won’t just design. You’ll help shape:

- The visual style of the channel

- What makes someone click vs scroll past

title: YouTube Video Editor (History Docuseries | AI Driven Content Studio)
description:
About Us:



My name is Reece, and we’re expanding our network of YouTube channels across history-focused niches, using storytelling and long-form videos.



We’re building a portfolio of high-performing YouTube channels designed to reach millions of viewers globally, and we’re looking for a Video Editor who understands storytelling, pacing, and retention (not just cutting clips)



You’ll take a leading role in launching a brand-new AI-powered history docuseries channel.



This isn’t a one-off project... there’s long-term upside as we expand into more channels.



We’re combining:



- AI-generated videos using Veo 3 or Kling

- Sound design

- Engaging clips

- AI-generated imagery

- Clear, compelling voiceovers



The Opportunity:



This is not a typical editing role. You’ll be responsible for turning ideas into videos that people actually watch to the end.



You’ll work on content designed to:

- Hit 100K-1M+ views

- Keep viewers engaged for long durations

- Compete with fast-growing history channels



You won’t just edit... You’ll help shape:

- Pacing, structure, and storytelling

- The overall style we’re building toward



Here are a few examples of the style we’ll be emulating:

- 

- 

-

- Combine clips and AI visuals into an engaging final video

- Maintain strong pacing and storytelling throughout



Upsides:

title: Illustrator Graphic Designer
description:
Urgent Hiring — Applications Reviewed on a Rolling Basis. The selection process may take up to 4 weeks, but early applicants are strongly encouraged.



Make Your Mark in Design, Lead Creativity, and Contribute to Our Vision.



Hadley Designs is seeking a Illustrator Graphic Designer to join our creative team and play a pivotal role in crafting high-quality, visually stunning designs that enhance our brand presence. If you are a creative powerhouse proficient in Adobe Illustrator with a keen eye for design, we want you to help bring our vision to life.



This is a hands-on, dynamic role ideal for a creative professional passionate about design and eager to make an impact on a fast-growing company. You’ll collaborate with leadership, work on high-priority assignments, and ensure the seamless execution of design projects that elevate Hadley Designs' brand.



About Hadley Designs

Hadley Designs is a family-founded, female-led brand committed to shaping brighter futures through creativity and purposeful design. We create screen-free learning tools that spark curiosity, build confidence, and transform everyday 
nts into meaningful growth. Each product is hand-drawn, crafted with input from teachers, parents, and child development experts, ensuring learning is joyful, engaging, and accessible.



Our mission is simple: to help families and educators unlock children’s potential with tools that inspire curiosity, strengthen connections, and support learning without screens. Trusted by over two million customers worldwide, we are passionate about designing experiences that make children feel supported, capable, and excited to learn.



If you’re looking for a company that designs with purpose and builds with heart, you’ll feel right at home here.



How You’ll Win at Hadley Designs



We believe in structured creativity. Success in this role means owning your projects and delivering high-quality designs that resonate with our customers while maintaining our visual standards. We’re looking for someone who thrives in a creative environment, is proactive, and possesses a strong attention to detail.



Every Design Assistant is expected to:



-Learn the Playbook – Understand our design standards, expectations, and creative processes.

-Apply the Playbook – Execute designs consistently, meeting project requirements and adhering to brand guidelines.

-Enhance the Playbook – Suggest creative improvements and innovative design strategies after mastering the basic framework.

-We value innovation grounded in proven execution and a clear understanding of design principles.



What You’ll Own



-Creation of high-quality, error-free design assets for advertising and marketing campaigns.

-Maintaining consistency in typography, color schemes, and layout across all platforms.

-Regular updates and design of storefront assets for Amazon, Shopify, and other platforms.

-Designing A+ Content templates and custom brand image ads.

-Handling urgent design needs for product launches and special projects.

-Working closely with leadership to ensure deadlines are met and projects are delivered on time.



What Success Looks Like

Within your first 90 days, you will:



-Learn and execute Hadley Designs’ design standards with precision.

-Contribute fresh design ideas that align with the brand and improve our current processes.

-Deliver high-quality artwork that meets or exceeds expectations and is on-brand.

-Support Becca and leadership with urgent creative tasks and maintain consistency in all design work.



Apply Now, Lead Creativity, and Shape Our Future.



Requirements

Who You Are:



-2+ years of professional experience in graphic design or related fields, with a strong portfolio.

-Proficient in Adobe Illustrator and Photoshop, with a strong grasp of CMYK color management and print-ready file preparation.

-Excellent attention to detail and ability to produce high-quality visuals with minimal revisions.

-Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple tasks and meet deadlines.

-Comfortable receiving and implementing feedback while maintaining a high standard of work.

-Creative, collaborative, and self-driven, motivated by quality and continuous improvement.



Benefits

Why You’ll Thrive Here:



-Join a creative, high-growth company with an established 10+ year track record.

-Own significant projects and make an impact from day one.

-Flexibility to work remotely with a flexible schedule.

-Opportunities for personal development and direct interaction with the Chief Creative Officer.

-A culture of collaboration, trust, and innovation, where your contributions are valued.



Apply Now

If you're a passionate graphic designer who thrives in a dynamic and creative environment, we'd love to hear from you. Apply today to join Hadley Designs and help shape the future of our brand!



P.S. If you don’t hear from us within four weeks of your application, please consider that as our decision to move forward with other candidates, but we truly appreciate your interest in Hadley Designs.



To formally apply : apply here

title: GHL EXPERT
description:
NEEDED ASAP!!!



We're seeking a versatile GoHighLevel expert who can work across multiple industries and client types. Whether it's real estate, healthcare, e-commerce, professional services, coaching, home services, or beyond—you'll be the go-to person for building scalable automation solutions that work for diverse business models.



As a GHL Expert, you'll design, implement, and manage GoHighLevel systems for clients across various industries. You'll need to quickly understand different business needs, customize workflows accordingly, and deliver solutions that drive results regardless of the sector.



Key Responsibilities:

1.Build and customize automated workflows, funnels, and campaigns for diverse industry clients

2.Set up and manage CRM pipelines tailored to different business models and sales cycles

3.Create industry-specific landing pages, forms, and
/SMS marketing campaigns

4.Integrate third-party tools and APIs based on client-specific tech stacks

5.Develop custom snapshots and templates adaptable across multiple industries

6.Configure appointment scheduling, calendars, and booking systems for various service types

7.Implement reputation management and review automation across platforms

8.Adapt strategies for B2B, B2C, and service-based businesses

9.Train clients and tea
mbers on GHL best practices

10.Monitor performance metrics and optimize campaigns for different KPIs and business goals

11.Troubleshoot technical issues across varied use cases



Required Qualifications:

1.2+ years of hands-on experience with GoHighLevel across multiple industries

2.Proven ability to quickly understand different business models and adapt solutions

3.Strong knowledge of marketing automation, sales funnels, and CRM workflows

4.Experience building
/SMS campaigns for different audience types

5.Proficiency in creating landing pages, forms, and conversion-focused assets

6.Knowledge of webhooks, API integrations, and third-party tool connections

7.Understanding of varied lead generation strategies (B2B vs B2C, service vs product-based)

8.Excellent problem-solving skills and ability to think strategically

9.Strong english communication skills to work with clients from different backgrounds

10.Portfolio demonstrating work across at least 3 different industries



Preferred Qualifications:

1.GoHighLevel certification

2.Experience with white-label or agency GHL setups

3.Knowledge of HTML/CSS for custom designs

4.Background in digital marketing, sales, or business consulting

5.Familiarity with industry-specific tools (MLS systems, practice management software, e-commerce platforms, etc.)

6.Experience with AI automation, chatbots, and conversational marketing

7.Understanding of compliance requirements across industries (HIPAA, TCPA, GDPR, etc.)



Industries You May Support:

Real Estate & Mortgage

Healthcare & Wellness

E-commerce & Retail

Coaching & Consulting

Home Services (HVAC, Plumbing, Roofing, etc.)

Professional Services (Legal, Accounting, Financial)

Fitness & Gyms

Automotive & Dealerships

Education & Training

Restaurants & Hospitality

And more



HPW TO APPLY:



Submit your Portfolio showcasing GHL projects across different industries

Examples of workflows, funnels, or campaigns you've built

Brief descriptions of the industries and challenges each project addressed

Results or metrics achieved (when available)

Audio OR video introduction for screening purposes



Applications without an updated resume and audio/video submission will NOT be entertained.



Submit the following through OLJ



We welcome applicants from all backgrounds and industries. If you're passionate about automation and love solving diverse business challenges, we want to hear from you!

title: Virtual Assistant
description:
NOW HIRING: Social Media & Design Virtual Assistant (Solar Industry)

Full-Time | Remote | Growth Opportunity



Are you creative, organized, and know how to actually execute — not just “post and hope”?



At US Power Solar, we’re growing fast and looking for a high-level Virtual Assistant who can handle graphic design, social media scheduling, and marketing support for a fast-paced solar company.



This is NOT a basic admin role.

We need someone who can think, create, and execute.



What You’ll Be Doing

Create clean, engaging graphics for social media (Instagram, TikTok, ads)

Schedule and manage content across platforms

Upload and manage content in Go High Level (GHL)

Support canvassing & sales teams with marketing materials

Assist with Sales Rabbit updates / tracking / support

Post blogs and update website (WordPress)

Keep marketing organized, consistent, and on-brand

Available to work US Los Angeles hours (Graveyard shift) No Exceptions



What We’re Looking For

Strong graphic design skills (Canva, Adobe, etc.)

Experience scheduling and managing social media content

Familiar with Go High Level (GHL) (big plus)

Familiar with Sales Rabbit (huge plus)

Solar experience (preferred, not required — we can train)

Highly organized and detail-oriented

Able to work independently and meet deadlines

Strong communication and responsiveness



Who This Is For

Someone who takes ownership of their work

Someone who doesn’t need to be micromanaged

Someone who wants to grow with a company — not just clock in/out

Someone who actually cares about the quality of what they produce



Why US Power Solar?

Fast-growing company in the renewable energy space

Real opportunity for growth and advancement

Work directly with leadership

Be part of a mission-driven team making real impact

 

Bonus Points If You:

Have worked in solar, real estate, or lead generation

Understand branding, marketing, and content strategy

Can bring ideas — not just follow instructions



How to Apply



Send:



Your resume

Portfolio or examples of design/social media work

(Optional but recommended) Links to accounts you’ve managed



If you’re organized, creative, and ready to level up — we want to hear from you.
